name: ALPINE HX-Z6
short: 5.6-Inch Global UHF DMR Smartphone Navigator Powered by Google Mobile Services and Hema Maps
src:
This powerful all-in-one device, the ALPINE HX-Z6, is your ultimate outdoor co-pilot . Equipped with Hema Off-Road Maps and full Android OS functionality, you have seamless versatility and rugged performance in one portable unit with access to a wide range of outdoor tools, entertainment, and communication apps directly from the Google Play Store as well as Android Auto capability. 
 Whether you’re hiking, trail riding, motorcycling, or exploring off the track, the ALPINE HX-Z6 offers reliable offline maps, GPS tracking, app support, and is ready for your next off-road adventure or outdoor expedition . 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 UHF & DMR (Digital Mobile Radio) 
 
 Discover the features of the ALPINE HX-Z6 for enhanced outdoor experiences . 
 Stay connected anywhere with built-in walkie-talkie functionality. With up to 10km range in open areas and up to 5km in urban terrain, you can count on clear communication in any situation without needing a mobile signal. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Go Anywhere 
 The HX-Z6 opens up a world of opportunities to venture outdoors and explore new landscapes. From hiking up a mountain to roaming through a forest you can be confident of your surroundings and where to go. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 High Durability for Extreme Conditions 
 Rugged and durable, the HX-Z6 is shock proof, dust proof and is waterproof to IP68/IP69K standard. Moreover, it’s MIL-STD-810H Military certified to perform in the harshest of environments, ready for any off-road adventure or outdoor conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Long Lasting Performance 
 Powered by a MediaTek Helio G99 octa-core processor, 12GB RAM, and a massive 10,850mAh battery with 33W fast charging, HX-Z6 delivers outstanding performance, offering up to 600 hours standby and 39 hours of talk time. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 NFC & Google Pay 
 Make contactless payments on the go with built-in NFC and Google Pay. Convenient, fast, and secure, perfect for fueling up, grabbing supplies, or paying without reaching for your wallet. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dual-Sim & Micro SD Memory 
 Triple card slots offer dual SIM capability and a dedicated microSD slot. Stay connected, expand storage, and travel lighter, no need to choose between flexibility and functionality. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Face Unlock & Fingerprint ID 
 Access your device securely and instantly with Face Unlock and side-mounted Fingerprint ID. Two fast, reliable ways to unlock, whether you’re gloved up or moving fast. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Gloves Mode 
 Use the touchscreen even with gloves on. Gloves Mode keeps the display responsive in challenging conditions that require gloves, ideal for rough terrain, winter trails, or hands-on adventure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hema 4WD Maps 
 Access Hema’s renowned 4WD map collection, rich with topographic maps, track difficulty, and terrain data. Perfect for overlanding, route planning, and serious off-road challenges. Sold Seperately. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 All-New Hema 3D Explorer Map 
 Hema 3D maps are the ultimate visual aid to help guide you to any remote destination, featuring detailed elevation lines as well as track difficulty information, you’ll always know what to expect. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Seamless On-Road to Off-Road Navigation 
 Featuring detailed route planning, turn-by-turn directions, and seamless transitioning between on-road and off-road navigation, Hema ensures you arrive at your destination smoothly. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Campsites & POIs 
 Want to know if your planned accommodation has power, laundry facilities, amenities, ETC—or prefer to phone ahead to check availability? Hema’s vast database library helps you plan to perfection, ensuring there are no unwelcome surprises. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hema Explorer Maps 
 The all new Hema features off-road 3D maps, as well as topographical maps for explorers and enthusiasts, with highly accurate tracking and navigational function. Discover national parks, desert dunes, trails, or any unsealed roads Hema makes every journey a confident adventure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Online Map Updates 
 Easily install the latest map updates. With a constantly growing list of points of interest, track updates, and enhanced functionality, you’ll always be up-to-date for your next adventure.

short: 9″ Integrated Hi-Res Audio Receiver | Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto (USB) | Bluetooth | DAB+ suitable for Land Cruiser 200 Series (2008-2015)
src:
Alpine i905-LC08 for LandCruiser 200 Series (2008-2015) 
 
Alpine’s innovation continues with the unique design of the i905-LC08, delivering an innovation masterpiece created for the digital era. Housed within the premium OEM quality fascia is the all-new 9″ WXGA high definition display that showcases all your media in stunning contrast and clarity. The new keyset with centre glass keys are immediately identifiable as a signature Alpine product, and has a great tactile feel and feedback. 
 
Equipped with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto (USB), an endless array of entertainment and smartphone apps are available to use in your dashboard. Get directions with maps and navigation apps, send and receive messages, make calls and listen to music all without a cable in sight. 
 
With TIDAL now built-in, soak in your favourite songs with a new level of fidelity and elevate your music streaming experience in wireless Hi-Res audio like you’ve never heard it before. For those with a large existing library of Hi-Res audio content that is also supported up to 96kHz 24bit. 
 
A world-first innovation, the i905-LC08 equipped with a powerful built-in Class-D amplifier to deliver the richness and dynamics of your music for the most superior sound performance. 
 
Moreover, with Alpine’s extensive sound tuning built-in you can apply simple one touch audio adjustments to make your cabin space sound brilliant, or for pro-level users and enthusiasts a host of advanced tuning functions are available. 
 
Alpine’s i905-LC08 is the complete audiophile and lifestyle solution for all 200 Series enthusiasts—not only creating a dynamic interior appeal, but also delivering an incredible connectivity and multimedia experience with impeccable audio performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 High-Definition Laminated Display 
 
Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 
 
No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wirelessly connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Android Auto 
 The convenience of Android Auto lets you bring the ever-expanding apps into the dash of your car. From either the display or voice command you can make calls, send and receive messages, play music apps or set a destination via Google Maps or Waze. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Smartphone Navigation 
 
Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience. 
 
With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control. 
 
Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tidal Built-In 
 
With TIDAL built-in, stream all your favourite artists wirelessly in incredible master-quality definition. Providing you exclusive access to high-profile music and original content – experience a more intimate connection with music creators through intuitive playlist curation and ability to save your favourite albums, tracks or playlists to the preset menu for quick access. Furthermore, MQA Studio playback ensures absolute audio authenticity, exactly to the artists original recording. Never before seen in car audio, TIDAL’s wireless Hi-Res audio streaming is a must for the modern audiophile. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Spotify 
 
Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hi-Res Audio Certified with USB and Wireless Connectivity 
 
Audiophile and music fans can now enjoy a true high-fidelity audio experience with the astonishing detail and musical beauty of Hi-Res Audio. The i905-LC08 supports up to 192kHz/24Bit FLAC/WAV and APE high-resolution audio files with their intended playback specification of 96kHz/24Bit. This means, no longer do you have to compromise your listening experience lost in highly-compressed traditional audio formats, in Hi-Res your music now comes alive with stunning clarity and every nuance revealed, just as the artist intended. When playing Hi-Res Audio files the i905-LC08 will display the Hi-Res icon and file bit rate. 
 
Even more impressive, equipped with Hi-Res Audio Wireless and LDAC technology, you can connect your smartphone via USB or wirelessly and use Hi-Res Audio streaming services or apps bringing a virtually limitless music library with the purest sound right inside your car. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-in Class-D Amplifier 
 
An industry world first, the i905-LC08 is equipped with Class-D amplifier technology producing a massive 50 x 4 Watts of power, delivering the best sound quality and dynamics from high-resolution music. Class-D amplifiers are known to be highly efficient and capable of beautiful high-end sound reproduction with significantly reduced noise and phase shift. What’s more, new ultra-high-spec fans and internal heat sinks direct and dissipate any unwanted heat, ensuring optimum temperature control and audio performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 External Control Knob (RUE-BK01A sold separately) 
 
The RUE-BK01A external control knob (sold separately) connects wirelessly to the i905-LC08 and can be installed on either side of the display for added convenience. Alternatively, you can place the control knob anywhere else within the vehicle and for custom installation professionals the mounting possibilities are virtually endless. Rotation of the knob controls the unit volume output, while a push of the knob will cycle through your vehicles safety cameras on screen. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Advanced Sound Tuning 
 
Alpine sound quality performance is of the highest standards and with advanced sound tuning you are empowered with the tools to tune your system to perfection, as well as to the specific environment of your vehicle. 
 
Featuring a 56-band Parametric EQ in the advanced mode, a 2-way digital crossover, 6-channel digital time correction, plus several Bass Engine SQ and MediaXpander settings provides sound tuning for simple to comprehensive high-end systems with multiple power amplifiers, speakers and subwoofers. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DAB+ Digital Radio 
 DAB+ provides you with a range of quality digital only stations that you can search by station name and genres. DAB+ offers a variety of stations with music eras and types, as well as talkback stations. DAB+ displays station info and music metadata, offers clearer sound and improved reception, achieving a noise free, crystal clear radio listening experience. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio Streaming Apps 
 
With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, YouTube Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 2x USB Connections 
 
 The 2x rear USB ports allow for even greater flexibility. USB port 1 provides fast charging of your smartphone while using wireless connectivity. USB Port 2 is your entertainment gateway, allowing audio and video playback via connection of a memory stick, portable drive or SSD and if desired wired connectivity to your smartphone for Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-In Bluetooth 
 Built-in Bluetooth enables wireless connection of a mobile phone for the convenience and safety of hands free phone and audio streaming. Plus, you can use voice control through the external microphone included. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HDMI Connectivity 
 HDMI enables connectivity to a number of different devices including smartphone mirroring—making audio and video playback possible in high-definition through the 9” display for virtually limitless entertainment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dual Camera Input 
 The i905-LC08 provides the opportunity to add a reverse and either front or side camera directly to the unit itself. You can toggle between these camera’s directly from the camera screen, allowing a wide view of any potential obstacles around your vehicle.

short: 9" Integrated Hi-Res Audio Receiver | Wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto (USB) | Bluetooth | DAB+ suitable for Land Cruiser 70 Series
src:
Alpine i905-LC70 for Land Cruiser 70 Series 
 For all 70 Series enthusiasts who demand the ultimate in-car experience, Alpine’s all-new i905-LC70 has been engineered with cutting-edge design to elevate the in-cabin aesthetic. The high-definition WXGA 9” display acts as a stunning new centrepiece to the interior, integrating seamlessly whilst also showcasing design cues in-line with the 70 Series rugged history. Discover an industry-leading innovation masterpiece, delivering unmatched quality and value for the ultimate 21 st century off-road lifestyle. 
 Equipped with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto (USB), an endless array of entertainment and smartphone apps are available to use in your dashboard. Get directions with maps and navigation apps, send and receive messages, make calls and listen to music all without a cable in sight. 
 With TIDAL now built-in, soak in your favourite songs with a new level of fidelity and elevate your music streaming experience in wireless Hi-Res audio like you’ve never heard it before. For those with a large existing library of Hi-Res audio content that is also supported up to 96kHz 24bit. 
 With a world-first innovation, the i905-LC70 equipped with a powerful built-in Class-D amplifier to deliver the richness and dynamics of your music for the most superior sound performance. 
 Moreover, with Alpine’s extensive sound tuning built-in you can apply simple one touch audio adjustments to make your cabin space sound brilliant, or for pro-level users and enthusiasts a host of advanced tuning functions are available. 
 The i905-LC70 is the new benchmark for all 70 Series enthusiasts—elevating the interior aesthetic in every way possible, whilst delivering an incredible connectivity and multimedia experience with impeccable audio performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 High-Definition Laminated Display 
 Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 
 No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wirelessly connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Android Auto 
 The convenience of Android Auto lets you bring the ever-expanding apps into the dash of your car. From either the display or voice command you can make calls, send and receive messages, play music apps or set a destination via Google Maps or Waze. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Smartphone Navigation 
 Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience. 
 With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control. 
 Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tidal Built-In 
 With TIDAL built-in, stream all your favourite artists wirelessly in incredible master-quality definition. Providing you exclusive access to high-profile music and original content – experience a more intimate connection with music creators through intuitive playlist curation and ability to save your favourite albums, tracks or playlists to the preset menu for quick access. Furthermore, MQA Studio playback ensures absolute audio authenticity, exactly to the artists original recording. Never before seen in car audio, TIDAL’s wireless Hi-Res audio streaming is a must for the modern audiophile. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Spotify 
 Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hi-Res Audio Certified with USB and Wireless Connectivity 
 Audiophile and music fans can now enjoy a true high-fidelity audio experience with the astonishing detail and musical beauty of Hi-Res Audio. The i905-LC70 supports up to 192kHz/24Bit FLAC/WAV and APE high-resolution audio files with their intended playback specification of 96kHz/24Bit. This means, no longer do you have to compromise your listening experience lost in highly-compressed traditional audio formats, in Hi-Res your music now comes alive with stunning clarity and every nuance revealed, just as the artist intended. When playing Hi-Res Audio files the i905-LC70 will display the Hi-Res icon and file bit rate. 
 Even more impressive, equipped with Hi-Res Audio Wireless and LDAC technology, you can connect your smartphone via USB or wirelessly and use Hi-Res Audio streaming services or apps bringing a virtually limitless music library with the purest sound right inside your car. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-in Class-D Amplifier 
 An industry world first, the i905-LC70 is equipped with Class-D amplifier technology producing a massive 50 x 4 Watts of power, delivering the best sound quality and dynamics from high-resolution music. Class-D amplifiers are known to be highly efficient and capable of beautiful high-end sound reproduction with significantly reduced noise and phase shift. What’s more, new ultra-high-spec fans and internal heat sinks direct and dissipate any unwanted heat, ensuring optimum temperature control and audio performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 External Control Knob (RUE-BK01A sold separately) 
 The RUE-BK01A external control knob (sold separately) connects wirelessly to the Li905-LC70 and can be installed on either side of the display for added convenience. Alternatively, you can place the control knob anywhere else within the vehicle and for custom installation professionals the mounting possibilities are virtually endless. Rotation of the knob controls the unit volume output, while a push of the knob will cycle through your vehicles safety cameras on screen. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Advanced Sound Tuning 
 Alpine sound quality performance is of the highest standards and with advanced sound tuning you are empowered with the tools to tune your system to perfection, as well as to the specific environment of your vehicle. 
 Featuring a 56-band Parametric EQ in the advanced mode, a 2-way digital crossover, 6-channel digital time correction, plus several Bass Engine SQ and MediaXpander settings provides sound tuning for simple to comprehensive high-end systems with multiple power amplifiers, speakers and subwoofers. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DAB+ Digital Radio 
 DAB+ provides you with a range of quality digital only stations that you can search by station name and genres. DAB+ offers a variety of stations with music eras and types, as well as talkback stations. DAB+ displays station info and music metadata, offers clearer sound and improved reception, achieving a noise free, crystal clear radio listening experience. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio Streaming Apps 
 With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, YouTube Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 2x USB Connections 
 The 2x rear USB ports allow for even greater flexibility. USB port 1 provides fast charging of your smartphone while using wireless connectivity. USB Port 2 is your entertainment gateway, allowing audio and video playback via connection of a memory stick, portable drive or SSD and if desired wired connectivity to your smartphone for Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-In Bluetooth 
 Built-in Bluetooth enables wireless connection of a mobile phone for the convenience and safety of hands free phone and audio streaming. Plus, you can use voice control through the external microphone included. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HDMI Connectivity 
 HDMI enables connectivity to a number of different devices including smartphone mirroring—making audio and video playback possible in high-definition through the 9” display for virtually limitless entertainment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dual Camera Input 
 The i905-LC70 provides the opportunity to add a reverse and either front or side camera directly to the unit itself. You can toggle between these camera’s directly from the camera screen, allowing a wide view of any potential obstacles around your vehicle.

 Featuring a 56-band Parametric EQ in the advanced mode, a 2-way digital crossover, 6-channel digital time correction, plus several Bass Engine SQ and MediaXpander settings provides sound tuning for simple to comprehensive high-end systems with multiple power amplifiers, speakers and subwoofers. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 2 x USB Connections 
 The two rear USB ports allow for even greater flexibility. USB port 1 provides fast charging of your smartphone while using wireless connectivity, or you can connect your smartphone for wired connection of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Either USB Port 1 or 2 are your entertainment gateway, allowing audio and video playback via connection of a memory stick, portable drive or SSD. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HDMI Connectivity 
 HDMI enables connectivity to a number of different devices including smartphone mirroring—making audio and video playback possible in high-definition through the 9” display for virtually limitless entertainment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hi-Res Audio Certified with USB and Wireless Connectivity 
 Audiophile and music fans can now enjoy a true high-fidelity audio experience with the astonishing detail and musical beauty of Hi-Res Audio. The iLX-507Ai supports up to 192kHz/24Bit FLAC/WAV and APE high-resolution audio files with their intended playback specification of 96kHz/24Bit. This means, no longer do you have to compromise your listening experience lost in highly-compressed traditional audio formats, in Hi-Res your music now comes alive with stunning clarity and every nuance revealed, just as the artist intended. When playing Hi-Res Audio files the iLX-507Ai will display the Hi-Res icon and file bit rate. 
 Even more impressive, equipped with Hi-Res Audio Wireless and LDAC technology, you can connect your smartphone via USB or wirelessly and use Hi-Res Audio streaming services or apps bringing a virtually limitless music library with the purest sound right inside your car. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-In Bluetooth 
 Built-in Bluetooth enables wireless connection of a mobile phone for the convenience and safety of hands free phone and audio streaming. Plus, you can use voice control through the external microphone included. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 CAN-UART Compatibility 
 CAN-UART capability provides connection to a vehicle specific interface for display of climate information, park assist and steering wheel controls. In addition, system information can be sent to vehicle sub-displays retaining critical information about your vehicle. Check with your Alpine Dealer for compatible vehicles and interfaces. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Four Camera Input 
 The iLX-507A provides the opportunity to add a reverse and either front or side camera directly to the unit itself. Those with a need for even more visibility requirements now have the ability to increase to a whopping 4 camera’s through the KCX-C250MC Multi-Camera Selector Interface (sold separately). All connected camera’s can be toggled directly from the camera screen, allowing a commanding view of any potential obstacles around your vehicle.

src:
Alpine’s ethos of excellence continues in the next generation of Halo9. The iLX-F509Ai introduces industry-first innovations, along with a stunningly beautiful WXGA display, Hi-Res Audio specifications and advanced wireless connectivity. 
 Employing an ultra-high-quality WXGA display with 2.7 million pixels and a revolutionary laminated construction, image performance is of the highest standard, reproducing life-like razor sharp images with remarkable contrast and colour vibrancy. High-definition video from USB or HDMI sources has never looked so good. 
 Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, brings your smartphone and a wide-range of apps to the dashboard. Get directions, make calls, send and receive messages and listen to high-resolution streaming music all without a cable in sight. 
 The iLX-F509Ai brings the concert to the cockpit with Hi-Res Audio and LDAC wireless technology, letting you play high-resolution music via USB, or streaming via smartphone music services and apps revealing the original recording the way the artist intended. 
 With the world’s first built-in Class-D amplifier the iLX-F509Ai reinvents head unit power, delivering the richness and acoustic crescendos of virtually any music style and live performances through any loudspeaker. 
 What’s more, with a range of simple sound settings and MediaXpander you can make your cabin space and music experience come alive at touch of the display. 
 Satisfying enthusiasts and pro-users an advanced tuning mode is available with a 56-Band Parametric EQ, digital crossover and time correction enabling unparalleled system tuning, vehicle sound adaptation and personalisation. 
 With unrivalled technology and connectivity, as well as impeccable visual clarity and high-resolution audio, the iLX-F509Ai is a magnificent centrepiece for any dashboard—bringing the emotion of music and pure enjoyment to every drive. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Now Compatible With 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 iDatalink Maestro is the most advanced vehicle integration solution available on the market, seamlessly retaining key safety features such as parking sensors, multi-view and 360 degree cameras, climate controls and vehicle settings all while providing extra features beyond what the OEM system offers, such as real-time performance gauges and configurable steering controls. All accessible from the comfort and convenience of your Alpine head unit. iDatalink Maestro module and accessories sold separately* 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Climate Control 
 Quickly and easily control climate functions such as heated and cooled seating, airflow direction, air temperature, and fan speed. 
 
 
Vehicle Settings 
 Retain an expansive range of safety, comfort and convenience vehicle settings as well as additional Maestro settings within a neatly organised menu. 
 
 
Advanced Camera Integration 
 Visual safety aids such as 360 degree and multi-view cameras as well as dynamic guide lines and park distance control can be retained and work seamlessly to ensure a safer and more enjoyable journey. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Performance Gauges 
 Access a variety of vehicle performance gauges including speed, boost, engine temp and transmission temp in real-time on a modern race-inspired digital cluster. 
 
 
Vehicle Info 
 Monitor vehicle health and stay notified of potential warnings such as irregular battery voltage, un-latched seatbelts, low tyre pressure, open doors and more. 
 
 Programmable Steering Controls 
 In addition to performing the OEM steering control functions, iDatalink provides even greater utility, allowing you to assign two functions per button to quickly view cameras or display a screen of your choice. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Features and specifications of iDatalink Maestro will vary by vehicle, for more info on vehicle compatibility and features please refer to the iDatalink website: 
 https://australia.idatalinkmaestro.com/en 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 High-Definition Laminated Display 
 Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 
 No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wirelessly connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Android Auto Wireless or USB 
 The convenience of Android Auto allows a wide-array of applications into the dash of your car. Interact via touch or voice command you can make calls and messages, play music apps and much more. All this, now with wireless connectivity or if you need to charge-up on the go simply connect via the USB port. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Smartphone Navigation 
 Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience. 
 With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control. 
 Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Spotify 
 Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio Streaming Apps 
 With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, YouTube Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tidal Built-In 
 With TIDAL built-in, stream all your favourite artists wirelessly in incredible master-quality definition. Providing you exclusive access to high-profile music and original content – experience a more intimate connection with music creators through intuitive playlist curation and ability to save your favourite albums, tracks or playlists to the preset menu for quick access. Furthermore, MQA Studio playback ensures absolute audio authenticity, exactly to the artists original recording. Never before seen in car audio, TIDAL’s wireless Hi-Res audio streaming is a must for the modern audiophile. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DAB+ Digital Radio 
 DAB+ provides you with a range of quality digital only stations that you can search by station name and genres. DAB+ offers a variety of stations with music eras and types, as well as talkback stations. DAB+ displays station info and music metadata, offers clearer sound and improved reception, achieving a noise free, crystal clear radio listening experience. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-in Class-D Amplifier 
 An industry world first, the iLX-F509Ai is equipped with Class-D amplifier technology producing a massive 50 x 4 Watts of power, delivering the best sound quality and dynamics from high-resolution music. Class-D amplifiers are known to be highly efficient and capable of beautiful high-end sound reproduction with significantly reduced noise and phase shift. What’s more, new ultra-high-spec fans and internal heat sinks direct and dissipate any unwanted heat, ensuring optimum temperature control and audio performance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 External Control Knob (RUE-BK01A sold separately) 
 The RUE-BK01A external control knob (sold separately) connects wirelessly to the iLX-F509Ai and can be installed on either side of the display for added convenience. Alternatively, you can place the control knob anywhere else within the vehicle and for custom installation professionals the mounting possibilities are virtually endless. Rotation of the knob controls the unit volume output, while a push of the knob will cycle through your vehicles safety cameras on screen.

USB port 1 provides fast charging of your smartphone while using wireless connectivity, or you can connect your smartphone for wired connection of Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Either USB Port 1 or 2 are your entertainment gateway, allowing audio and video playback via connection of a memory stick, portable drive or SSD. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HDMI Connectivity 
 HDMI enables connectivity to a number of different devices including smartphone mirroring—making audio and video playback possible in high-definition through the 9” display for virtually limitless entertainment. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Hi-Res Audio Certified with USB and Wireless Connectivity 
 The iLX-F509Ai offers audiophiles and music enthusiasts an immersive high-fidelity audio experience with support for up to 192kHz/24Bit FLAC/WAV and APE files. It ensures that your music is played at its intended 96kHz/24Bit specification, avoiding the compromise of highly-compressed formats. Hi-Res Audio brings out stunning clarity and nuances, displaying the Hi-Res icon and file bit rate during playback. With Hi-Res Audio Wireless and LDAC technology, connect your smartphone via USB or wirelessly for a limitless, pure sound music library in your car. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Four Camera Input 
 The iLX-F509Ai provides the opportunity to add a reverse and either front or side camera directly to the unit itself. Those with a need for even more visibility requirements now have the ability to increase to a whopping 4 camera’s through the KCX-C250MC Multi-Camera Selector Interface (sold separately). All connected camera’s can be toggled directly from the camera screen, allowing a commanding view of any potential obstacles around your vehicle. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Precisely Adjustable Display Angle 
 The iLX-F509Ai provides even greater installation flexibility. At anytime you can set the display angle in between +45 degrees to -20 degrees to specifically suit the dashboard and your desired viewing position. Also, if need be you can set your desired angle on the fly to mitigate glare in certain conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Adjustable Display Height 
 Positioning of the display in the dashboard is crucial for aesthetics and function. The display height can be adjusted +/- 3cm above or below from the centre position, allowing installation into virtually any dashboard with a 1 or 2 DIN slot. You can also adjust the distance of the display to your dash with a 20mm range. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 1-DIN Blanking Plates for 2-DIN Installation (Optional) 
 The KAE-1DT and KAE-1DB (optional) blanking plates makes any 2-DIN installation a breeze with a professional finish. These plates fill the void of the 1-DIN space either at the top or underneath when using a conventional 2-DIN dash fascia installation kit. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 1-DIN Blanking Plate Fitment (Optional) 
 The KAE-1DT and KAE-1DB are securely fitted to either the top or bottom of the iLX-F509Ai chassis, allowing the space to be filled regardless of if the unit is installed higher or lower in the dash. Secured by machine thread screws makes installation of the blanking plate simple and robust.

Equipped with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, an endless array of smartphone features and entertainment is available on the dashboard. Get directions, make calls, send and receive messages and listen to high-resolution streaming music — commanding it all via the display or voice control.

Enjoy superb audio fidelity with Hi-Res Audio and LDAC wireless technology — play high-resolution audio tracks via USB, or music streaming services via smartphone, ensuring the music is reproduced with clarity and authenticity as the artist intended.

With the world’s first built-in Class-D amplifier the iLX-F509A reinvents head unit power, delivering the richness and acoustic crescendos of virtually any music style and live performances through any loudspeaker.

Alpine’s iLX-F509A is the pinnacle of audio performance, design and technology. Delivering a magnificent centrepiece for the dashboard and incredible entertainment experience – this is a must have for all audiophiles.

 *Not compatible with factory AC/AA models 

 
 
 
 
 
 

 High-Definition Laminated Display 

Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 

No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wirelessly connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Android Auto Wireless or USB 
 The convenience of Android Auto allows a wide-array of applications into the dash of your car. Interact via touch or voice command you can make calls and messages, play music apps and much more. All this, now with wireless connectivity or if you need to charge-up on the go simply connect via the USB port. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Smartphone Navigation 

Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience.

With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control.

Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains.
 
 
 
 

 

 Spotify 

Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Audio Streaming Apps 

With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. src:
Alpine ilx-F511A 11" Touch Screen 
The iLX-F511A is an innovation masterpiece created for the digital era, culminating cutting-edge design and technology with an absolutely stunning ultra-high-quality WXGA display, Hi-Res Audio specifications and advanced wireless connectivity. 
 
Audiophiles and music fanatics can rejoice, the iLX-F511A brings a high-fidelity sound experience to the cockpit. With Hi-Res Audio and LDAC wireless technology, you can play high-resolution music from USB, or streaming via a smartphone at Hi-Res Audio specification. Hi-Res Audio reveals everything you need to hear in the music you love in the best quality possible. 
 
The cinematic 11” WXGA display with 2.7 million pixels and innovative lamination composition elevates picture quality to next the level. At any angle images are razor sharp, vibrantly colourful, bringing full-life to HDMI sources and USB video played in high-definition. 
 
Equipped with wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, a wide-array of smartphone apps are available to use in your dashboard. Get directions with maps and navigation apps, send and receive messages, make calls and listen to music all without a cable in sight. 
 
Expertly engineered for superior sound performance, the iLX-F511A is equipped with the world’s first Class-D built-in head unit power amplifier, delivering the full dynamics of your music. 
 
Moreover, with Alpine’s extensive sound tuning built-in you can apply simple one touch audio adjustments to make your cabin space sound brilliant, or for pro-level users and enthusiasts a host of advanced tuning functions are available. 
 
Class-leading in every way, the top-of-line iLX-F511A is the new benchmark, delivering an incredible connectivity and multimedia experience with staggering audio performance. 
 
 
 
 High-Definition Laminated Display 
 
Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard. 
 
 
 
 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 
 
No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wireless connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Android Auto Wireless or USB 
 The convenience of Android Auto allows a wide-array of applications into the dash of your car. Interact via touch or voice command you can make calls and messages, play music apps and much more. All this, now with wireless connectivity or if you need to charge-up on the go simply connect via the USB port. 
 
 
 Smartphone Navigation 
 
Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience. 
 
With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control. 
 
Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains. 
 
 
 
 Spotify 
 
Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 Audio Streaming Apps 
 
With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, YouTube Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions. 
 
 
 
 Hi-Res Audio Certified with USB and Wireless Connectivity 
 
Audiophile and music fans can now enjoy a true high-fidelity audio experience with the astonishing detail and musical beauty of Hi-Res Audio. The iLX-F511A supports up to 192kHz/24Bit FLAC/WAV and APE high-resolution audio files with their intended playback specification of 96kHz/24Bit. This means, no longer do you have to compromise your listening experience lost in highly-compressed traditional audio formats, in Hi-Res your music now comes alive with stunning clarity and every nuance revealed, just as the artist intended. When playing Hi-Res Audio files the iLX-F511A will display the Hi-Res icon and file bit rate. 
 
Even more impressive, equipped with Hi-Res Audio Wireless and LDAC technology, you can connect your smartphone via USB or wirelessly and use Hi-Res Audio streaming services or apps bringing a virtually limitless music library with the purest sound right inside your car. 
 
 
 
 Built-in Class-D Amplifier 
 
An industry world first, the iLX-F511A is equipped with Class-D amplifier technology producing a massive 50 x 4 Watts of power, delivering the best sound quality and dynamics from high-resolution music. Class-D amplifiers are known to be highly efficient and capable of beautiful high-end sound reproduction with significantly reduced noise and phase shift. What’s more, new ultra-high-spec fans and internal heat sinks direct and dissipate any unwanted heat, ensuring optimum temperature control and audio performance. 
 
 
 
 External Control Knob (RUE-BK01A sold separately) 
 
The RUE-BK01A external control knob (sold separately) connects wirelessly to the iLX-F511A and can be installed on either side of the display for added convenience. Alternatively, you can place the control knob anywhere else within the vehicle and for custom installation professionals the mounting possibilities are virtually endless. Rotation of the knob controls the unit volume output, while a push of the knob will cycle through your vehicles safety cameras on screen. 
 
 
 
 HDMI Connectivity 
 HDMI enables connectivity to a number of different devices including smartphone mirroring—making audio and video playback possible in high-definition through the 9” display for virtually limitless entertainment. 
 
 
 Built-In Bluetooth 
 Built-in Bluetooth enables wireless connection of a mobile phone for the convenience and safety of hands free phone and audio streaming. Plus, you can use voice control through the external microphone included. 
 
 
 2x USB Connections 
 
 The 2x rear USB ports allow for even greater flexibility. USB port 1 provides fast charging of your smartphone while using wireless connectivity. USB Port 2 is your entertainment gateway, allowing audio and video playback via connection of a memory stick, portable drive or SSD and if desired wired connectivity to your smartphone for Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. 
 
 
 
 DAB+ Digital Radio 
 DAB+ provides you with a range of quality digital only stations that you can search by station name and genres. DAB+ offers a variety of stations with music eras and types, as well as talkback stations. DAB+ displays station info and music metadata, offers clearer sound and improved reception, achieving a noise free, crystal clear radio listening experience. 
 
 
 Precisely Adjustable Display Angle 
 The iLX-F511A provides even greater installation flexibility. At anytime you can set the display angle in between +45 degrees to -20 degrees to specifically suit the dashboard and your desired viewing position. Also, if need be you can set your desired angle on the fly to mitigate glare in certain conditions. 
 
 
 Adjustable Display Height 
 Positioning of the display in the dashboard is crucial for aesthetics and function. The display height can be adjusted +/- 3cm above or below from the centre position, allowing installation into virtually any dashboard with a 1 or 2 DIN slot. You can also adjust the distance of the display to your dash with a 20mm range.

src:
Alpine iLX-F511A 11″ Touch Screen Complete Kit suitable for Nissan Navara ST-X (2015-2019) 
 ALPINE Complete Kit solution suitable for Nissan Navara NP300 ST-X (2015-2019) 

 Not compatible with factory AC/AA Models 

Discover an industry-leading innovation masterpiece with Alpine’s top-of-line 11’’ multimedia infotainment system, seamlessly integrating into your Navara dashboard with a bold, premium and professional finish. The iLX-F511A combines both functionality and interior aesthetic, housing an absolutely stunning ultra-high-quality WXGA centrepiece display with Hi-Res Audio specifications and advanced wireless connectivity.

 

The iLX-F511A provides the ultimate visual entertainment through the WXGA 11’’ high-resolution display thanks to the 2.7 million pixel elements. Enjoy the deepest blacks, richest colours and realistic picture quality at any angle from a USB or HDMI source — the most important aspect of your viewing experience.

Equipped with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, a wide range of smartphone features and entertainment is available on the dashboard. Get directions, make calls, send and receive messages and listen to high-resolution streaming music, commanding it all via the display or voice control.

Enjoy superb audio fidelity with Hi-Res Audio and LDAC wireless technology. Play high-resolution audio tracks via USB, or music streaming services via smartphone, ensuring the music is reproduced with clarity and authenticity as the artist intended.

With the world’s first built-in Class-D amplifier the iLX-F511A reinvents head unit power, delivering the richness and acoustic crescendos of virtually any music style and live performances through any loudspeaker.

Alpine’s iLX-F511A is the new benchmark for the complete audiophile — delivering incredible audio performance, magnificent centrepiece design and high-end technology.
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 High-Definition Laminated Display 

Alpine’s incredible WXGA display has to be seen to be believed, colours are intensely vibrant and realistic, video motion is ultra-smooth and the image detail is razor sharp. Moreover, with its laminated display technology brightness and contrast is truly next level, so no matter the lighting conditions or viewing angle the display reveals incredible clarity and true-to-life colour. Alpine’s new WXGA high definition display is simply stunningly beautiful—bringing a cinematic experience right into your dashboard.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Apple CarPlay Wireless or USB 

No wires, no fuss, just get in and drive with your iPhone wirelessly connected to use Apple CarPlay. Listen to your favourite music apps, make and receive calls or messages, use maps or navigation apps, all at your command via the display or voice control. If you need to charge-up then plug-in your iPhone via USB.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Android Auto Wireless or USB 
 The convenience of Android Auto allows a wide-array of applications into the dash of your car. Interact via touch or voice command you can make calls and messages, play music apps and much more. All this, now with wireless connectivity or if you need to charge-up on the go simply connect via the USB port. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 Smartphone Navigation 

Through the incredible Alpine WXGA high-definition display you have the access and convenience of highly accurate navigation, further enhancing the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto and experience.

With an array of navigation platforms and apps available, for example Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze and Sygic you can search and get to your destination with ease. You’ll have voice and visual prompts of turn-by-turn navigation and finding locations is a breeze via the display or using voice control.

Furthermore, with the built-in GPS/GLONASS circuit and antenna, as well as vehicle speed pulse sense connectivity ensures your actual vehicle position has pin-point accuracy on the road. This keeps you on route when driving through complex and dense city road systems, tunnels, bridges and elevated mountain highways and terrains.
 
 
 
 

 

 Spotify 

Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. All this, without a single physical connection thanks to the added convenience of Wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto.

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 Audio Streaming Apps 

With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and YouTube Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, YouTube Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions.

 Whether you’re a car audio enthusiast looking for enhanced sound control or someone who craves seamless connectivity, the Alpine iLX-W670A is designed with you in mind. 
 Alpine introduces the iLX-W670A 7” touchscreen display multimedia receiver the successor to the legendary iLX-W650E radio with sonic enhancements. Including wired Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Crafted with a cutting-edge design and an ultra-shallow chassis allowing for easier installation and fitment into a wider range of vehicles.

Prismalink allows more lighting flexibility than ever before with full customisation of Prismalink compatible devices. (sold separately) 
 The innovative dual swipe user interface puts you in control of your music and keeps your eyes on the road. Using two fingers, simply swipe up or down to adjust the volume and swipe left or right to skip between tracks. Built-in connectivity gives you Apple CarPlay or Android Auto to use apps such as Waze Navigation, Google Maps and Spotify music via the convenience of voice command or touch. Plus, the dual camera input allows connection of a rear camera and a side or front camera making parking easier than ever before. 
 Whats more, the ultra-shallow chassis design makes way to add-on the compact KTA-450 Power Pack amplifier (sold separately) which mounts directly onto the back of the chassis. This revolutionary space saving design, delivers incredible power output and dynamic sound—making the PowerStack duo an industry first and honoured with the prestigious 2019 CES Innovation award. 
For any product updates, please refer to the Alpine Australia website only. Visit https://www.alpine.com.au/support/product-updates/ for available updates.

src:
Alpine ilx-W770A Wireless 7" Screen 
 
 
 7” Display / Lighting Link / Wireless Apple CarPlay / Wireless Android Auto / FLAC / MP3 / WMA / AAC / Bluetooth 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Personalise your in-car life with Alpine’s stunning new iLX-W770A Display Audio Receiver featuring PrismaLink™. 
 Alpine introduces the iLX-W770A 7” touchscreen display multimedia receiver the successor to the legendary iLX-W650E radio with sonic enhancements. Including wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Crafted with a cutting-edge design and an ultra-shallow chassis allowing for easier installation and fitment into a wider range of vehicles. 
Prismalink allows more lighting flexibility than ever before with full customisation of Prismalink compatible devices. (sold separately) 
 Whats more, the ultra-shallow chassis design makes way to add-on the compact KTA-450 or KTA-200M Power Pack amplifier (sold separately) which mounts directly onto the back of the chassis. This revolutionary space saving design, delivers incredible power output and dynamic sound—making the PowerStack duo an industry first and honoured with the prestigious 2019 CES Innovation award. 
For any product updates, please refer to the Alpine Australia website only. Visit https://www.alpine.com.au/support/product-updates/ for available updates. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Wireless Apple CarPlay 
 Apple CarPlay brings your apps to life all through the display. Listen to your favourite music apps such as Spotify or Tidal, plus make calls, get directions with maps, receive messages and see your calendar all while using the display or voice control. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Wireless Android Auto 
 The convenience of Android Auto lets you bring the ever-expanding apps into the dash of your car. From either the display or voice command you can make calls, send and receive messages, play music apps or set a destination via Google Maps or Waze. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Steering Wheel Control Ready 
 Retain the full functionality of your steering wheel controls for effortless control of the iLX-W770A. A third party steering wheel control adapter with a 3.5mm output lead is required. Compatible with most vehicles. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 13 Band Graphic Equaliser 
 
Unleash the full potential of your music with the 13-band graphic EQ, 6-channel time correction, and versatile crossovers for the front speakers, rear speakers, and subwoofer. The iLX-W770A gives you the tools to fine-tune your sound to perfection. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Waze 
 
Available when using Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, the Waze app provides a unique navigation experience offering alternative routes to save you time. Waze also provides real time feeds reported by fellow Waze users to inform of upcoming traffic, road hazards, camera alerts and police stops. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio Streaming Apps 
 
With Apple Music onboard for Apple CarPlay you have access to 60+ million ad-free songs at your fingertips which you can search genres, artists, podcasts and expertly crafted playlists. With the use of Apple CarPlay or Android Auto, Amazon Music and Google Play Music provides limitless entertainment to stream or download songs from a list of over 40 million ad-free tracks. Amazon Music, Google Play Music and Apple Music are paid subscriptions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Spotify 
 
Access the worlds music library with millions of tracks and episodes available on Spotify. When using Apple CarPlay or Android Auto with the Spotify app, you can play the latest songs from your favourite artists, charts and playlists. Plus, browse through the collections of friends, artists, celebrities and radio stations all from the comfort of the driver’s seat. Furthermore, get unlimited skips, no ad interruptions and much more with the Spotify Premium paid subscription. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Customisable Keys 
 
Are you wanting your headunit keys to match existing buttons in your interior or perhaps set them as your favourite colour? – well, now you can! With 5 options available to choose from (blue, red, amber, green & white) you’ll be be set to customise & make it truly yours right away. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Tidal 
 
While using Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, the Tidal app lets you stream your favourite songs in high quality audio. With over 60 million songs available to stream or download you have endless music options, plus you can stream guest playlists curated by the artists you love and listen to original playlists hand-picked by the Tidal experts. Tidal is a paid subscription. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Calendar 
 
Apple CarPlay brings your iPhone’s Calendar schedule to your dashboard so you can stay up-to-date with future events and important dates whilst on the road. What’s more, if you have a particular event with a location in your calendar, you can simply select the event from the display and Apple CarPlay will launch Maps and provide directions to the location with voice guidance. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Notifications 
 
Android Auto provides you with a simple yet convenient tab to display incoming notifications such as text messages and phone calls. Incoming text messages automatically notify you via the display or you can browse through recent messages. From the display you have the option to either preview the message text or play the message via text-to-speech. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Lighting Link Control 
 With a simple touch, users can easily change the ambiance, adjust colors, and change modes on the PrismaLink™ enclosures via the iLX-W770A. Whether it’s setting the perfect vibe for a late-night drive or enhancing the atmosphere of a weekend getaway, the intuitive interface empowers users to tailor their lighting experience with precision and ease. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 PowerStack Ready 
 The innovative ultra-shallow chassis design spanning a short depth of 68mm creates a practical solution for vehicles with restricted areas behind its dashboard. In addition, this design also stacks perfectly with the KTA-450 Power Pack 
 Amplifier (sold separately). Create the ultimate PowerStack where the KTA-450 is situated directly behind the iLX-W770A. The combined length of the PowerStack duo is less than the depth of a standard 2-DIN chassis ideal for vehicles with tight spaces behind the dash. The KTA-450 features Alpine’s exclusive technology, Dynamic Peak Power (DPP), which produces 400 watts without the bulk and hassle of a traditional amplifier. This innovative and breakthrough combo offers an affordable power upgrade and a convenient installation. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 USB Audio & Video 
Includes a 3-AMP USB port for super-fast charging and provides a multitude of source options, such as iPod and iPhone or memory sticks and other devices to playback specific file types such as FLAC, MP3, MP4, AAC, AVI, WMA, WMV and MOV. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Customisable UI & Theme 
 Personalise your drive with customisable backgrounds. It’s never been easier to truly make it your own! Add your favourite photo for that personal touch. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Built-In Bluetooth 
 Built-in Bluetooth enables seamless wireless connection of your mobile phone for the convenience and safety of hands free phone and audio streaming. Plus, you can use voice control through the included external microphone. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Dual RCA Camera Input 
 The iLX-W770A has the option to add-in a front & rear camera system (sold separately) for easier parking and safety. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 AM/FM Radio 
 The iLX-W770A lets you navigate seamlessly between AM/FM channels with the convenience of selecting from 6 AM stations and up 18 FM stations you have preset to the main radio screen as your favourites. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Technical Specifications 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Features 
 
 
 
 
 
 6.75″ (171.45mm) Touchscreen Display 
 Standard Double-Din Fitment 
 5-Colour Key Illumination (Red, Green, Blue, Amber, White) 
 Customisable Home Screen (Add your own background image) 
 3.5mm SWC Adapter Ready (Compatible with most vehicles) 
 Wireless Apple CarPlay® 
 Wireless Android Auto™ 
 Bluetooth® Hands-Free 
 PowerStack™ Capable (Mount the Alpine KTA-200M or KTA-450 amplifiers directly to the back) 
 Lighting Link Control (Compatible with Alpine PrismaLink™ Subwoofers; S2-SB8, S2-SB10, & S2-SB12) 
 Sound Boost Menu (Bass Boost, Mid-Bass Boost, and Subwoofer Controls) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Specifications

 Audio Visual Security can supply and install your product. 
 
 We also offer products that will complete your installation, including steering wheel control adaptors, wiring harnesses, fascia panels, can bus integration, antenna adaptors and integrated reverse camera. 
 
 These products are vehicle specific, and we recommend to be contacted with the vehicle details, so we can ensure the right products are ordered for your car.

name: Autowatch 695RLC Canbus Upgrade Alarm
short: Arming / Disarming of the alarm system using the vehicles original remote controls. | Indicator / side light output | Volumetric sensors with exclusion facility | Intelligent Battery Back-up siren. | PIN code override | Pager / tracking input | Pager / tracking output | Optional wireless PIR and door sensors | Less than 20mA current draw in armed state
src:
Autowatch 695RLC CAN BUS Universal Alarm System 
 
 
 The Autowatch 695CAN alarm is a Thatcham approved CAT 2-1 upgrade alarm system, designed to be used on full CAN Bus, semi CAN Bus or conventional wiring systems. The 695CAN alarm can be fitted to any compatible new vehicle that requires an alarm. 
 This system is designed to be easily operated from the vehicles original remote controls without the use of an additional remote control. However, if your vehicle has only one remote control supplied as standard, adding an additional Autowatch remote control will prove more cost effective than buying an original remote control. 
 
 What is CAN BUS? 
 CAN Bus is a data communications protocol where data is used to control and monitor the functionality of control systems on modern vehicles. CAN which stands for "Controller Area Network" is now being used by many vehicle manufacturers to increase reliability, reduce costs of components, reduce power consumption, reduce weight therefore offering better fuel consumption and for improved vehicle diagnostics. 
 
 Why Install a CAN BUS Alarm? 
 With vehicles becoming more difficult for thieves to steal, they are now breaking in, to steal accessories such as navigation systems, mobile phones and car-kits, radar detectors, stereos and any other items that they may find valuable. Most people assume that because they can lock their car with a remote, they automatically have an alarm system. This is not the case. From 1997, an EU law was passed to make the fitting of an immobiliser, mandatory. However this was not applicable to alarm systems. More than 75% of vehicles sold, do not come with an alarm as standard. So, the onus of securing the vehicle is your responsibility. The Autowatch 695 CAN alarm system is insurance approved. Most insurance companies now require a Thatcham approved alarm and may offer you a discount for having an approved system fitted.

src:
Authorised Ghost II Immobiliser Dealer – Ultimate Anti-Theft Car Security 
 The Ghost II Immobiliser is the world’s first aftermarket CANbus vehicle immobiliser , providing unmatched protection against key theft, hacking, and cloning. Unlike traditional systems, this stealth anti-theft solution requires no key fobs, LEDs, or PIN pads — making it completely invisible to thieves and undetectable by diagnostics tools . 
 Even if someone steals your keys, they won’t be able to drive away. The Ghost II system requires a unique sequence of button presses (between 4 and 26) using your car’s existing controls — like the steering wheel, door panel, or dash buttons — to disarm the immobiliser and start the vehicle . 
 
 
 
 
 🚘 Key Features: 
 
 
 CANbus ECU Immobilisation – Communicates directly with your vehicle's ECU to block engine start until the PIN is entered. 
 
 
 Undetectable and Invisible – No visible components or RF signals. Cannot be found or bypassed using standard theft methods. 
 
 
 No Key Fobs or Remotes – Use your vehicle’s own buttons to enter a custom PIN sequence. 
 
 
 Unique & Changeable PIN Code – Create your own secure access code (up to 26 presses) for unbeatable car security. 
 
 
 Diagnostic-Proof Protection – Cannot be hacked or disabled through vehicle diagnostics tools. 
 
 
 Service/Valet Mode – Temporarily disable the system without compromising security when your car is being serviced. 
 
 
 Emergency Backup Code – Built-in failsafe if your PIN is forgotten. 
 
 
 Optional Commercial Fob Setup – Available for fleet and commercial vehicles if preferred. 
 
 
 
 
 
 🔐 Why Choose Ghost II? 
 Whether you’re protecting a luxury vehicle, performance car, or commercial fleet, the Ghost II is the ultimate line of defence against modern theft techniques like relay attacks and key cloning. The system gives you peace of mind without the inconvenience of carrying extra devices — and it's completely undetectable to thieves. 
 
 
 
 
 ✅ Professional Installation 
 As an Authorised Ghost Immobiliser Dealer , we offer expert installation services ensuring your Ghost II is installed correctly and securely. Compatible with most CANbus-equipped vehicles. 
 
 
 
 
 🛡️ Stop Car Theft Before It Starts 
 Secure your vehicle with Ghost II Immobiliser and stop thieves in their tracks — even if they have your keys.

Blaupunkt Breman SQR 46 DAB Retro Car Radio 
A Legend returns! The newly launched cult car radio “Bremen SQR 46” with many new features! 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Back to the Future! 
 The newly launched cult car radio “Bremen SQR 46 DAB” with many new features! 
 
Over the years, some models have become true cult objects. This also applies to the legendary Blaupunkt “Bremen SQR 46” from 1986. We are now presenting the reinterpretation of the popular 1-DIN car radio and combining the USPs of the 80s model with new technologies and functions. The result is the Blaupunkt “Bremen SQR 46 DAB”. 
 
Its operating concept, the simple design and the crystal-clear reception made a significant contribution to the popularity of the original Bremen car radio. 
 
For the new edition, we took over the styling of the original model, but at the same time gave the radio modern Variocolor lighting for the buttons and the display. Thanks to the Blaupunkt Codem FM RDS tuner and DAB+ digital tuner, first-class reception remains a strength of the new Youngtimer car radio. 
 
The numerous serial interfaces are new, including two USB ports, an auxiliary connection and an SDHC slot – audio streaming via Bluetooth is also not a dream of the future for the returning legend. This radio is also “Made for iPhone/iPod” and guarantees a corresponding compatibility. 
 
All settings are saved permanently even if the battery is disconnected. A DAB+ windshield antenna is also included – so the entertainer has arrived in the present. 
 
The new “ Bremen SQR 46 DAB ” has a short installation depth – ideal for youngtimers with shortened installation shafts. But not only the car radio itself takes the user on a journey through time, the packaging of the device was also elaborately designed and modeled on the original.

Driving or auxiliary lights are essential to a vehicle's lighting system. While headlights provide basic illumination for nighttime driving, driving lights offer additional visibility and can help prevent accidents in various conditions.

One of the key benefits of driving lights is their ability to increase visibility in low light or inclement weather. Fog, rain, and snow can all reduce visibility on the road, making it difficult to see hazards or other vehicles. Driving lights can help cut through the glare and improve visibility, allowing drivers to see farther down the road and react more quickly to potential dangers.

Driving lights can also be helpful for off-road driving or in rural areas with limited street lighting. In these situations, driving lights can help illuminate the path ahead and make navigating rough terrain or narrow roads easier. By choosing high-quality driving lights and using them responsibly, drivers can help ensure the safety of themselves and others on the road.
