short: Bushranger® Night Hawk VLI Series Single Row LED Light Bars have been developed from the ground up by our team of engineers to offer a compact and low-profile design which takes performance, looks and usability to a whole new level.
src:
Bushranger NightHawk VLI Series Single Row LED Light Bars have been developed from the ground up by our team of engineers to offer a compact and low-profile design which takes performance, looks and usability to a whole new level. Featuring a brightness control function which allows complete control of the light intensity in adverse conditions, where too much light can be detrimental to clear vision. 
 
 The 5.5” light is a great accessory light mounted to the side or rear of the vehicle for camping, working or reversing usage. Supplied with a protective diffused beam cover plus a protective flood beam cover. If you require a spot beam remove the cover entirely. A very versatile light is allowing for quick and easy customisation of the beam pattern to suit any requirement. 
 We are backed by a 5-year warranty and our 40+ year history of supplying quality engineered 4×4 products to the Australian market. 
 
 
 
 
 DURABLE EXTERIOR UV stable polyester powder coat, polycarbonate lens and covers ensure long term durability to handle even the toughest Australian conditions. 
 BUILT TOUGH Extruded, 6061 aircraft grade aluminium housing and cast alloy mounting feet offers long term strength and durability. 
 HIGH OUTPUT OSRAM LED’S genuine, high output OSRAM LED’s for unmatched performance. 
 MODERN ELECTRONICS DESIGN Built in Transistor switching simplifies wiring installation by removing the need for traditional 12V relays. PWM dimming capability for brightness control at the turn of a dial. (Wiring system sold separately) 
 ACTIVE TEMPERATURE CONTROL SYSTEM Intelligent onboard monitoring of the LED temperatures, combined with the superior cooling design, allows for maximum output in all conditions. 
 VERSATILE INSTALLATION Lightweight and a low-profile design with highly adjustable sliding mounting feet allow for diverse fitment. 
 CHANGEABLE BEAM PATTERN Full set of clip on/clip off spot beam and flood beam protective covers allows complete customisation of the beam pattern. Note: NHT055VLI comes with flood and diffused cover, remove covers for a spot beam. 
 ACCESSORIES AVAILABLE Protective covers: spot, flood, diffused, black, blue, clear and orange and clamp brackets (pair). (sold separately) 
 
 
 
 
 
 SPECIFICATION 
 
 Size: 5.5″ 
 Power: 13W 
 Current Draw: @ 14.4v 0.9A 
 Voltage Range: 10-30VDC

 Power Plug: Deutsch DT 
 Weight: 0.50kg 
 Overall Length: (L) 141mm

 Mounting Feet: 1

 Max Distance @ 1lux (Flood): 126m 
 Max Primary Beam Width @ 1 lux (Flood): 39m

short: Audio Visual Security are specialists in complete fleet vehicle installations, we work with all car dealerships to have you vehicles ready and equipped at time of pick up. We can customise to suit all your needs for any industry and meet all job site requirements (OHS).
src:
Bushranger Safety Flag Kit – High-Visibility Emergency Flag for Off-Road & Fleet Vehicles 
 The Bushranger Safety Flag Kit is a must-have visibility aid for vehicles operating in remote, off-road, and mining environments. Designed to promote safety and awareness , this kit is purpose-built for outback Australia , including areas like the Flinders Ranges and Simpson Desert , where safety flag use is mandatory under regional regulations. 
 With a fluorescent orange flag measuring 30 x 29cm and featuring reflective cross tape , this high-visibility marker ensures that your vehicle is seen from a distance in low-light, dusty, or rugged conditions. The flag can be mounted at multiple heights up to 3 metres , making it versatile for a wide range of vehicles including 4WDs, mining vehicles, and commercial fleet trucks . 


 

 ✅ Key Features: 
 
 
 30 x 29cm fluorescent orange flag with reflective cross tape 
 
 
 Solid 3-piece fibreglass pole for strength and durability 
 
 
 Stainless steel threaded joints and chrome-plated mounting hardware 
 
 
 Heavy-duty quick connectors for fast install and removal 
 
 
 Mountable up to 3m high – ideal for high-visibility applications 
 
 
 Compact storage bag included for convenience 
 
 
 Complies with South Australian safety flag requirements 
 
 
 Engineered for Australian outback conditions 
 
 

 

 Ideal For: 
 
 
 Vehicles travelling in remote or off-road locations 
 
 
 Mining, exploration, and energy sector vehicles 
 
 
 4WDs operating in the Flinders Ranges and Simpson Desert 
 
 
 Construction, utility, and government fleet vehicles 
 
 
 Companies needing to comply with OHS site safety standards 
 
 

 

 Built Tough for Harsh Conditions 
 Every component of the Bushranger Safety Flag Kit is engineered for durability , from the fibreglass pole to the chrome mounting hardware . Quick connectors make setup and removal easy, while the included bag keeps everything tidy and protected when not in use. 


 

 ️ Fleet-Ready Supply & Installation 
 Audio Visual Security specialises in fleet vehicle installations across Melbourne. Whether you're kitting out vehicles for remote travel, government contracts, or mining operations, we can supply, install, and customise safety gear to meet your industry standards and OHS requirements . 
 We work closely with car dealerships and fleet managers , ensuring your vehicles are ready, compliant, and delivered on time with all safety accessories pre-installed.

name: Bushranger Snatch Recovery Kit - Heavy Duty
key_features: Reinforced Protection | Added protective eyelets to ensure maximum strength when used with shackles and hooks. | Strap Usage Recording Tags | Located with the compliance tags, the usage tags allow you to record and track the number of times the strap is used to help identify fatigue and age of the strap. | Wrap-it Strap | Easy storage wrap it strap, stitched to the snatch strap, so it is ready to roll up and use any time. | Compliance | Designed and tested to comply with the latest Australian Consumer Goods [Motor Vehicle Recovery Strap] Safety Standard 2017. | Quality | Manufactured from high-quality nylon material & reinforced stitching.
short: The Bushranger® Snatch Kit is a 4×4 essential for any driver. The Bushranger kit is compact bag with a 9m x 11,000kg snatch strap, 2 x 4.75t bow shackles and a pair of gloves. Take advantage of the extra pockets to store your other recovery gear.
src:
The Bushranger Snatch Recovery Kitis a 4×4 essential for any driver. The Bushranger kit is compact bag with a 9m x 11,000kg snatch strap, 2 x 4.75t bow shackles and a pair of gloves. Take advantage of the extra pockets to store your other recovery gear. 
 
 
 Description 
 Snatch Strap 
 Bushranger Snatch Recovery Kit Straps are engineered and manufactured to the highest quality standards. All Bushranger straps are Australian tested both in a NATA accredited lab and 4WD field test conditions. Snatch straps are purpose-designed to stretch under intense loads from a moving recovery vehicle. Kinetic energy combined with the elastic properties of the recovery strap work together to pull a disabled vehicle and assist in recovery. 
 
 
 Reinforced Protection | Added protective eyelets to ensure maximum strength when used with shackles and hooks. 
 Strap Usage Recording Tags | Located with the compliance tags, the usage tags allow you to record and track the number of times the strap is used to help identify fatigue and age of the strap. 
 Wrap-it Strap | Easy storage wrap it strap, stitched to the snatch strap, so it is ready to roll up and use any time. 
 Compliance | Designed and tested to comply with the latest Australian Consumer Goods [Motor Vehicle Recovery Strap] Safety Standard 2017. 
 Quality | Manufactured from high-quality nylon material & reinforced stitching. 
 
 Bow Shackles 
 
 
 Capacity 4.75 tonne 
 Tested in accordance to AS2741-2002 SHACKLES; clause 9.2, Appendix D & appendix F 
 
 Gloves 
 
 
 Designed to protect hands, during vehicle recovery 
 Kevlar reinforced palm patch providing increased protection when working with wire or synthetic rope winch cables 
 Flexibility for greater comfort 
 Reinforced wear points 
 
 Recovery Bag 
 
 
 Made from heavy-duty polyester material with mesh pockets and webbing straps 
 Water and dust resistant 
 Traditional design, to fit in most draw systems and minimise wasted space 
 Extra storage pockets 
 
 
 
 
 Kit contains: Multi-pocket storage bag, snatch strap, 2 x bow shackles, and gloves. 
 Warranty: 5 year warranty excludes bag and gloves, 1 year warranty.

name: Bushranger Winch Recovery Kit
key_features: Minimum breaking strain: 8,000kg | Length: 9m | Weight: 2.3kg | Warranty: 5 Year
short: The Bushranger® Recovery Kit gives you peace of mind. Best suited to a 10,000lb winch, carrying a complete recovery solution, if you become stuck you’ll have the tools to get yourself out and home safe.
src:
The Bushranger Winch Recovery Kitgives you peace of mind. Best suited to a 10,000lb winch, carrying a complete recovery solution, if you become stuck you’ll have the tools to get yourself out and home safe. 
 The compact bag is complete with a 9m x 8,000kg snatch strap, 11,000kg trunk protector, 10m x 5,500kg winch extension strap, 2 x 3.25t & 2 x 4.75t bow shackles, 11,000kg snatch block, recovery damper and a pair of gloves. 
 All Bushranger® Straps are engineered and manufactured to the highest quality standards. Australian tested both in a NATA accredited lab and 4WD field test conditions. Featuring; Reinforced Protection | Added protective eyelets to ensure maximum strength when used with shackles and hooks. Strap Usage Recording Tags | Located with the compliance tags, the usage tags allow you to record and track the number of times the strap is used to help identify fatigue and age of the strap. Wrap-it Strap | Easy storage wrap it strap, stitched to the strap so it is ready to roll up and use any time. Compliance | Designed and tested to comply with the latest Australian Consumer Goods [Motor Vehicle Recovery Strap] Safety Standard 2017. 
 
 
 DESCRIPTION 
 Snatch Strap 
 Snatch straps are purpose-designed to stretch under intense loads from a moving recovery vehicle. Kinetic energy combined with the elastic properties of the recovery strap work together to pull a disabled vehicle and assist in recovery. 
 
 
 Minimum breaking strain: 8,000kg 
 Length: 9m 
 Weight: 2.3kg 
 Warranty: 5 Year 
 
 Tree Trunk Protector 
 In a vehicle recovery situation, the use of wrapping cable, rope or chain around a tree, causes damage to both your recovery equipment and the tree. The Tree Trunk Protector will provide a secure recovery attachment point while protecting the tree 
 
 
 Minimum breaking strain: 11,000kg 
 Length: 3m 
 Weight: 1.41kg 
 Warranty: 5 Year 
 
 Winch Extension Strap 
 Winch extension straps are designed to extend the reach capability of your winch cable. 
 
 
 Minimum breaking strain: 5,500kg 
 Length: 10m 
 Weight: 1.75kg 
 Warranty: 5 Year 
 
 Snatch Block 
 
 
 Working load: 11,000kg 
 Minimum breaking strength: 18,000kg 
 Dimensions: 197mm x 105mm x 50mm 
 Material: UV Stable Matt Black Powder coated 6mm steel side plates 
 Bearing: Precision machined steel with grease nipple axle 
 Rope type: Suitable for synthetic or wire rope up to 12mm diameter 
 Weight: 2.5kg 
 Warranty: 5 Years 
 
 Bow Shackles 
 
 
 Capacity 3.25 tonne & 4.75 tonne 
 Tested in accordance to AS2741-2002 SHACKLES; clause 9.2, Appendix D & appendix F 
 
 Recovery Damper 
 In the event of a failure, the recovery damper will absorb most of the energy in the cable or strap, thereby significantly reducing the recoil and force the line to drop straight down to the ground. Manufactured from heavy-duty reinforced PVC, with reflective tape for night time recoveries, internal weight pockets and extra pocket if extra weight is required, wide Velcro tabs for quick set-up and pack away so you can get back to exploring. 
 Gloves 
 
 
 Designed to protect hands, during vehicle recovery 
 Kevlar reinforced palm patch providing increased protection when working with wire or synthetic rope winch cables 
 Flexibility for greater comfort 
 Reinforced wear points 
 
 Recovery Bag 
 
 
 Made from heavy-duty polyester material with mesh pockets and webbing straps 
 Water and dust resistant 
 Traditional design, to fit in most draw systems and minimise wasted space 
 Extra storage pockets

name: Bushranger Winch REVO MKII | 10,000lb | SYNTHETIC
key_features: The Bushranger Winch REVO MKII vehicle recovery winch has been engineered to meet the demands of serious off-road enthusiasts who require dependable performance, even in the most challenging environments. Boasting a wide range of upgrades stemming from years of real-world testing and feedback, the result is an overall lighter weight, easier to fit, safer and more compact winch with increased durability over its predecessor. FEATURES AND BENEFITS ENGINEERED & PROVEN IN AUSTRALIA The highest quality components and rigorous test methods ensure reliability and longevity even within the harshest environments. COMPACT MULTI-FIT CONTROL BOX The compact, lightweight control box provides easier installation in confined areas, reduces interference, and incorporates numerous threaded insert locations for immediate fitting in most bull bars. ALBRIGHT CONTACTOR The Albright DC contactor stands out in the market with its top-of-the-line quality. Sealed with an IP67 rating, it manages the winch motor function with unmatched durability and longevity, ensuring reliable operation time after time. PREMIUM MOTOR DESIGN The 12V series wound motor is constructed using high-grade materials to reduce current draw and increase line speeds, providing a prolonged motor lifespan under full load conditions. ZERO DRAG BRAKING SYSTEM The gearbox-mounted brake provides 100% load holding and the capacity for fast-powered unspooling, under no load, without any damage to the winch. 4 STAGE GEARBOX Features hardened steel gearing for improved load distribution, maximum strength and durability, and is externally adjustable in 16 clocking positions for perfect clutch handle orientation in any vehicle. ROBUST CONSTRUCTION Uncompromised strength and rigidity are at the core of the tough aluminium alloy body, finished with a durable satin black powder coat. EFFORTLESS CLUTCH OPERATION The astute no-lift clutch handle reduces fitment interference and presents simple operation even within those hard-to-reach locations. Factory positioned for 90% of bull bar fitments. POWER ISOLATION SWITCH The highest level of safety comes standard with the inclusion of a 500amp winch isolation switch, providing complete separation of the winch from the vehicle battery when the winch is not in use. WATER & DUSTPROOF The completely sealed motor & gearbox is rated to IP68 standard for maximum water, dust and debris protection. WIRELESS & WIRED REMOTE The compact wireless-enabled hand controller contains a lacquered PCB allowing function within a 30m wireless range or by the direct connection 5m lead. FITTED WEIGHT 32.7kg KIT INCLUDES: Complete REVO MKII winch, synthetic rope (28m x 10mm) with protective sleeve, prewired control box, dual connection remote control, forged steel hook with pull tag, aircraft grade aluminium hawse fairlead, main power isolation switch, & hi-tensile mounting hardware.
short: Part Number: RWM100S Engineered in Australia to meet the demands of serious off-road enthusiasts who require dependable performance, the REVO MKII defines a new era of unmatched reliability, effortless fitment and operation, enhanced safety, and unparalleled longevity.

 FEATURES AND BENEFITS 
 ENGINEERED & PROVEN IN AUSTRALIA 
The highest quality components and rigorous test methods ensure reliability and longevity even within the harshest environments. 
 COMPACT MULTI-FIT CONTROL BOX 
The compact, lightweight control box provides easier installation in confined areas, reduces interference, and incorporates numerous threaded insert locations for immediate fitting in most bull bars.

The Albright DC contactor stands out in the market with its top-of-the-line quality. Sealed with an IP67 rating, it manages the winch motor function with unmatched durability and longevity, ensuring reliable operation time after time.

The 12V, 6.2HP series wound motor is constructed using high-grade materials to reduce current draw and increase line speeds, providing a prolonged motor lifespan under full load conditions. 
 ZERO DRAG BRAKING SYSTEM 
The gearbox-mounted brake provides 100% load holding and the capacity for fast-powered unspooling, under no load, without any damage to the winch. 
 4 STAGE GEARBOX 
Features hardened steel gearing for improved load distribution, maximum strength and durability, and is externally adjustable in 16 clocking positions for perfect clutch handle orientation in any vehicle. 
 ROBUST CONSTRUCTION 
Uncompromised strength and rigidity are at the core of the tough aluminium alloy body, finished with a durable satin black powder coat.

The astute no-lift clutch handle reduces fitment interference and presents simple operation even within those hard-to-reach locations. Factory positioned for 90% of bull bar fitments.

The highest level of safety comes standard with the inclusion of a 500amp winch isolation switch, providing complete separation of the winch from the vehicle battery when the winch is not in use.

src:
Class 1A Diamond Grade 3M Tape - Hi Vis Job-site Safety Vehicle Reflective Tape 
 3M reflective high visibility tape is a crucial safety accessory for individuals working in construction, transportation, and mining and those working in low-light or dark conditions. The tape is designed to reflect light to its source, making it highly visible and increasing the wearer's visibility, especially during low-light conditions. 
 We understand the importance of high-quality and reliable safety gear, so we offer a range of 3M reflective high-visibility tapes catering to different industries and job requirements. 3M tapes are made from top-quality materials and are designed to be long-lasting, making them a cost-effective safety solution. 
 One of the key advantages of using 3M reflective high-visibility tape is that it can significantly reduce the risk of accidents and injuries in the workplace. By increasing the visibility of workers in low-light conditions, the tape can alert drivers and equipment operators of their presence, preventing collisions and accidents. This helps to improve safety and reduce the number of workplace incidents, saving companies money and improving their reputation. 
 In addition to the safety benefits, our 3M reflective high visibility tapes are also highly versatile and can be used in various applications. They can be easily applied to clothing, vehicles, equipment, and even roadways, making them ideal for various industries and situations. 
 

 Reflective hi-vis ute tape is extremely important on mine and traffic management vehicles for several reasons: 
 
 Improved Visibility: High visibility reflective tape makes vehicles more visible in low light conditions, such as at night or in poor weather. This increased visibility can help prevent accidents and keep workers safe. 
 Compliance with Safety Regulations: Many safety regulations require vehicles to have reflective tape installed. For example, the Australian Standard AS 4602.1:2011 requires that all vehicles used for traffic management install reflective tape. 
 Cost-Effective: Installing reflective hi-vis tape is a cost-effective way to improve vehicle safety. It is much cheaper than other safety measures, such as installing additional lighting systems. 
 Durability: Reflective tape is highly durable and can withstand harsh weather and heavy use. This means it will continue providing high visibility over a long period. 
 Easy to Install: Reflective tape is easy to install and can be applied to almost any surface. This makes it a convenient option for adding an extra layer of safety to vehicles. 
 
 Overall, using hi-vis reflective tape on mine and traffic management vehicles is essential for ensuring the safety of workers and preventing accidents. It is a cost-effective, durable solution that is easy to install and compliant with safety regulations. 
 

 We Supply and install to all vehicles 50mm or 75mm, available in white, orange, red, and fluorescent yellow/green. 
 
 3M Class 1A Diamond Grade™ Vehicle and Conspicuity Marking Tape 
 983 Rigid Edge Sealed Series are suitable for flat, rigid surfaces 
 Excellent water resistance and non-corroding 
 Easy application to utes, vans, trucks, trailers and large vehicles and other smaller hard surfaces such as gates and machinery equipment 
 3M reflective tape is available in bright, vivid colours, including white, yellow, and red, as well as fluorescent yellow/green 
 
 Audio Visual Security are specialists in complete fleet vehicle installations, we work with all car dealerships to have you vehicles ready and equipped at time of pick up. We can customise to suit all your needs for any industry and meet all job site requirements (OHS).

name: Clearview Retractable Side Steps - Power Boards
key_features: The best of both worlds - Retracting side steps descend on opening and retract on closing, making it easier to get into the car without sacrificing ground clearance. | A hefty 300kg load capacity per step | A safety cut-off feature is built whereby it holds its position if the Power Board senses any resistance during opening or closing. | 2 or 3 (depending on vehicle model) mounting brackets on each side provide additional strength and durability for when you need it most | IP68 rated motors | No drilling of new holes required - designed to mount into existing OEM holes | Maintenance free | Easy to clean!
short: Clearview Retractable Side Steps. Trouble getting in and out of your vehicle? Revolutionise your travel experience with Clearview™ Power Boards.
src:
Clearview Retractable Side Steps - Power Boards 
 Trouble getting in and out of your vehicle? Revolutionise your travel experience with Clearview™ Power Boards. 
If your vehicle is built for off-road and has been lifted for clearance, stepping in and out of the car can take more effort! Clearview™ Power Boards provide a safe stepping surface without sacrificing all-important clearance! 
 
 
 These Clearview Retractable Side Steps provide an easy and safe way to enter and exit your vehicle. 
Clearview Retractable Side Step Power Boards are fitted under the vehicle, running along the length of the car between the wheel arches on both the driver and passenger sides. 
 
Clearview Electric Side Steps Power Boards are triggered by the vehicle’s door sensor. When the door opens, the Power Board is activated and automatically lowers up to 300mm (depending on the model) to a convenient stepping height. When the door closes, the Power Board will automatically retract back to the vehicle's body. 
 
The inbuilt safety feature activates if any resistance is felt on the step resulting in the step holding its position. Opening and closing the door again will deactivate the Power Board’s safety stop. 
 
With a 300kg load capacity, a safety cut-off feature and an IP68 rating on the motors, accessing your vehicle is as easy as one step up. 
 
 
 
 Power Board Features: 
 
 
 
 
 
 The best of both worlds - Retracting side steps descend on opening and retract on closing, making it easier to get into the car without sacrificing ground clearance. 
 A hefty 300kg load capacity per step 
 A safety cut-off feature is built whereby it holds its position if the Power Board senses any resistance during opening or closing. 
 2 or 3 (depending on vehicle model) mounting brackets on each side provide additional strength and durability for when you need it most 
 IP68 rated motors 
 No drilling of new holes required - designed to mount into existing OEM holes 
 Maintenance free 
 Easy to clean! 
 
 
 
 
 Electric side steps are available for the following Vehicles: 
 Dodge RAM (2015 – 2018) 
 Ford Everest UA & UAII 2015 – 2022 
 Ford Ranger PX (2011 to 2014) 
 Ford Ranger PXII (2015 to 2018) 
 Ford Ranger PXIII (2019 on) 
 Holden Colorado (2012 to Current) 
 Isuzu D-Max (2015 to 2019) 
 Isuzu MU-X (2015 to 2019) 
 Mazda BT-50 UP/UR Series Oct 2011 – Jun 2020 
 Nissan Patrol Y62 
 Toyota Hilux (double cab) (2015 to Current) 
 Toyota LandCruiser 76 Series, thick board, LED light 
 Toyota LandCruiser 79 Series, thick board, LED light 
 Toyota LandCrusier 200 Series (without side skirt) (2008 to Current)

key_features: Mirror size and driving position comparable to OEM mirrors | Telescopic 2-stage extension provides 2 towing positions to choose from, and won’t retract when driving at high speeds or when passing large trucks. | Large convex single mirror reduces the objects that it reflects, allowing the driver to have a much wider field view and diminishing blind spots. | Functions great on smaller vehicles with service bodies | Single mirror models are recommended for vehicles with large canopies or for towing anything under 15ft. | Extends up to 180mm for towing | Choice of Manual Fold or Power Fold* (*Options may vary depending on make, model and year of vehicle) | Choice of black, chrome and raw finish which can be painted to any colour to match your vehicle (Done at any third party auto painting service) | 2-in-1 Category 5 LED indicator light/clearance light | Category 6 LED Light available as optional extra | Clearview towing mirrors™ fold inwards or outwards if accidently struck whilst 4WDing or parked.
short: Clearview Towing Mirrors are built to be vehicle specific and as such, won’t fit all vehicles. But they do have mirrors designed to fit more than 32 different vehicle models! Compact, Next Gen and Original
src:
Clearview Mirrors are built to be vehicle specific and as such, won’t fit all vehicles. But they do have mirrors designed to fit more than 32 different vehicle models! 

 Clearview’s ever-expanding range includes vehicle brands as diverse as Toyota, Nissan, Mitsubishi, Ford, Chevrolet, Holden, Isuzu, Mazda, Jeep, and Land Rover. Clearview’s range of Towing Mirrors is constantly evolving. So even if there isn’t a model currently available to suit your vehicle, Clearview is likely busy perfecting one for it right now. 

 
 What Are Clearview Mirrors? 
Clearview Towing Mirrors are a full replacement towing mirrors meant to replace your vehicle’s standard side mirrors.

Their clever design incorporates two different surfaces.

The top mirror features a flat, reflective surface that reflects vision directly down the sides of your caravan. Whilst a smaller, bottom convex mirror helps eliminate blind spots by giving you more vision out to the lanes beside your vehicle.

Clearview Mirrors are easy to adjust. So you’re always able to quickly switch the mirror to areas like tyres, wheels or the undercarriage of your caravan.

Clearview Mirrors are substantially larger than your standard side mirror. In standard driving position, Clearview Mirrors have a wider outwards reach of approximately 100mm; a total surface area much bigger than the standard models.

When you’re ready to tow, Clearview Mirrors slide out an additional 100mm! An additional extension that allows for around a total 200mm of extension over standard side mirrors.

Clearview Mirrors are also designed to manually fold inwards or outwards towards the car. In case someone brushes past you in a car park.

Clearview Mirrors are available in compact, next gen and original
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Compact Towing Mirrors Features: 
 
 
 
 
 
 Mirror size and driving position comparable to OEM mirrors 
 Telescopic 2-stage extension provides 2 towing positions to choose from, and won’t retract when driving at high speeds or when passing large trucks. 
 Large convex single mirror reduces the objects that it reflects, allowing the driver to have a much wider field view and diminishing blind spots. 
 Functions great on smaller vehicles with service bodies 
 Single mirror models are recommended for vehicles with large canopies or for towing anything under 15ft. 
 Extends up to 180mm for towing 
 Choice of Manual Fold or Power Fold* (*Options may vary depending on make, model and year of vehicle) 
 Choice of black, chrome and raw finish which can be painted to any colour to match your vehicle (Done at any third party auto painting service) 
 2-in-1 Category 5 LED indicator light/clearance light 
 Category 6 LED Light available as optional extra 
 Clearview towing mirrors™ fold inwards or outwards if accidently struck whilst 4WDing or parked. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Next Gen Towing Mirror features 
 
 
 
 
 
 Mirror size and driving position comparable to OEM mirrors 
 Telescopic 2-stage extension provides 3 towing positions to choose from, and won’t retract when driving at high speeds or when passing large trucks. 
 Extends up to 180mm for towing 
 Large top mirror 1:1 ratio. This large, flat mirror provides a narrower field of view, reflecting true distance for reversing. It provides an exact reflection of what’s happening behind you. 
 Smaller bottom mirror. This slightly curved mirror makes objects appear closer than they are. The convex mirror reduces the objects that it reflects, allowing the driver to have a much wider field view and diminishing blind spots. This mirror provides a better understanding of what’s happening around the vehicle. 
 Choice of manual or power folding* (*Options may vary depending on make, model and year of vehicle) 
 Choice of black, chrome and raw finish which can be painted to any colour to match your vehicle (Done at any third party auto painting service) 
 ADR compliant, tough Australian design built to last 
 Due to their double mirror design, Next Gen's are recommended for all your towing needs. 
 Clearview towing mirrors™ fold inwards or outwards if accidently struck whilst 4WDing or parked. 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Original Towing Mirrors Features 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Available for over 40 vehicle models. 
 Telescopic arms with 2 different driving positions, Normal Driving Position and Extended towing position. 
 Sturdy steel arm construction won’t retract when driving at high speeds or when passing large trucks. 
 Choice of Manual or Power Folding feature on certain listed models only* 
 Very large top mirror 1:1 ratio. This large, flat mirror provides a narrower field of view, reflecting true distance for reversing. It provides an exact reflection of what’s happening behind you. 
 Smaller bottom mirror. This slightly curved mirror makes objects appear closer than they are. The convex mirror reduces the objects that it reflects, allowing the driver to have a much wider field view and diminishing blind spots. This mirror provides a better understanding of what’s happening around the vehicle. 
 Extends up to 103mm for towing 
 ADR compliant, tough Australian design built to last. 
 Clearview towing mirrors™ fold inwards or outwards if accidently struck whilst 4WDing or parked. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Available Finishes and Features 
 Electric or Manual Flat Mirror Adjustment 
Clearview Towing Mirrors can be fully electric – meaning the larger flat mirror glass is capable of being shifted with the flick of a switch from your existing mirror controller – or they can also be fitted as a manual, non-electric mirror.

Please note that Clearview Mirrors are not capable of electric folds, memory adjustments, or auto dipping for reverse. And they do not contain puddle lights or cameras. If your standard side mirrors contain any of these functions they will be lost once Clearview Mirrors are installed. But will have no effect on any of the vehicle’s other functions.
 With or Without Indicators 
Clearview Towing Mirrors can be fitted with or without indicators. If your vehicle’s standard side mirrors contain indicators, remember – you are required by law to buy replacement side mirrors with indicators. Some vehicles can have Clearview Mirrors with indicators even if the vehicle’s standard side mirrors do not contain indicators.
 Black or Chrome Finish 
A choice between a chrome or textured black finish will suit most vehicles. Whilst both designs are equally durable and practical, and will be able to resist the rigours the Australian outback is bound to produce, the chrome mirrors do require a polish every once in a while to maintain their original shine.
 
 Powerfold (New Feature – Select Models Only) 
Some Clearview Towing Mirrors now come with the new innovative Powerfold feature, designed to electrically fold flat to the side of your vehicle with one easy touch of a button. This handy feature makes avoiding surrounding objects like thick bushland a breeze, allowing you the added comfort of remaining in the vehicle.

 AP600 CRUISE CONTROL – ELECTRIC ACTUATOR KIT

If you want to optimise your driving experience and save money on gas in the long run, then an aftermarket cruise control is worth considering.

The AP600 cruise control will read the electronic speed signal from an electronic gearbox transducer, reed-switch speedometer, or ECU. 
 
Calibration to vehicle PPM (Pulse Per Minute) range is achieved by “on-road calibration” while driving the vehicle. The vehicle PPM rate does not need to be verified. 
 
Cruise Control sensitivity and initial engagement rate may be individually adjusted to suit the driver’s requirements while driving the vehicle. 
 
Suitable for most Australian and imported vehicles, including four-wheel drives, and light commercials with traditional throttle systems. 
 
Many “Drive-by-Wire” throttle system vehicles are approved when fitted with an optional “vehicle-specific” hardware kit.

 Command AP900 Cruise Control Features include: 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
• SET (at current road speed)
• RESUME (to last set speed)
• ACC and DEC (for minor speed increase/decrease while engaged)
• Immediate brake disengage
• Immediate clutch disengage (on manual vehicles fitted with optional clutch switch)

 Newer modern features include: 

• Voluntary speed limiter mode
• Coast function (on CM30/CM35 model)
• Fixed speed limiter mode
• Speed Alert
• On-road or PC calibration
• CANbus capable (selected models)
• New ‘ self-learning’ technology
• Multiple switches available for the consumer (see switch listing)

The ‘900’ Series product is suitable for multiple vehicle applications and will utilise vehicle specific as well as universal harnesses for various vehicle brands hence eliminating the requirement to carry multiple cruise control models. This has the potential to reduce your inventory requirements significantly.

Calibration for your specific vehicle installation can be performed “on-road” with a similar procedure as the AP500 models or via a PC. This procedure is “state of the art” and allows for precise adjustments to suit vehicle characteristics or driver requirements.

Installers will need to be qualified and approved by Command Auto prior to purchase to install cruise control.

 Pedal Harnesses 
• Universal harness for multi-fit applications allow ease of fit, choice and range • Dedicated harnesses to fit modern vehicle pedal ECU. 

AP900 can be programmed to suit factory switches in many vehicles.
AP900 Series is suitable for use in vehicles with modern engine conversions.

First Aid and Fire Extinguisher Stickers for Vehicles 
In Australia, traffic control vehicles are required to have specific decals that comply with national safety standards . These decals serve an important purpose, as they provide information about the vehicle's purpose and the safety equipment it carries. The decals are also a requirement for vehicles involved in road works and other traffic management operations.

 

One of the most important decals is the "Traffic Control" sticker, which must be placed in a highly visible location on the vehicle. This sticker indicates to other drivers and pedestrians that the vehicle is involved in traffic management operations and should be approached with caution.

Another essential decal is the "Fire Extinguisher" sticker, which must be placed near the fire extinguisher on the vehicle. This decal is required to indicate the presence and location of the fire extinguisher, which is mandatory safety equipment for traffic control vehicles.

Similarly, a "First Aid" sticker must be placed in an obvious location on the vehicle to indicate the presence and location of first aid equipment. This decal is essential in an emergency, as it helps emergency services quickly locate and access first aid equipment.

In addition to these decals, traffic control vehicles may also be required to have other stickers or reflective tape, such as chevrons, to improve their visibility to other drivers. These decals and reflective tape must also comply with Australian safety standards.

Overall, complying with Australian safety standards for traffic control vehicles is crucial for ensuring the safety of both workers and the public. The required decals and safety equipment help alert others to the vehicle's presence and make it easier to respond in an emergency.

At Audio Visual Security, we understand the importance of complying with Australian safety standards for traffic control vehicles. That's why we offer a comprehensive range of decals, signage, and reflective tape to ensure our customers' vehicles meet all necessary requirements. 

Our range of decals includes everything from "Traffic Control" and "Fire Extinguisher" stickers to "First Aid" decals and chevrons. All of our decals are made from high-quality materials that are durable and weather-resistant, ensuring that they remain visible and legible even under the harshest conditions.

In addition to decals, we also offer a variety of signage, such as "Roadwork Ahead" signs and "Stop/Slow" signs, which can be mounted on the vehicle or used separately as required. Our signage is made from high-quality materials designed to meet all relevant Australian safety standards.

Finally, we offer a range of reflective tape to improve the visibility of our customer's vehicles. Our reflective tape is available in various colours and styles and can be used to create custom designs or patterns to suit our customers' needs.

At our company, we pride ourselves on offering a complete range of products to ensure our customers' vehicles meet all necessary safety requirements. Whether our customers need decals, signage, or reflective tape, we can provide them with high-quality products designed to last. Contact us today to learn more about how we can help you comply with Australian safety standards for traffic control vehicles.

name: Fleet Management Vehicle GPS Tracking Device
short: Fleet Management Vehicle GPS Tracking Device Robust and affordable vehicle tracking device with inputs/outputs, remote immobilisation for fleet management, driver ID, driver safety and behaviour monitoring, theft recovery, and more
src:
Fleet Management Vehicle GPS Tracking Device 
 Robust and affordable vehicle tracking device with inputs/outputs, remote immobilisation for fleet management, driver ID, driver safety and behaviour monitoring, theft recovery, and more. 

Vehicle GPS tracking systems have become indispensable tools for modern fleet management. By leveraging real-time tracking, customised alerts, and comprehensive reporting, businesses can enhance efficiency, improve security, and optimise their fleet operations.

With the ability to make data-driven decisions and implement proactive strategies, organisations can stay ahead of the competition and deliver exceptional customer service.

 

 In today's fast-paced world, efficient fleet management and ensuring the security of valuable assets are paramount for businesses of all sizes. With vehicle GPS tracking solutions, organisations can gain real-time insights into their fleet operations, optimise routes, improve driver behaviour, and enhance overall productivity. 

 

 Real-Time Tracking and Location Information: Vehicle GPS tracking provides real-time visibility into the location and movement of vehicles. By leveraging advanced GPS technology, businesses can monitor their entire fleet on a digital map, allowing them to track vehicles' current positions accurately. This feature enables companies to optimise routes, respond quickly to changing circumstances, and provide accurate estimated arrival times to customers.

 Enhanced Fleet Efficiency and Productivity: GPS vehicle tracking systems offer valuable data on vehicle performance, fuel consumption, and driver behaviour. By analysing this information, businesses can identify areas for improvement and implement strategies to enhance fleet efficiency and productivity. Optimised routes, reduced idle time, and improved driver behaviour contribute to cost savings, increased operational efficiency, and improved customer satisfaction.

 Geofencing and Customized Alerts: Geofencing is a powerful feature that allows businesses to set virtual boundaries or zones for their vehicles. When a vehicle enters or exits a predefined area, the GPS tracking system triggers customised alerts, notifying fleet managers in real time. Geofencing can monitor unauthorised vehicle usage, prevent theft, and ensure compliance with designated routes or areas.

 Maintenance and Asset Management: Vehicle GPS tracking systems can streamline maintenance and asset management processes. By setting up automated maintenance reminders based on mileage or engine hours, businesses can proactively schedule maintenance tasks, reducing downtime and preventing costly breakdowns. Tracking assets through GPS technology also helps ensure their security and allows for efficient allocation and utilisation.

 Comprehensive Reporting and Analytics : Data captured by GPS tracking systems can be analysed to generate comprehensive reports and meaningful insights. Fleet managers can access detailed reports on driver behaviour, fuel consumption, mileage, and more. These reports facilitate informed decision-making, enabling businesses to identify trends, address operational challenges, and implement strategies for continuous improvement.
 
 CONNECTIVITY 
The Dart2 is available in either Cellular 2G or LTE-M / NB-IoT.
 
 
 
 
 2G 
 2G: SARA-G350-02S-01
850/900/1800/1900 MHz 
 
 
 LTE-M / NB-IoT 
 uBlox SARA-R410M Modem operates on all major global LTE-M and NB-IoT bands.
Supported LTE bands: 1*, 2, 3, 4, 5, 8, 12, 13, 18, 19, 20, 26*, 28 (*roaming bands)

 Internal Micro 3FF SIM

 uBlox EVA-M8

 Channels

 -167dBm industry-leading tracking performance

 GNSS almanac data for greater sensitivity and position accuracy 
 
 
 Low Noise Amplifier 
 GPS signals are boosted by a unique low-noise amplifier (LNA), allowing operation where other units fail 
 
 
 
 
 
 POWER 
 
 
 
 
 Input Voltage 
 8-36V DC (max) 
 
 
 Self-Resetting Fuse 
 Built-in self-resetting fuse makes installation simple and safe. Stringent automotive power “load dump” tests are conducted to ensure operation in the harshest electrical systems. 
 
 
 Operating Current 
 ~25/50mA when moving
~150mA battery charging 
 
 
 Sleep Current 
 <1 mA 
 
 
 Back-Up Battery 
 200mA LiPo internal backup battery pack 
 
 
 
 
 
 MECHANICS / DESIGN 
 
 
 
 
 Dimensions 
 95 x 55 x 17 mm (3.74 x 2.17 x 0.67″) 
 
 
 Weight 
 79 g (2.79 oz) 
 
 
 Housing 
 ABS Polycarbonate Plastic 
 
 
 Operating Temperature 
 -20°C to +60°C (connected to external power)
At < 0°C and > +40°C, the internal backup battery will not be charged as a safety precaution due to the dangers associated with charging batteries at extreme temperatures. 
 
 
 GPS Antenna 
 Internal 
 
 
 Cellular Antenna 
 Internal 
 
 
 RF Antenna 
 Internal 
 
 
 3-Axis Accelerometer 
 3-Axis Accelerometer to detect movement, high G-force events, and more 
 
 
 Diagnostic LED 
 Diagnostic LED signifies operation status 
 
 
 Flash Memory 
 Store weeks of records if the device is out of cellular coverage. Storage capacity for over ten days of continuous 30-second logging. 
 
 
 
 
 
 GPS TRACKING INTERFACES 
 
 
 
 
 Digital Inputs 
 2 x Digital Inputs with configurable pull-up/down
0-48V DC input range
On/Off thresholds:
Pull-up enabled: low at 0.8V, high at 1.0V
Pull-down enabled: low at 2.0V, high at 2.4V
It can be used for pulse counting 
 
 
 Digital Outputs 
 1 x Switched Ground Digital Output
Easily wired up to switch external lights, relays, buzzers, etc.
It can be used to immobilise a vehicle 
 
 
 Ignition

5V on/off threshold

 3.5-4.5Vout
Max current 200mA 
 
 
 TLL Interface 
 Serial interface used to connect a Digital Matter RFID reader for Driver ID 
 
 
 1-Wire® or iButton® 
 1-Wire® or iButton® can be used to read Driver ID tags. Readers are available to suit multiple card formats. 
 
 
 
 
 
 SMARTS 
 
 
 
 
 Auto-APN 
 Auto-APN allows the device to analyse the SIM card and select the correct APN details from a list that is pre-loaded in the device’s firmware. 
 
 
 Accident & Rollover Detection 
 Configure accident and rollover alerts triggered by extreme velocity changes and vehicle or equipment orientation. Second-by-second GPS data is saved on the device’s flash memory, with approximately 2 hours of data capacity. In the event of an accident, a subset of the data (60 seconds before / 10 seconds after) is uploaded to the server automatically (if configured) or can be requested manually for a detailed reconstruction of the incident. 
 
 
 Driver ID Options 
 RFID reader or iButton® interface for Driver ID, access control, and logbook 
 
 
 Driver Safety & Behavior 
 Monitor speeding, harsh acceleration, braking, cornering, idling, and more to improve safety and prevent unnecessary wear on vehicles. 
 
 
 Geofence Alerts 
 The server can use device location to create geofences and alerts if an asset enters or leaves designated locations. 
 
 
 Geofence Download to Device 
 Geofences can be downloaded directly to the device from Telematics Guru for enhanced location-based actions and alerts.
Maximum of 20 Geofences with up to 30 points per geofence. 
 
 
 GPS Jamming Detection 
 GPS Jamming or Interference can be detected and alerted on 
 
 
 In-Vehicle Alerts 
 Can be wired up to external buzzers or lights for in-vehicle alerts 
 
 
 Lone Worker Safety 
 Interface a variety of duress pendants to enable man-down alerts for lone worker safety monitoring. 
 
 
 Preventative Maintenance 
 Set reminders based on distance travelled and ran hours to reduce maintenance and repair costs. 
 
 
 Real-Time Tracking 
 The device remains continuously connected while on the move for real-time asset tracking. 
 
 
 Remote Immobilization 
 Digital outputs can be connected to a relay to enable remote immobilisation of vehicles and equipment in the case of theft, abuse, or unauthorised usage. 
 
 
 Run Hour Monitoring 
 Calculate run hours and distance travelled (odometer) to understand and optimise asset utilisation. 
 
 
 Sensor Monitoring 
 Interface with a range of devices and switches for seatbelt detection, duress and panic buttons, lights, in-cab warning buzzers, and more 
 
 
 Tamper Alerts 
 Instant alert if the device is removed from your asset or disconnected from its power source 
 
 
 Theft Recovery 
 Switch to Recovery Mode in the case of theft or loss to activate real-time tracking for asset retrieval. 
 
 
 
 
 
 DEVICE MANAGEMENT 
 
 
 
 
 Flexible Configuration 
 Configure device parameters such as position update rate, movement and accelerometer settings, and more to fit any tracking application 
 
 
 OEM Server 
 Manage, monitor, configure, debug, update, and restart devices remotely from our cloud-based device management system. 
 
 
 
 
 
 INTEGRATION 
 
 
 
 
 Third-Party Integration 
 TCP Direct or HTTPS Webhook 
 
 
 
 
 
 PERIPHERALS 
 
 
 
 
 RFID Driver ID Reader 
 RFID Driver ID Reader 
 
 
 
 
 
 SECURITY 
 
 
 
 
 Data Security 
 Military-level AES-256 Encryption from device to OEM Server to protect the integrity and confidentiality of telematics data.
Data forwarded to third-party systems is sent via HTTPS for end-to-end security. 
 
 
 
 
 
 WARRANTY 
 
 
 
 
 Manufacturer’s Warranty 
 One-year manufacturer’s warranty 
 
 
 
 
 
 CERTIFICATIONS 
 
 
 
 
 Please get in touch with us for a complete list of compliance specifications and documentation for your region. 
 LTE-M / NB-IoT – FCC, ISED, ACMA (DoC), PTCRB, AT&T, CE (Doc)
2G – ICASA, CE (DoC)

The speakers also come with an inverted dome mylar tweeter that delivers clear and crisp high frequencies, making your music sound natural and balanced. 
 
Another benefit of the Focal ACX-165 speakers is their high power handling. With a maximum power output of 120 watts and a nominal power handling of 60 watts, these speakers can handle high volume levels without distortion or damage. This feature is especially important for music lovers who enjoy listening to their favourite tunes at high volumes. 
 
The Focal ACX-165 speakers are also easy to install, thanks to their universal compatibility with most car models. They come with a multi-position tweeter system that allows you to adjust the angle of the tweeter according to your preference. This feature ensures the sound is directed towards the listener, providing an immersive listening experience. 
 
Another benefit of the Focal ACX-165 speakers is their durability. They are built to withstand the harsh conditions of a car environment, including extreme temperatures, humidity, and vibration. The speakers are designed with a steel frame and a robust ABS plastic grille that protects them from external damage. This feature ensures that the speakers last for many years, providing long-lasting value for your investment. 
 
The Focal ACX 165 speakers are also stylish and visually appealing. They come with a sleek and modern design that complements the interior of most car models. The speakers feature a black matte finish with a chrome logo that adds a touch of sophistication to your car's sound system. 
 
The Focal ACX 165 6.5" 2-Way Coaxial Car Speakers are a premium choice for anyone looking to upgrade their car's sound system. They offer superior sound quality, high power handling, universal compatibility, durability, and a stylish design. Whether you're a music lover, audiophile, or just looking to improve your car's sound quality, the Focal ACX-165 speakers are an excellent choice. So, to experience high-quality sound in your vehicle, consider investing in the Focal ACX-165 6.5" 2-Way Coaxial Car Speakers.

FOCAL BAM XL Acoustic Insulation Kit – Maximize Sound, Minimize Noise 
 Take your car audio experience to the next level with the FOCAL BAM XL Acoustic Insulation Kit — a premium 3-layer soundproofing solution designed to dramatically reduce vibrations, eliminate road noise, and enhance speaker performance . Whether you're installing a high-end audio system or just want a quieter cabin, BAM XL delivers professional-grade acoustic insulation for superior results. 
 
 
 
 
 🧩 Triple-Layer Acoustic Engineering: 
 🔹 1. Honeycombed Damping Material 
 Just like the internal foam in premium loudspeakers, this honeycombed structure is designed to absorb and diffuse the speaker’s back wave , improving frequency clarity and boosting overall audio performance . 
 
 🔹 2. Aluminum Sheet Layer 
 This rigid layer enhances the "sandwich effect" , reinforcing the damping structure and further reducing unwanted resonance. The aluminum also acts as a thermal barrier, adding durability and heat resistance. 
 
 🔹 3. Viscoelastic Butyl Layer 
 The self-adhesive butyl rubber complex clings securely to vehicle panels to absorb surface vibrations and block external noise . It significantly reduces road noise, rattles, and structural hums — giving you cleaner, louder, and more detailed sound from your speakers. 
 
 
 
 
 ✅ Key Features: 
 
 
 High-performance 3-layer acoustic insulation 
 
 
 Designed for use behind door panels, speaker mounts, roofs, floors, and trunks

 🎯 Ideal For: 
 
 
 Sound quality-focused audio upgrades

 Fleet vehicles, 4WDs, commercial setups , or daily drivers needing a quieter cabin 
 
 
 DIY or professional installations

src:
FOCAL ES 165 K2 Power – 6.5″ 2-Way Component Speaker Kit 
 Upgrade your driving experience with the FOCAL ES 165 K2 Power 2-way component speaker kit — the next evolution in high-performance car audio. Engineered and handcrafted in France, this premium 6.5" kit blends cutting-edge technology with iconic FOCAL sound, delivering unmatched precision, power, and dynamic range. 
 Designed for discerning audio enthusiasts, the ES 165 K2E features Focal’s legendary aramid fibre K2 cone , TMD® surround , and bi-ampable audiophile crossovers , all housed in a rugged aluminium frame for optimal durability and performance. 
 Whether you're building a custom sound system or enhancing your OEM setup, the ES 165 K2 is your go-to choice for high-end car audio upgrades. 


 

 Key Features 
 
 
 Made in France – Crafted in Focal’s high-end audio workshops. 
 
 
 K2 Aramid Fibre Cone – Iconic Focal sound: dynamic, warm, and ultra-precise. 
 
 
 TMD® Surround – Patented Tuned Mass Damper for cone stability and low distortion. 
 
 
 TKME ‘M’-Profile Tweeters – Superior high-frequency detail with wide sound dispersion. 
 
 
 Audiophile Crossover – Bi-amp capable with multi-level settings (+3/0/-3dB). 
 
 
 High Power Handling – Designed for clarity and durability at high volume. 
 
 
 Aluminium Grilles Included – Sleek and robust protection with premium aesthetics. 
 
 
 Three Tweeter Mounting Options – Factory-fit, flush, or angled installation flexibility. 
 
 

 

 What’s Included 
 
 
 2 x 6.5" K2 Power Woofers 
 
 
 2 x TKME Tweeters 
 
 
 2 x Crossovers (bi-ampable) 
 
 
 Aluminium Grilles 
 
 
 Mounting Hardware 
 
 
 Installation Manual 
 
 

 

 ⚙️ Technical Specifications 
 
 
 Type: 2-Way Component Kit 
 
 
 Woofer Size: 165mm (6.5") 
 
 
 Cone Material: Aramid Fibre (K2) 
 
 
 Tweeter: TKME, M-profile, inverted dome 
 
 
 Frequency Response: 60Hz – 22kHz 
 
 
 Power Handling: 100W RMS / 200W Peak 
 
 
 Sensitivity: 92.5dB 
 
 
 Impedance: 2 Ohms 
 
 
 Mounting Depth: 77mm 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Technologies 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 K2 SANDWICH MEMBRANE 
 Purity and precision of sound 

 
 The diaphragm, the key component of a loudspeaker, is at the heart of our acoustic engineers’ research. Shape and materials are essential for high-fidelity reproduction. In 1986, our teams unveiled an aramid fibre sandwich membrane, recognizable by its unique yellow color. It has been extensively renewed over the years, while retaining the characteristics that made it such a success. Today, it consists of an ultra-light foam core sandwiched between a layer of aramid fibre and a layer of glass fibre. It combines the three key factors of a loudspeaker membrane: rigidity, lightness and damping, for a precise, dynamic and uncolored sound. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 TMD SUSPENSION 
 Stabilized surround, eliminates vibrations 

 
 While our engineers are experts in the development of exclusive diaphragms, they also innovate in all the components that make up the loudspeakers, such as the surround that connects the diaphragm to the frame, the performance of which must be mastered. Introduced in 2015, Tuned Mass Damper (TMD) technology with harmonic damping consists of the addition of finely positioned toroidal weights to stabilize the surround for even greater sonic neutrality. This technology enhances the midrange and the erratic behavior of the surround between 1 kHz and 2 kHz. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 OPTIMIZED FILTERS 
 A high-performance soundstage

src:
5-channel Focal amplifier 
 
 Class D, FPX 5.1200 is a 5-channel amplifier delivering a maximum power of 4 x 120 watts and 1 x 720 watts at 2 ohms. Discreet, it combines high efficiency and compactness. A remote remote control allows you to manage the bass level from the driving position for optimal comfort of use and tailor-made listening. 
 The input selector (2/4/6 channels) duplicates channels, meaning there will always be 5 output channels, even if the head unit only has one or two stereo outputs. 
 To perfectly tune the subwoofer to the rest of the installation, the bass channel has a low-pass active crossover, a bass equaliser, phase adjustment and a subsonic filter (particularly useful for cutting off frequencies which are too low for a small subwoofer). The remote control enables you to adjust the bass level from the driving seat depending on the type of music you’re listening to. 
 Stable at 4 and 2 Ohms, this new FPX amplifier will drive most speaker drivers on the market with just the right amount of power: 4 x 75 Watts + 1 x 420 Watts RMS at 4 Ohms (CEA standard). With its power and contained volume, FPX 5.1200 makes the installation easier in order to make the most of your boot space. 
 
 
 Classe D amplifier 
 Input selector (2/4/6 channels) 
 Stable under 4 and 2 Ohms 
 Adjustable active crossover for each pair of channels 
 Dimensions: 13.25″ x 6.8″ x 2.25″ (337 x 175 x 57mm) 
 
 
 
 
 EASY INSTALL 
 
 By using Class D technology, Focal has reduced the need for heat dissipation for its FPX range. Focal’s goal is to offer electronics equipment which is very compact and powerful, but without sacrificing musicality. The dimensions of the 5-channel FPX 5.1200 amplifier (337 x 175 x 57mm / 13.25″ x 6.8″ x 2.25″) are nearly the same as the FPX 4.400 SQ. The FPX 5.1200 has a maximum power of 4 x 120 Watt + 1 x 720 Watt at 2 Ohms! 
 To perfectly tune the subwoofer to the rest of the installation, the bass channel has a low-pass active crossover, a bass equaliser, phase adjustment and a subsonic filter (particularly useful for cutting off frequencies which are too low for a small subwoofer). 
 Stable at 4 and 2 Ohms, this new FPX amplifier will drive most speaker drivers on the market with just the right amount of power: 4 x 75 Watts + 1 x 420 Watts RMS at 4 Ohms (CEA standard). 
 
 
 
 
 OPTIMAL HEAT DISSIPATION 
 
 For an amplifier to provide high power and musicality, efficiency and heat dissipation are two essential qualities. In order to optimize these aspects, FPX amplifiers have been given a thick aluminum chassis. The distribution of the components was also carefully researched to optimize the cooling capacity of the chassis. 
 
 The careful selection of each component (switching power supply, oversized toroidal transformers and high-quality capacitors) has made it possible to create powerful but ultra-compact amplifiers offering excellent musicality. 
 
 
 
 
 WHAT MAKES THE DIFFERENCE 
 
 
 
 Only one amplifier for the entire hi-fi installation 
 Easier to integrate and install 
 Compact design 
 Substantial power and great musicality 
 Extremely versatile 
 A dedicated subwoofer channel (+ remote control)

key_features: Easy Plug and Play installation | No soldering - Direct IMPULSE 4.320 connection to your original manufacturer head unit | No modification of the original manufacturer equipment
src:
Compact 4-channel digital amplifier 
 
 With the Impulse 4.320 focal amplifier, breathe new life into your car radio. The amplifier of a car radio (standard equipment or purchased subsequently) very quickly admits its limits in terms of power and dynamism. At high sound levels, it quickly goes into saturation and spoils the musical pleasure. To compensate for this lack and allow your speakers to express themselves fully, the Impulse 4.320 is the ideal solution. It will boost your installation without the need for complicated assembly. Semi “Plug and play”, the Impulse 4.320 is a 4-channel digital micro amp, delivering 4 x 55 Watts. The Impulse 4.320 perfectly complements the Focal Integration speakers. 
 
 TECHNOLOGY PLATFORM FROM FD AMPLIFIERS 
 The technology used for Impulse 4.320 was inspired by the Performance range‚Äôs FD amplifiers. 
 With an efficiency of more than 90%, Class D amplification has numerous advantages: less heat, low power consumption, low distortion at high volumes, compact... With the Impulse 4.320 amplifier, an unbeatable size/power ratio has been achieved. It delivers 4 x 55 or 2 x 160 Watts RMS at 4 Ohms. 
 Thanks to the adequate power and the fast attack for realistic and more aerated sound, it will completely transform the sound of your front and rear speaker drivers. 
 
 
 
 
 VERY EASY TO INSTALL AND PERFECT INTEGRATION 
 Impulse 4.320 - Cables Measuring only 67/8 x 17/8 x 25/8" (17.65 x 4.6 x 6.7 cm) Impulse 4.320 can easily be concealed within the dashboard or the centre console. 
 Equipped with high-level (automatic detection feature) and low-level inputs, it is compatible with all head units. Supplied with all fastenings, an adaptor for the head unit‚Äôs speaker driver outputs, RCA adaptors for aftermarket head units and power connector, this amp was specially designed to be easy to install. No direct hook up to the vehicle‚Äôs battery is required. 
 An optional ISO connector is available for Plug&Play connectivity via the head unit‚Äôs harness. 
 Note: On certain cars, a harness adapter may be necessary. EXTREMELY VERSATILE 
 To ensure compatibility with different head units, this amplifier features a 2-channel or 4-channel input selector switch. 
 Most of all, Impulse 4.320 has been designed to power front and rear speaker drivers. However, it can also be used in a 3-channel or 2-channel mode in order to meet all needs for improving small installations and it can also be used for powering the front speaker drivers and a small subwoofer. 
 Each pair of channels features an active crossover to adapt the sonic response according to the speaker drivers used. The front channels can be used for wideband speaker drivers or the high-pass filter can be used for frequencies above 75 Hz when only small speaker drivers are used. By avoiding having small speaker drivers reproduce very low frequencies, the sound will have more clarity. The rear channels are equipped with an active crossover (wideband, high-pass or low-pass) and with progressive phase adjustment for powering a small subwoofer or wideband speaker drivers of different sizes. 
 
 
 
 "Y" Adapter cable - FOCAL IMPULSE 4.320 cable kit for quick connection of Impulse amplifier in vehicles with ISO Standard wiring connectors behind the head unit. Simply unplug the ISO plug and connect this cable kit inline (with the Impulse amp) for an immediate improvement in power and sound quality.

 No modification of the original manufacturer equipment

 Optional ISO connector for semi “Plug&Play” set-ups 
 Extremely versatile 
 Compatible with all head units 
 Easy integration within the dashboard 
 Far more powerful than a head unit

short: Aluminum outer layer | Self-adhesive | Easy installation | Use on all metal panels, doors, roof, floor, firewall & trunk | Kills panel resonance, squeaks and rattles | Highest damping vs. weight ratio of any material available | Improves overall audio frequency response and bass output
src:
FOCAL Speaker Insulation Kit – Maximise Sound Clarity, Minimise Distortion 
 The FOCAL Speaker Insulation Kit is designed to significantly enhance sound quality and speaker efficiency in any automotive loudspeaker installation. By creating a dedicated acoustic barrier around and behind each speaker , this kit helps eliminate audio distortion caused by rear wave interference — one of the most common culprits of muffled or weak sound in car audio systems. 
 When installed correctly, the insulation kit isolates the front sound wave from the back wave (which is inverted), ensuring your speaker delivers its full performance without destructive interference. 
 
 
 
 
 🧩 What’s Included: 
 
 
 Egg-crate style acoustic foam pad (20cm x 20cm) 
 
 
 Seal rings to create airtight contact between speaker and door 
 
 
 25mm x 200mm thick foam ring for sound redirection 
 
 
 Adhesive backing for easy application 
 
 
 
 
 
 ✅ Key Benefits: 
 
 
 🔊 Improves speaker clarity, bass response & overall fidelity 
 
 
 🧼 Reduces distortion by isolating back wave energy 
 
 
 🚪 Forms a perfect seal between speaker & door panel – no sound leakage 
 
 
 🧰 Easy installation with self-adhesive components 
 
 
 🔧 Compatible with most round speakers – 6.5” or smaller 
 
 
 🎯 Designed for professional installs or high-quality DIY upgrades 
 
 
 
 
 
 🛠 Installation Tips (Summarised for SEO & Usability): 
 
 
 Mark and pre-drill mounting holes – Never use the speaker as a template to avoid damaging magnets. 
 
 
 Clean the door surface thoroughly with wax and grease remover. 
 
 
 Insert and secure the egg-crate pad behind the speaker location – absorbs rear wave distortion. 
 
 
 Install the seal ring to ensure an airtight fit around the speaker frame. 
 
 
 Place the thick foam ring around the speaker cone to direct sound through the grille and prevent leakage into the cavity behind the door trim. 
 
 
 💡 Pro Tip: For superior results, pair this kit with FOCAL BAM acoustic sheeting to insulate the full door panel, reduce resonance, and create a tighter soundstage. 
 
 
 
 
 🎯 Ideal For: 
 
 
 Any car audio enthusiast installing aftermarket speakers 
 
 
 4WDs, sedans, and commercial vehicles with audio upgrades 
 
 
 Pairing with Focal speakers and amps for a full audiophile-grade setup 
 
 
 Improving OEM speaker performance with minimal cost

 Video Player 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THE SUBWOOFER OF ALL SUPERLATIVES

 Engraved Serial Number Includes certificate of authenticity—guaranteed original Focal product. 
 
 

 

 Ideal For: 
 
 
 Custom sealed or ported subwoofer enclosures 
 
 
 High-SPL car audio builds 
 
 
 Audiophiles seeking tight, accurate, and deep bass 
 
 

 

 Technical Specs: 
 
 
 Size: 10″ (25 cm) 
 
 
 Cone Material: K2 Aramid Fibre 
 
 
 Voice Coils: Dual 
 
 
 Motor Type: Ferrite with coil ventilation 
 
 
 Power Handling: High SPL, continuous power 
 
 
 Frame: Aluminium 
 
 
 Mounting Depth: Compact, vehicle-friendly design 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 K2 SANDWICH MEMBRANE 
 Purity and precision of sound 

 
 The diaphragm, the key component of a loudspeaker, is at the heart of our acoustic engineers’ research. Shape and materials are essential for high-fidelity reproduction. In 1986, our teams unveiled an aramid fibre sandwich membrane, recognizable by its unique yellow color. It has been extensively renewed over the years, while retaining the characteristics that made it such a success. Today, it consists of an ultra-light foam core sandwiched between a layer of aramid fibre and a layer of glass fibre. It combines the three key factors of a loudspeaker membrane: rigidity, lightness and damping, for a precise, dynamic and uncolored sound. 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 TMD SUSPENSION 
 Stabilized surround, eliminates vibrations 

 
 While our engineers are experts in the development of exclusive diaphragms, they also innovate in all the components that make up the loudspeakers, such as the surround that connects the diaphragm to the frame, the performance of which must be mastered. Introduced in 2015, Tuned Mass Damper (TMD) technology with harmonic damping consists of the addition of finely positioned toroidal weights to stabilize the surround for even greater sonic neutrality. This technology enhances the midrange and the erratic behavior of the surround between 1 kHz and 2 kHz. 

 
 Why Choose FOCAL SUB 25 KXE? 
 Whether you’re aiming for tight musical bass or heavy low-end pressure, the SUB 25 KXE delivers professional-grade sound performance in a compact, rugged housing. This subwoofer is the perfect choice for a high-end car audio upgrade , giving you maximum performance without compromise .

src:
Front Parking Sensors – OE-Grade Accuracy with Bull Bar Recognition 
 Make tight parking, forward maneuvers, and city driving safer with our advanced Front Parking Sensor System , designed for discreet integration and enhanced performance. This system uses 58KHz OE-quality ultrasonic sensors , which offer wider and more accurate coverage than traditional 40KHz sensors. 
 Perfect for 4WDs, SUVs, utes, and vehicles with bull bars , this system includes automatic bull-bar recognition , helping the sensors adapt intelligently to front-end accessories like steel bumpers or bull bars. 
 Whether you're navigating tight spots or pulling up in traffic, this sensor system gives you the awareness and confidence to park and move safely. 
 
 
 
 
 ✅ Key Features: 
 
 
 OE-grade 58KHz ultrasonic sensors – greater accuracy and wider coverage 
 
 
 Automatic bull bar recognition – designed for vehicles with front-end accessories 
 
 
 Self-test function to detect faulty sensors instantly 
 
 
 No false alarms in traffic – system won't beep when vehicle is stopped 
 
 
 Activates automatically when reversing or pressing the brake 
 
 
 Audio mute function for quiet operation when needed 
 
 
 Adjustable alarm volume – low, mid, high settings 
 
 
 Sensor diameter: 20.5mm 
 
 
 Includes 6° and 12° angled rings for optimal positioning (21.5mm) 
 
 
 Upgrade option: Add a D2 LED display for visual and digital distance indicators 
 
 
 Supplied in gloss black but can be painted to match your vehicle's colour 
 
 
 Compatible with metal and plastic bumpers 
 
 
 
 
 
 🎨 Colour Coding & Installation 
 Sensors are supplied in gloss black as standard, but our team can paint and colour-match them to blend seamlessly with your vehicle's bodywork for a clean, factory-installed appearance. All systems are professionally installed by our experienced team at Audio Visual Security , with wiring neatly integrated and sensors properly aligned. 
 
 
 
 
 🚗 Ideal For: 
 
 
 4WDs, SUVs, utes, and work vehicles 
 
 
 Vehicles with bull bars or custom bumpers 
 
 
 Commercial vehicles needing front proximity awareness 
 
 
 Drivers looking for OEM-style parking aids with high reliability 
 
 
 
 
 
 🛠️ Installation Available in Melbourne 
 Visit our Brunswick workshop or speak with our team for on-site installations (available for fleets or trade clients). With over 35 years of experience in automotive electronics, Audio Visual Security delivers quality fitouts you can trust. 
 
 
 
 
 📞 Get a Custom Quote Today 
 We’ll supply, install, and colour match your front parking sensor system to suit your vehicle and requirements. Give us a call to get a tailored price or book an install.

short: New Dash Pre DPF Single Cab- 2009 -OCT 2016
src:
Full Length Centre Console – New Dash PRE-DPF 79 Series Single Cab (2009 – Oct 2016) with Full Length Console 
 Upgrade your LandCruiser’s cabin comfort and storage with this Full-Length Centre Console , custom-made to suit the New Dash Toyota 79 Series Single Cab PRE-DPF models from 2009 to October 2016 . Designed for vehicles with factory bucket seats , this console offers practical features and a factory-style finish – no drilling required. Experience the ultimate convenience with the addition of a full length console. 
 Built tough and built to fit, it screws directly into the existing factory holes for easy installation and perfect alignment. 


 

 ✅ Key Features: 
 
 
 Suits Toyota 79 Series Single Cab PRE-DPF (2009–Oct 2016) with factory bucket seats 
 
 
 2 x Cup Holders (black plastic) 
 
 
 2 x USB Ports and 1 x CIG Port 
 
 
 2 x Coin Trays for loose change or small gear 
 
 
 2 x Gearstick Boots 
 
 
 Removable plastic tray under the padded lid for extra storage 
 
 
 Lid at ideal armrest height for driver comfort 
 
 
 No drilling required – mounts directly using factory holes 
 
 

 

 ⚠️ Vehicle Compatibility: 
 
 ✔️ Fits: 
 
 
 
 2009 – Oct 2016 GXL 
 
 
 2014 – Oct 2016 Workmate and GX (with factory bucket seats) 
 
 
 
 ❌ Does NOT fit DPF models after October 2016 If you’re unsure whether your vehicle is pre- or post-DPF, please call us before ordering to confirm compatibility.

name: GME AE4704B 580mm Heavy Duty Radome Antenna
key_features: Black Fibreglass Radome | Heavy Duty Spring Base | Interchangeable Whip | Ground Independent Design | Pre-terminated FME Connector | 2.1dBi Gain | Length: 580mm
short: The AE470x series is an adaptable UHF CB antenna system with a range of spring bases and user-interchangeable whips. This allows you to quickly and easily switch between whips to suit the operating conditions and application. The AE470x series includes a range of shorter length whips with lower gain for mountainous terrain or built-up areas, and longer length whips with higher gain for travelling on open roads or flat terrain. The AE4704B is a popular choice for the 4WD enthusiast requiring a robust antenna for hardcore off-roading or touring. Also available in White (AE4704). The AE4707B is designed for the 4WD enthusiast who requires a robust but compact antenna for remote touring in Australia’s harsh outback conditions. As with many other smart devices, XRS™ Connect products are software upgradable via the XRS™ Connect app, keeping users up-to-date with the latest features and technology. GME is committed to releasing a minimum of one new upgrade for XRS™ Connect per year to ensure our users always have access to the latest technology available. The XRS™ Connect 4WD Pack pairs the popular XRS-370C Compact UHF CB Radio, with the heavy duty AE4704B radome antenna, the perfect solution for those users looking for the ultimate communications setup for the rugged Australian outback. With Bluetooth® connectivity and the XRS™ Connect app , you can create and share scan lists, manage channel profiles, and access the full AU/NZ registered analogue frequency database from your phone. The system is software-upgradable , so you can keep features current with future updates.

 The power output of a GME UHF CB radio determines its range and suitability for different purposes. 
 UHF CB radios are commonly used for communication in vehicles, boats, and outdoor activities such as camping and hiking. UHF CB radios’ three main power output options are 5-watt, 1-watt, and 0.5-watt. 
 5-watt UHF CB radios are the most powerful and have the most extended range of the three options. They are best suited for long-range communication and are often used by professional drivers, emergency services, and people who travel long distances. With a 5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 20 km (12 miles) in good conditions. 
 1-watt UHF CB radios are less powerful and have a shorter range than 5-watt radios. They are more commonly used for personal and short-range communication between vehicles or groups of people. With a 1-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 5 km (3 miles) in good conditions. 
 0.5-watt UHF CB radios are the least powerful and have the shortest range of the three options. They are best suited for short-range communication and are often used for personal communication between two people or within a small group. With a 0.5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 1 km (0.6 miles) in good conditions.

name: GME MT610G PLB Personal Locator Beacon
key_features: Compact, Lightweight Design | IP68 Ingress Protection | Integrated 72Ch GPS Receiver | 7 Year Battery Life | 121.5MHz Homing Transmitter | Cospas-Sarsat Certified (Class 2) | Easily Deployed in an Emergency | Inherently Buoyant
short: GME MT610G PLB Personal Locator Beacon
src:
GME MT610G PLB Personal Locator Beacon 
 
 
 Introducing the all-new Australian-Made 406MHz GPS Personal Locator Beacon from GME, the MT610G. 
 This Personal Locator Beacon (PLB) is GME’s most compact and lightweight design ever, complementing our market-leading range of Emergency Beacon products. 
 
 
 The MT610G PLB is a super-compact, lightweight PLB Beacon, offering an impressive 7-year battery life and a 6-year warranty. Featuring a ‘Non-Hazmat’ battery pack for ease of transport, the MT610G ensures you remain safe and connected wherever life takes you. 
 
 The MT610G PLB has been designed, engineered, and manufactured in Australia to provide the outdoor adventurer or lone worker with a GPS PLB solution that is compact, easy to use, and affordable. 
 
 Featuring an integrated 72-channel GPS receiver, zero warm-up time, high-intensity LEDs, IP68 Ingress Protection, and an inherently buoyant design, the compact size of the MT610G has not compromised the safety features. 
 
 The MT610G is designed to meet and exceed the latest international standards and is Cospas-Sarsat Class 2 certified. 
 
 GME is the only Australian manufacturer of PLB emergency beacons and has been designing, engineering, and manufacturing EPIRBs and PLBs for over 30 years. In that time, our beacons have been used to save hundreds of lives worldwide. 
 
 The MT610G PLB offers enhanced peace of mind for bushwalkers, 4WDers, remote workers, and aviators alike.

short: GME TX3350 5 WATT SUPER COMPACT UHF CB RADIO - LCD SPEAKER MIC. The TX3350 is a feature-packed Super Compact UHF CB radio including a SoundPath™ LCD speaker microphone. SoundPath™ is a unique solution that allows the full-function LCD microphone to house a built-in speaker, offering clear audio all within a compact and ergonomic design. SoundPath™ diverts the audio through a convex path around the microphone bollard, whilst maintaining the compact size of the unit.
