GME TX3350 5 WATT SUPER COMPACT UHF CB RADIO - LCD SPEAKER MIC 
 
 
 
 
 The GME TX3350 is a feature-packed Super Compact UHF CB radio, including a SoundPath™ LCD speaker microphone. 
 SoundPath™ is a unique solution that allows the full-function LCD microphone to house a built-in speaker, offering clear audio all within a compact and ergonomic design. SoundPath™ diverts the audio through a convex path around the microphone bollard, maintaining the unit's compact size. 
 The TX3350 offers a unique combination of the space-saving benefits of a Super Compact sized radio and full-function LCD speaker microphone, all in the palm of your hand. 
 This means that the radio can be discretely installed in almost any location within a vehicle without needing an extension speaker – perfect for modern vehicles where space is at a premium. 
 
 
 GME is an Australian-based company specialising in designing and manufacturing radio communication equipment. One of their popular product lines is UHF (Ultra High Frequency) radios, commonly used for two-way communication in various applications such as transport, mining, construction, and emergency services. 
 
UHF radios have several advantages over other radios, such as VHF (Very High Frequency) radios. One of the main benefits of UHF radios is their ability to transmit and receive signals through obstacles such as buildings and terrain, making them suitable for use in urban and rural areas. They also have a more extended range than VHF radios, which makes them ideal for long-distance communication. 
 
GME radios have various features, such as multiple channels, adjustable power settings, and waterproof designs. They can be used for multiple applications, such as communicating between vehicles on a construction site, coordinating logistics in a warehouse, or providing communication support during an emergency response. 
 
GME Australia is a company that specialises in designing and manufacturing radio communication equipment, including UHF radios and GME UHF Handhelds . These radios are popular due to their ability to transmit through obstacles and long-range capabilities. They are used in various applications, from transportation and construction to emergency services, and come with multiple features to suit different needs.

name: GME TX3500S 5 WATT COMPACT UHF CB RADIO WITH SCANSUITE
key_features: Rugged Die-cast Metal Chassis for Harsh Environments | ScanSuite™ - Digital Scanning Technology | Full Spectrum LCD Back-lighting | Digital Signal Processing | Dynamic Volume Control | CTCSS & DCS | 5 Year Warranty
short: GME TX3500S 5 WATT COMPACT UHF CB RADIO WITH SCANSUITE™ This Compact UHF CB radio is robust and reliable, ideal for serious commercial users. Featuring GME’s market-leading digital scanning technology, ScanSuite™, and an impressive feature list that includes Digital Signal Processing (DSP), Advanced Signal Management, Dynamic Volume Control, and 19 additional receive-only channels.
src:
GME TX3500S 5-WATT COMPACT UHF CB RADIO WITH SCANSUITE™ 
 
 
 
 
 Do you need a reliable and compact UHF CB radio for your next adventure? Look no further than the GME TX3500S. With its 5-watt power output, this radio provides clear and powerful communication even in remote areas. 
 
 
 What is a GME UHF? 
 
One of the standout features of the GME TX3500S is its ScanSuite technology. This allows you to scan for incoming transmissions on up to 50 channels, making staying connected with your group or other users in your area easier. The ScanSuite feature also includes a priority channel function, which allows you to prioritise essential channels for quick access. 
 
In addition to its scanning capabilities, the GME TX3500S includes various other valuable features. These include an adjustable squelch, an external speaker jack, a backlit LCD, and a rotary volume control. The radio is also built to withstand harsh environments, with a die-cast metal chassis and IP67 water and dust resistance rating. 
 
The GME TX3500S is easy to install and use, with a compact design that fits easily in your vehicle or backpack. It comes with a range of accessories, including a microphone, mounting bracket, and power cable, making it an excellent value for its price. 
 
Overall, the GME UHF 5 watt Compact CB Radio with ScanSuite is an excellent choice for anyone needing reliable and versatile communication. Whether exploring the great outdoors or working remotely, this radio has everything you need to stay connected and safe. 
 
 
 Synonymous with quality and reliability, the TX3500S is one of the most advanced 5 Watt UHF CB radios. 
Featuring GME’s market-leading digital scanning technology, ScanSuite™, and an impressive feature list that includes Digital Signal Processing (DSP), Advanced Signal Management, Dynamic Volume Control, and 19 additional receive-only channels. 
 
The TX3500S also includes CTCSS and DCS to minimise unwanted background noise and interruptions from other users. 
 
The radio’s compact size and unique slide-in mounting cradle makes installation simple. At the same time, the rugged die-cast metal chassis, intuitive user interface and controls ensure the radio is easy to use and delivers optimal performance in the harshest working conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Product Details 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 GME tx3500 Specs 
 
 Rugged Die-cast Metal Chassis for Harsh Environments 
 ScanSuite™ - Digital Scanning Technology 
 Full Spectrum LCD Back-lighting 
 Digital Signal Processing 
 Dynamic Volume Control 
 CTCSS & DCS 
 5 Year Warranty

 The power output of a GME UHF CB radio determines its range and suitability for different purposes. 
 UHF CB radios are commonly used for communication in vehicles, boats, and outdoor activities such as camping and hiking. UHF CB radios' three main power output options are 5-watt, 1-watt, and 0.5-watt. 
 
 5-watt UHF CB radios are the most powerful and have the most extended range of the three options. They are best suited for long-range communication and are often used by professional drivers, emergency services, and people who travel long distances. With a 5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 20 km (12 miles) in good conditions. 
 
 1-watt UHF CB radios are less powerful and have a shorter range than 5-watt radios. They are more commonly used for personal and short-range communication between vehicles or groups of people. With a 1-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 5 km (3 miles) in good conditions. 
 
 0.5-watt UHF CB radios are the least powerful and have the shortest range of the three options. They are best suited for short-range communication and are often used for personal communication between two people or within a small group. With a 0.5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 1 km (0.6 miles) in good conditions.

Enabled by Bluetooth® wireless technology, XRS™ Connect is the first of a new generation of connected UHF CB radios with unique features never seen before. They are the first ever UHF CB radios with App control, introducing new features such as creating and sharing scan lists and providing instant access to the entire Australian and New Zealand registered analogue frequency database. As with many other smart devices, XRS™ Connect products are software upgradable via the XRS™ Connect app, keeping users up-to-date with the latest features and technology. GME is committed to releasing a minimum of one new upgrade for XRS™ Connect per year to ensure our users always have access to the latest technology available. The XRS™ Connect 4WD Pack pairs the popular XRS-370C Compact UHF CB Radio, with the heavy duty AE4704B radome antenna, the perfect solution for those users looking for the ultimate communications setup for the rugged Australian outback. With Bluetooth® connectivity and the XRS™ Connect app , you can create and share scan lists, manage channel profiles, and access the full AU/NZ registered analogue frequency database from your phone. The system is software-upgradable , so you can keep features current with future updates.

 The power output of a GME UHF CB radio determines its range and suitability for different purposes. 
 UHF CB radios are commonly used for communication in vehicles, boats, and outdoor activities such as camping and hiking. UHF CB radios’ three main power output options are 5-watt, 1-watt, and 0.5-watt. 
 5-watt UHF CB radios are the most powerful and have the most extended range of the three options. They are best suited for long-range communication and are often used by professional drivers, emergency services, and people who travel long distances. With a 5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 20 km (12 miles) in good conditions. 
 1-watt UHF CB radios are less powerful and have a shorter range than 5-watt radios. They are more commonly used for personal and short-range communication between vehicles or groups of people. With a 1-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 5 km (3 miles) in good conditions. 
 0.5-watt UHF CB radios are the least powerful and have the shortest range of the three options. They are best suited for short-range communication and are often used for personal communication between two people or within a small group. With a 0.5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 1 km (0.6 miles) in good conditions.

 UHF CB radios are commonly used for communication in vehicles, boats, and outdoor activities such as camping and hiking. UHF CB radios’ three main power output options are 5-watt, 1-watt, and 0.5-watt. 
 5-watt UHF CB radios are the most powerful and have the most extended range of the three options. They are best suited for long-range communication and are often used by professional drivers, emergency services, and people who travel long distances. With a 5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 20 km (12 miles) in good conditions. 
 1-watt UHF CB radios are less powerful and have a shorter range than 5-watt radios. They are more commonly used for personal and short-range communication between vehicles or groups of people. With a 1-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 5 km (3 miles) in good conditions. 
 0.5-watt UHF CB radios are the least powerful and have the shortest range of the three options. They are best suited for short-range communication and are often used for personal communication between two people or within a small group. With a 0.5-watt UHF CB radio, you can communicate over a distance of up to 1 km (0.6 miles) in good conditions.

name: Haymen Reese Tow Bars
key_features: The Origins (Late 1940s/Early 1950s): The story begins with Eric Hayman. He was already a manufacturer, making bicycle spokes in a small factory in South Melbourne. The crucial turning point came when a friend asked him to build a tow bar for his new caravan. Eric, ever the entrepreneur, built two – one for his friend and another which he quickly sold at a country agricultural show. This was the serendipitous start of his tow bar business. | Focus on Tow Bars: The demand for tow bars grew, and Eric Hayman shifted his focus from bicycle spokes to manufacturing tow bars in earnest. | Partnership with Reese (1970s): A significant milestone occurred in 1972 when Reese, a large American towing products company, began working closely with Eric Hayman's business. This partnership was crucial, leading to the introduction of key technologies to the Australian market, notably weight distribution systems and the revolutionary 50mm 'square-hole' Hitch Receiver tow bar. Before this, most tow bars had fixed mounting points and weren't easily detachable. The 50mm square hitch became, and remains, the Australian industry standard. | Formation of Hayman Reese (1979): Seven years after the initial collaboration, a new entity called Hayman Reese was officially formed in 1979, with Eric Hayman appointed as its first Managing Director. | Growth and Innovation: Over the decades, Hayman Reese has continued to innovate. They've introduced products like: SmartClick Wiring Solutions: For quick and efficient wiring installation. | SmartPin: To reduce rattle from the tow bar. | SmartCODE: An intelligent towing solution that ensures seamless integration with modern vehicle's operating systems, particularly important with the increasing complexity of vehicle electronics. This system ensures that a vehicle's manufacturer-designed changes when towing (like blind spot detection with a trailer) are fully supported. | X-Bar: A specialized tow bar designed for four-wheel drives, offering improved departure angles and integrated recovery points. | EV and Hybrid Towbars: Adapting to the changing automotive landscape by developing tow bars for electric and hybrid vehicles.
short: A wide selection of Haymen Reese towbars to suit your vehicle.
src:
Haymen Reese - Compatible for All Vehicle Types 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
The story of Hayman Reese tow bars is a classic Australian tale of innovation and growth, starting from humble beginnings and evolving into an industry leader. 
 
Here's a breakdown of their history: 
 
 The Origins (Late 1940s/Early 1950s): The story begins with Eric Hayman. He was already a manufacturer, making bicycle spokes in a small factory in South Melbourne. The crucial turning point came when a friend asked him to build a tow bar for his new caravan. Eric, ever the entrepreneur, built two – one for his friend and another which he quickly sold at a country agricultural show. This was the serendipitous start of his tow bar business. 
 Focus on Tow Bars: The demand for tow bars grew, and Eric Hayman shifted his focus from bicycle spokes to manufacturing tow bars in earnest. 
 Partnership with Reese (1970s): A significant milestone occurred in 1972 when Reese, a large American towing products company, began working closely with Eric Hayman's business. This partnership was crucial, leading to the introduction of key technologies to the Australian market, notably weight distribution systems and the revolutionary 50mm 'square-hole' Hitch Receiver tow bar. Before this, most tow bars had fixed mounting points and weren't easily detachable. The 50mm square hitch became, and remains, the Australian industry standard. 
 Formation of Hayman Reese (1979): Seven years after the initial collaboration, a new entity called Hayman Reese was officially formed in 1979, with Eric Hayman appointed as its first Managing Director. 
 Growth and Innovation: Over the decades, Hayman Reese has continued to innovate. They've introduced products like: 
 
 SmartClick Wiring Solutions: For quick and efficient wiring installation. 
 SmartPin: To reduce rattle from the tow bar. 
 SmartCODE: An intelligent towing solution that ensures seamless integration with modern vehicle's operating systems, particularly important with the increasing complexity of vehicle electronics. This system ensures that a vehicle's manufacturer-designed changes when towing (like blind spot detection with a trailer) are fully supported. 
 X-Bar: A specialized tow bar designed for four-wheel drives, offering improved departure angles and integrated recovery points. 
 EV and Hybrid Towbars: Adapting to the changing automotive landscape by developing tow bars for electric and hybrid vehicles. 
 
 
 Manufacturing and Quality: Hayman Reese has maintained a strong commitment to local manufacturing in Australia. Their facilities, currently in Keysborough (having moved from South Melbourne and then Dandenong), house original drawings and tooling, allowing them to produce tow bars for a vast range of vehicles, from current models to classic cars. They hold significant quality certifications, including ISO 9001 and NATA accreditation for their testing facility. 
 Acquisitions and Ownership: Over the years, Hayman Reese has been part of larger entities. In 1996, it became a division of TriMas Corporation Pty Ltd. More recently, in 2019, Hayman Reese became part of the AutoPacific Group, an Australian-owned company. 
 
From building a tow bar for a friend to becoming a household name and an industry leader with over 70 years of experience, the Hayman Reese story is a testament to adapting to changing automotive technologies and a deep understanding of towing needs in Australia.

short: LED Traffic Control Marshalling Wand A marshalling wand is used by traffic controllers and other professionals who manage vehicular traffic to direct drivers to move their vehicles in a particular direction. It is a handheld device that emits a bright, focused beam of light that drivers can see from a distance, even in low-light conditions. The marshalling wand aims to improve safety by helping manage traffic flow and reduce accidents in high-risk areas.
src:
LED Traffic Control Marshalling Wand 
A marshalling wand is used by traffic controllers and other professionals who manage vehicular traffic to direct drivers to move their vehicles in a particular direction. It is a handheld device that emits a bright, focused beam of light that drivers can see from a distance, even in low-light conditions. The marshalling wand aims to improve safety by helping manage traffic flow and reduce accidents in high-risk areas. 
 
 
 
One of the primary benefits of using a marshalling wand is that it allows traffic controllers to remain at a safe distance from moving vehicles while still directing traffic. This can be particularly useful when traffic is heavy or drivers are unfamiliar with the area. Using a marshalling wand, traffic controllers can keep drivers moving safely and orderly without putting themselves or other people at risk. 
 
Another benefit of using a marshalling wand is that it can be more effective than other traffic control devices, such as traffic cones or signs. While these devices can be useful, they may not be visible to drivers from a distance or in low-light conditions. On the other hand, a marshalling wand emits a bright beam of light that is easily seen, making it an effective tool for directing traffic. 
 
Regarding safety, it is important to note that marshalling wands should only be used by trained professionals familiar with traffic control procedures and safety protocols. When used incorrectly or by untrained individuals, marshalling wands can pose a risk to the user and the drivers they are directing. For example, if the wand is not used correctly, drivers may become confused or distracted, leading to accidents. 
 
To ensure the safe use of marshalling wands, following all recommended safety procedures and guidelines is important. This includes using the wand in a well-lit area, wearing high-visibility clothing, and standing in a safe location away from moving vehicles. It is also important to use the wand in accordance with local traffic laws and regulations.

src:
OEM Switch Replacement type. 
 It’s now easier to achieve a clean factory finish following the launch of Narva’s new range of Switches OEM replacement push button switches, which are designed to fit into vehicle specific switch OEM blanks without needing modify your vehicle dash. 
Providing a professional switch OEM appearance, the buttons feature laser etched L.E.D symbols with back lit blue illumination, and are available for a number of ancillary lighting products including: L.E.D Light Bar, Driving Lights, Aux Lights, Roof Lights, Beacon and Universal/generic, ensuring there’s no mistaking one for the other.

name: Pioneer AVIC Z930DAB 7" Touch Screen
short: This product is available for special order | Turn around time is quick providing item is in stock.
src:
Pioneer AVIC Z930DAB showcases a new level of smartphone connectivity in the vehicle; boasting a 7” capacitive multi touch-screen with GPS Navigation, Android Auto and built-in Wi-Fi for Apple CarPlay™ Wireless, as well as wireless mirroring with compatible Android phones. 
 A host of entertainment options, including DAB+ digital radio, WebLink™, dual smartphone music streaming, CD/DVD, AM/FM tuner, Dual USB, HDMI input and a SD slot! 
 Impressive audio control is also available by using the Auto Time Alignment function, Auto EQ, Advanced Sound Retriever, 13 Band Graphic EQ, Specialized Audio Parts and can be connected to an external amplifier via the 3 x RCA Pre-Outs (4v). 

 APPLE CARPLAY™ (WIRELESS OR CABLE CONNECTION) 
 Apple CarPlay™ is a smarter, safer way to use your iPhone in the car that allows you to stay focused on the road and get directions, make calls, send and receive messages, and listen to music. You can even connect your compatible iPhone wirelessly to stay focused on the road. 

 ANDROID AUTO™ (WIRELESS OR CABLE CONNECTION) 
 Enjoy seamless connectivity and control of your Android smartphone in the car. Make phone calls, navigate with Google Maps, listen to music and send/receive SMS messages, all via a large touch-screen on your dashboard. Connect via wireless or cable connection to make any trip convenient. 
 Android Auto is compatible with Android phones running Android 5.0 (Lollipop) or later. Android Auto is compatible with most current Android smartphones, however to confirm whether your device is compatible, please speak our Support team. 

 BUILT-IN GPS NAVIGATION 
 All your GPS navigation essentials are built into this unit. Equipped with HERE maps, the AVIC-Z930DAB will direct you around Australia using voice guidance (Text-To-Speech), highlight important landmarks in 3D, Points of Interest and includes SUNA Traffic Management. 
 As a component of the Naviextras feature, the AVIC ensures that you have the most recent map database available for this receiver at the time of purchase. Customers who purchase Pioneer AVIC-Z930DAB from an authorised Pioneer dealer, are eligible to update to the latest available map database free of charge during the first 45 days of operation (from the unit’s first receipt of an active GPS signal). To update the map database, visit Naviextras’ website to download the Naviextras Toolbox. 
 Audio Visual Security can supply and install your product. 
 We also offer products that will complete your installation including steering wheel control adaptors, wiring harness, fascia panels, can bus integration, antenna adaptors and integrated reverse camera. 
 These products are vehicle specific and we recommend to be contacted with the vehicle details, so we can ensure the right products are ordered for your car.

Front & Rear Parking Sensors – Professionally Supplied, Fitted & Colour-Matched 
 Enhance your vehicle’s safety and parking convenience with front and rear parking sensors professionally supplied, colour-coded, and installed by Audio Visual Security . Our sensor systems are designed to provide precise obstacle detection, giving you confidence when parking, reversing, or navigating tight spaces. 
 Sensors are available in gloss black as standard , but can be painted to match your vehicle’s colour , ensuring a clean, factory-style finish. We cater to all vehicle types — from everyday sedans and SUVs to 4WDs, vans, and commercial fleets. 
 
 
 
 
 🔙 Rear Parking Sensors – With Advanced Tow Bar Recognition 
 Our Rear Parking Sensor System is equipped with 58K OE-quality sensors and smart tow bar auto-recognition technology , making it ideal for vehicles with protrusions like tow bars or spare tyres . The system comes standard with 4 sensors , but can be used as a 2-sensor setup depending on your needs.

 We offer professional painting and colour-matching services to blend the sensors seamlessly with your vehicle’s bodywork. All systems are professionally installed by our experienced team to ensure proper alignment, calibration, and reliable performance.

 Cars, SUVs, utes, vans, and 4WDs

 Customers seeking a discreet, OEM-style parking solution

name: REDARC 100AH GOBLOCK PORTABLE BATTERY SYSTEM
key_features: Rapid charge* | Green power priority** | Start Battery Recovery | Bluetooth to REDARC’s RedVision smartphone App (iOS + Android) | Suitable for any alternator type
short: GoBlock by REDARC is both a portable dual battery system and a flexible, portable power station, featuring REDARC’s market leading DC charging technology. This system is built for the most rugged and distant off-grid adventure, yet it is suitable for practically any vehicle, from cars and vans to 4WDs.
src:
REDARC 100AH GOBLOCK 
GoBlock by REDARC is both a portable dual battery system and a flexible, portable power station, featuring REDARC’s market leading DC charging technology. This system is built for the most rugged and distant off-grid adventure, yet it is suitable for practically any vehicle, from cars and vans to 4WDs. 
 Portable Dual Battery System 
 go explore. 
 - 100 Ah (1280 Wh) Lithium-Ion with DC-DC-AC charger inside (50Ah available) 
- Fast charges in 2 hours while you’re driving. 
- Plug in any 12v solar panel utilising in-built MPPT regulator. 
- Charge it up 4 ways - faster with an Anderson connection. 
- Monitor battery status via your phone. 
- Built tough - designed for those who love the outdoors - from 4WD to boating. 
- Made and tested to survive Australian conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 1. Trickle-Charge Input 
 - 7.5A 'overnight' charge rate. 
- Accessory cable supplied. 
- DC plug-pack supplied. 
 
 2. Merit Socket 
 - Perfect for lights, fridges or C-PAP. 
- 15A current limited. 
 
 3. Fridge Socket 
 - Screw type connection. 
- Priority output stays on longer 
to keep your fridge cold. 
- 15A current limited. 
 
 
 
 4. 12V Accessory Socket 
 - Perfect for low current DC loads. 
- 10A current limited. 
 
 5. Anderson™ Output 
 - Perfect for high current DC loads. 
- 50A current limited. 
 
 6. USB Type A 
 - 4 x 2.4A output ports. 
 
 
 
 Go tough 
GoBlock is built tough with a rugged exterior, prepared for almost any situation. 
 
With an IP52 protection rating, its inputs and outputs are neatly recessed with tough shields to protect them from hard knocks and inclement weather. 
 
The battery is made of high-quality lithium iron phosphate (LiFePO 4 ) cells, safely enclosed within the robust, fully sealed aluminium case. It is powerful with a longer lifetime and the cells deliver virtually full power until discharged. 
 
 
 Go safe 
GoBlock includes a Start Battery Recovery feature, when paired with the Smart Battery Recovery Cable , which enables you to safely charge a vehicle’s start battery, so you can get yourself or a friend out of trouble and on the road in just 15 minutes with this unique vehicle battery recovery capability. 
 Go wireless 
GoBlock connects via Bluetooth to REDARC’s RedVision smartphone App (iOS + Android) giving you remote access to the battery state of charge, system diagnostics and input source information, and the ability to activate the Start Battery Recovery mode. 
 
 
 
 Go in any vehicle 
 
GoBlock can be installed into vehicles with either standard or smart alternator systems, making it suitable for any vehicle installation**, while not being a permanently mounted dual battery system means you can move it between multiple vehicles offering greater value for money. 
 Features 
 
 Rapid charge* 
 Green power priority** 
 Start Battery Recovery 
 Bluetooth to REDARC’s RedVision smartphone App (iOS + Android) 
 Suitable for any alternator type 
 
 The GoBlock includes 
 
• 7.5A AC overnight mains charger 
 
• 7.5A DC Accessory socket charger 
 
• Access to the iOS and Android App 
 
 
 
 Optional accessories 
 
• 50A PowerDock with wiring kit (coming soon) 
 
• Start Battery Recovery cables (coming soon) 
 
 
 
Say goodbye to the homemade battery box and unleash portable power with GoBlock from REDARC. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
* Dependant on installation method and vehicle capability 
** When charging via PowerDock 
 
 The REDARC GoBlock is only available to customers within the Australian and New Zealand market at this time. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Are you ready for portable power unleashed? REDARC's GoBlock is not your average 12v battery box, it is a rugged and sophisticated portable dual battery system capable of powering your next great adventure. 
 
Hit the road and head to the great outdoors or enjoy a family day out with the peace of mind that no matter what, you will be packed with hours, even days of off-grid power. 
 
GoBlock® features 9 products in 1 compact unit plus 2 accessories in the box (12v accessory socket charger + mains AC wall charger) and over the air updates. 
 
 AC charger (overnight mains charger) 
 50A DC-DC Charger 
 50A MPPT Solar regulator 
 Quality LiFePO4 battery cells 
 REDARC proprietary battery management system 
 Battery monitoring via RedVision® 
 Start Battery Recovery capability, 
 Aluminium Battery Housing 
 Charging outlets for 12v accessory, Anderson and USB 
 
 Portable power unleashed 
Go beyond campgrounds and caravan parks with this unique lithium battery box that is capable of delivering fast and effective charge to run fridges, camp lights, drones, cameras and CPAP machines. 
 
This complete system features REDARC’s market leading DC DC charging technology that makes it capable of a rapid 50A recharge rate, meaning in around two hours you could have a massive 100Ah of power. 
 
This system is built tough for the most rugged and distant off-grid adventure, yet suitable for practically any vehicle, from cars and vans to 4WDs. It’s also ideal for vehicles that do not have enough room under the hood to install a traditional dual battery system, and can be paired with a solar panel and REDARC 350W pure sine wave inverter to provide endless power. 
 
 
 Specifications

name: Redarc 350w inverter 12V PURE SINE WAVE INVERTER
short: Appliances will run smoother and more efficiently, producing less heat and noise | Designed to run any 240 volt equipment | Take all the comforts of home whilst you travel | Pure Sine Wave output | Input and output are fully isolated | Multiple levels of protection; overload, short circuit and over temperature and load-controlled cooling fan
src:
redarc 350w inverter Pure Sine Wave inverter is a car inverter that makes it possible to plug in anywhere in Australia and get the type of 240V power you get at home. 
 Using a Pure Sine Wave output, the 350W inverter will ensure appliances run smoothly and efficiently, producing less heat and noise. Now slimmer and lighter, the REDARC 350W inverter has a wider input voltage in both 12V and 24V models, and works comfortably even in Australia’s harsh conditions. 
 With a 350W REDARC Pure Sine Wave Inverter you can run your phone and camera chargers, CD players, GPS, computers, bi-pap machines and laptops. 
 The 350W inverter features multiple levels of protection, including overload, short circuit and over-temperature and load controlled cooling fan, which is engaged when power consumption reaches a certain level. 
 You can take all the comforts of home whilst you travel, without fear of damaging your appliances, with the REDARC 350W inverter. 
 In addition, REDARC has an optional Remote on/off switch (REMOTE-RS), sold separately that allows the control of the inverter from a remote. It is designed so that the inverter can be installed out of sight and allows the control of the inverter from a more convenient location such as the inside of your caravan or campervan. The remote switch can be flush-mounted up to 8 metres away from the inverter.

key_features: Separate DC and solar charging inputs | Maximises the performance and life of your auxiliary battery | Simultaneous DC and solar charging with Green Power Priority | Suits 12V/24V standard and variable voltage/smart alternators | Suitable for AGM, GEL, standard lead acid, calcium and Lithium (LiFePO 4 ) batteries

src:
The REDARC BCDC1225D DUAL INPUT is a 12V 25A In-vehicle DC to DC battery charger. It features the next generation in REDARC In-vehicle charging technology, charging from Solar and DC inputs simultaneously. 
 
 
 
The REDARC BCDC1225D In-vehicle Battery Charger is the next generation in REDARC's DC to DC charging technology, with additional features that make it the most advanced dual battery charger on the market. 
 
Featuring a Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) solar regulator, the BCDC1225D will charge from both solar and the alternator simultaneously. And, with built-in 'Green Power Priority' it will select solar charging first, meaning less load on the alternator. 
 
Suitable for 12 or 24-volt vehicle systems, the unit will also work with either standard or variable/smart alternators. 
 
The BCDC1225D features the same patented charging profiles as it’s predecessor along with a new lithium charging profile making the unit suitable for charging AGM, Gel, Standard Lead Acid, Calcium and LiFePO 4 batteries. 
 
For most applications, the BCDC1225D is suitable for battery bank sizes of 75-200AH. For higher capacity needs of over 200AH, REDARC recommends the BCDC1240D . 
 
 Proven and Tested 
 
The award-winning technology in the BCDC has been independently verified and tested to ensure battery life is maximised, charging your battery to a proven 100%. 
 
Built in Australia and tested for our unique conditions, the DC to DC battery charger will work in the extreme heat of the Simpson Desert, up to 80°C and can handle deep water crossings at Cape York – water, dust and vibration are no match for this charger. 
 
If you’re heading out into the bush and want to get there and back again safely – you can trust REDARC. 
 
 Features 
 
 Separate DC and solar charging inputs 
 Maximises the performance and life of your auxiliary battery 
 Simultaneous DC and solar charging with Green Power Priority 
 Suits 12V/24V standard and variable voltage/smart alternators 
 Suitable for AGM, GEL, standard lead acid, calcium and Lithium (LiFePO 4 ) batteries 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Mounting Brackets 
 
In addition to the use of quality fuse kits , REDARC offer a range of vehicle-specific mounting brackets for our BCDC DC-DC Charger range. The 304 stainless steel bracket allows installation into the front of the vehicle for cooler airflow, ensuring optimal performance. They have been designed to fit existing mounting points in the vehicle.

name: Redarc Brake Controller | Tow-Pro Elite V3 Electric
short: Input (Operating) Voltage - 9 - 32VDC | Input Fuse Rating - 30A (Circuit Breaker) | Standby Current Draw - <10mA | Output System Voltage - 12VDC | Output Current Rating (Cont.) - 25A | Warranty - 2 Years
src:
Redarc Brake Controller | Tow-Pro Elite V3 Electric 
 When driving on an open highway with a trailer towed behind, you no longer have to control just one vehicle when braking - but also the weight and force of an additional 2.5 tonnes! For this reason, you must ensure you have an effective electric brake controller system when coming to a sudden halt. The REDARC Tow-Pro range delivers safe and effective trailer brake control systems to help you feel more secure on the road. 
 The Redarc Tow Pro Brake Controller is an advanced electric brake controller designed to provide a smooth and safe braking experience for anyone towing a trailer or caravan. We believe that it's the best brake controller on the market. The Tow-Pro Elite V3 is a proportional brake controller, which means it applies the brakes on the trailer proportionally to the braking force applied to the towing vehicle. This ensures a smooth and consistent braking experience, reducing the risk of jackknifing or losing control. 
 One of the key benefits of the Redarc Tow-Pro Brake Controller is its user-friendly interface. The controller features a simple rotary dial that allows you to easily adjust the braking force, making it easy to find the optimal setting for your particular setup. Additionally, the controller features an easy-to-read LED display that provides information about the controller's status, including the level of braking force being applied and any diagnostic information. 
 Redarc is a trusted name in the industry, with a reputation for producing high-quality, reliable products. The Tow-Pro Electric Brake Controller is no exception. It features durable construction and a range of safety features to ensure you can rely on it in any situation; it's the only brake controller you will ever need. 
 
 Check out the video below to see what comes in the box as we highlight and explain some of the key features offered by this product. 
 
 
 Smooth braking capability 
 Continual software upgrades have been included in the Tow-Pro Elite, which results in smoother braking for motorists towing the broadest range of caravans, trailers, boat trailers and horse floats. 
 
 Compatible with all modern and older vehicles 
 When used with the recommended REDARC wiring kits, the Tow-Pro Elite ensures compatibility with all new vehicle technology and features Active Calibration. It works in 12V vehicles with Electric or Electric/Hydraulic trailer brakes and in 24V vehicles with electric brakes without additional adaptors. 
 Electric/Hydraulic brakes behind 24V vehicles require the EB24A adaptor. When installed as per instructions, It ensures an ADR-approved installation. AL-KO has also approved it for use with their ESC and by Dexter with their DSC systems. 
 
 An easy to install Brake Controller 
 The Redarc Tow Pro Elite V3 features a reduction in the size and installation of the user interface (remote head). Changing the shape, length, size and depth of the remote head will allow a quicker and easier installation of the Redarc Tow Pro Elite. It also ensures the remote head fits into thicker and curved dashes in modern vehicles and trucks. 
 
 
 Vehicle-specific installation accessories 
 The Redarc Tow Pro Elite uses the recommended wiring kits to work with all modern vehicles. Selected TPSI switch inserts for many popular cars make for a very neat, quick installation, giving the user interface a “factory” look (a single control knob). 
 REDARC’s range of vehicle-specific wiring kits offers quick and easy installation into various vehicle makes and models, including the TPWKIT-012 specifically required for the Ford Ranger/Everest range and the universal TPWKIT-013 and TPWKIT-014 wiring kits, suitable for most other cars. 
 For the installer who prefers to use their wires, we strongly recommend including the EPDK-001 protection device blocking module for any modern vehicle with CAN Bus communications or cruise control.

 The Redarc Tow Pro Elite V Electric Brake Controller is an advanced electric brake controller with a smooth and consistent braking experience, an easy-to-use interface, and easy installation. If you're in the market for an electric brake controller for your vehicle, the Tow-Pro Elite V3 is an excellent choice. 
 
 Redarc Tow Pro Electric Brake Controllers 
With proportional mode inertia sensing for highway commutes, you can ensure your electric trailer brake controller will initiate safe, controlled braking when the time arises. The REDARC Tow-Pro™ Electric Brake Controllers are designed to suit most common trailer braking applications. Our sleek innovative designs also require minimal dash space and are simple to install and operate. 
 The award-winning REDARC Tow-Pro™ Elite is the first to offer two types of braking in one unit. The Redrarc Tow Pro Elite electric brake controller uses proportional and user-controlled modes and features Active Calibration. 
 Additionally, the Towpro Elite V Electric Brake Electric Brake Controller offers a single user-controlled mode of trailer braking. Adjust the required force your towed vehicle requires with the turn of a control knob whenever needed.

name: Redarc Handbrake Alarm HBA1224
key_features: Suitable for all vehicles | Built-in LED warning light and internal piezo buzzer plus external output | Designed for universal fitment | Output latches on once triggered | Can be used in various other installations (headlight alarm) | *The doorframe switch is the switch mounted in the doorframe that switches on the cab light when the door is opened.
short: Warns you when you forget to apply the handbrake
src:
The HBA1224 Redarc Handbrake Alarm is used in a 12V or 24V automotive system. It monitors the handbrake switch and the doorframe switch* to provide audible and visual warning if the door is opened while the handbrake is not applied. Once the alarm starts, it stays latched on until the handbrake is applied (even if the door is closed again). 
 The HBA1224 improves vehicle safety as it: 
 Reduces the risk of the vehicle being accidentally left unattended without the handbrake on. 
If used with external relay/horn, it can provide a warning to anyone in the general area, that a vehicle has been left without it’s handbrake on. 
 Hummingbird Electronics offer an optional external “Compact Combination Warning LED and Buzzer” which is perfectly suited for REDARC’s Hand Brake Alarm. Available in both 12 and 24 volt variants. 
 
 Benefits 
 
 Warns you when you forget to apply the handbrake 
 Security against damage caused by runaway vehicles 
 Horn output ensures others will be warned 
 A mandatory health and safety installation on many mining site vehicles 
 
 Features 
 
 Suitable for all vehicles 
 Built-in LED warning light and internal piezo buzzer plus external output 
 Designed for universal fitment 
 Output latches on once triggered 
 Can be used in various other installations (headlight alarm) 
 *The doorframe switch is the switch mounted in the doorframe that switches on the cab light when the door is opened.

name: REDARC MANAGER30 BMS1230S3
key_features: Multi Stage AC-DC Battery Charger | Multi Stage DC to DC Charger | Maximum Power Point Tracking Solar Regulator | Battery Monitor | Dual Battery Isolator | Load Disconnect Controller | Super quiet operation | Charges AGM, Gel, Calcium content, VRLA, Standard Lead Acid and Lithium (LiFePO 4 ) batteries | Tested to mains power safety standards in Australia
short: The new REDARC Manager30 S3 is a 30A state-of-the-art battery management system designed to charge and maintain auxiliary batteries by incorporating AC, DC and solar inputs, ideal for recreational vehicles, caravans, and camper trailers with multiple battery banks.
src:
The new REDARC Manager30 S3 is a 30A state-of-the-art battery management system designed to charge and maintain auxiliary batteries by incorporating AC, DC and solar inputs, ideal for recreational vehicles, caravans, and camper trailers with multiple battery banks. 
 
 
 
 
 
The next generation Manager30 S3 model is the complete battery management system for charging auxiliary batteries used in recreational automotive and marine applications. The dual battery system incorporates AC, DC and solar inputs to achieve the best charge for an auxiliary battery. 
 
Developed with ease of installation in mind, The Manager30 is compatible with all vehicles and alternator systems including variable voltage alternators. 
 
Whether you’re charging Lead Acid, Gel, Calcium, AGM or Lithium Iron Phosphate batteries, The Manager30 represents a complete DC to DC charging and maintenance solution. If you’re charging one auxiliary battery or more, The Manager30 will ensure they’re always fully charged, providing peace of mind when battery charge provides the power source for the comforts of home whilst travelling around Australia. 
 
The Manager30 operates like 6 separate products, it charges an auxiliary battery from the vehicle while on the move, it’s a 240 volt charger, a solar regulator, a battery isolator, a load disconnect controller, all with a remote battery monitor, making it market leading. 
 
 
 
 Charging lithium batteries 
 
Lithium batteries have improved storage capacity relative to size and weight. They do however require specific charging conditions in order to operate correctly and the battery itself must have an in-built cell management system. REDARC have designed a charging profile within The Manager30 to complement these in-built systems. 
 
 
 
 Green power priority 
 
The Manager30 is designed to charge an auxiliary battery from multiple sources simultaneously. If 12 volt solar power is available, solar power will be used before topping up the output charging current from another source mains (if available) or DC vehicle power when on the move. 
 
 
 
 MPPT solar regulator 
 
The built-in Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) solar regulator allows The Manager30 to deliver the maximum amount of power from portable solar panels, even during low light conditions. 
 
 
 
 Remote monitor 
 
Designed to show you auxiliary battery information and charge status. You can customise how your battery is charged and monitor where the charge is coming from. A user-friendly, graphical display monitor lets you know what’s going on, keeping you in control at all times. 
 
 
 
 Features 
 
 Multi Stage AC-DC Battery Charger 
 Multi Stage DC to DC Charger 
 Maximum Power Point Tracking Solar Regulator 
 Battery Monitor 
 Dual Battery Isolator 
 Load Disconnect Controller 
 Super quiet operation 
 Charges AGM, Gel, Calcium content, VRLA, Standard Lead Acid and Lithium (LiFePO 4 ) batteries 
 Tested to mains power safety standards in Australia

short: Options starting from $599 inc gst , depending on vehicle make, model and year. In House Installation Available The Rhino-Rack Backbone is the next level of evolution for your four-wheel drive. Carry more gear and take your exploration to a new level. This product is vehicle dependant.
src:
THE RhinoRack BACKBONE. HOW IT WORKS... 
 Evolution is simple. It’s a small change over time to adapt to the needs of the species. That’s what the Rhino-Rack Backbone is all about - the Evolution of your 4WD. The Rhino-Rack Backbone is fitted to the factory roof mounting points or directly to the roof of your vehicle and distributes the weight of your luggage more evenly through the body of your vehicle. It’s ingeniously simple and perfectly complements our full range of Pioneer platforms. 
 

 THE BREAKDOWN 
 The Backbone is one concept that comes in two systems and a variety of combinations to suit your needs and preferences. With up to 8 contact points the backbone system distributes the load over the vehicle. Additionally, the Rhino-Rack Backbone enables you to carry up to 331lbs/150kg on some vehicles. Non-corrosive made of strong and durable stainless steel or cast aluminum with a black powder coated finish to match seamlessly with our Pioneer Systems. 
 

 STRENGTH: SURVIVAL OF THE FITTEST 
 Tested and proven. The Rhino-Rack Backbone has been tested to International Standards ISO PAS 11154-2006 Road Roof Load Carriers and Australian Standards AS1235-2000 Road Vehicle Roof Bar Testing. This is a product you can depend on from a company that you know and trust. With more than 22 years in the industry, Rhino-Rack has been TRIED, TESTED and OFF ROAD PROVEN. Our name, like our products, is synonymous with strength and the survival of the fittest. 
 

 TOUGH LOOKS 
 We know appearances aren't as important than function, however, both are desirable. The Rhino-Rack Backbone is designed to provide the maximum load carrying capacity for your vehicle while enhancing its aesthetics. It’s bold, solid construction makes for a striking appearance that is guaranteed to turn heads; and give you complete confidence that this system will go with you and your vehicle anywhere, and take on any challenge you throw at it.

Safety: The RDL5294 Series enhances safety for drivers and other road users by illuminating the road ahead. The increased visibility enables drivers to identify potential hazards earlier, react promptly, and make informed decisions, ultimately reducing the likelihood of accidents.

Roadvision’s RSM5500 Series modules take safety lighting to another level, ideal for all your automotive, industrial and agricultural requirements. 
 
A surface-mounted strobe or beacon is a warning light used on vehicles to improve visibility and alert other drivers to the vehicle's presence. The strobe or beacon emits a bright, flashing light that can be seen from a distance, even in low light or inclement weather conditions. In the case of a traffic management vehicle, a surface-mounted strobe or beacon that emits an orange flash can be particularly useful in improving safety on the road. 
 
One of the primary benefits of using a surface-mounted strobe or beacon with an orange flash is that drivers can easily see it from a distance, even in bright sunlight or during heavy rain or snow. The orange colour is highly visible and can be recognised quickly, which makes it an effective tool for alerting drivers to the presence of a traffic management vehicle. 
 
Another benefit of using a surface-mounted strobe or beacon is improving safety by reducing the risk of accidents. By making the vehicle more visible to other drivers, the strobe or beacon can help prevent collisions and ensure that drivers know the vehicle's location and movements. 
 
It is important to note that using a surface-mounted strobe or beacon must comply with local traffic laws and regulations. In some areas, using flashing lights on vehicles is prohibited, or specific rules regarding strobe or beacon lights may exist. It is essential to check with local authorities to ensure that using a surface-mounted strobe or beacon is legal and permissible. 
 
In terms of installation, a surface-mounted strobe or beacon is typically mounted on the vehicle's roof, bumper bars or a specialised mounting bracket. The strobe or beacon may be wired directly into the vehicle's electrical system or powered by a separate battery or power source.

src:
Get Better Sound with Stinger Roadkill – Premium Sound Deadening for Cars 
 Take your car audio system to the next level with Stinger Roadkill , the ultimate automotive sound deadening solution . Whether you're using factory or aftermarket speakers, Roadkill dramatically improves bass response , reduces vibration , and eliminates panel rattle — giving you clearer, louder, and more enjoyable sound. 
 
 
 
 
 🚘 Why Your Car Needs Stinger Roadkill 
 Even high-end speakers can’t perform at their best when mounted on thin, vibrating car panels. Factory door panels and speaker cavities are made from lightweight metal, which resonates and rattles under heavy bass or loud music. 
 Stinger Roadkill mass-loads these surfaces, turning them into solid, acoustically tuned panels that deliver tighter bass and cleaner sound — even with your factory speakers!

 💥 Improves speaker performance and bass response 
 
 
 🔇 Reduces road noise and panel vibration 
 
 
 🌡️ Helps regulate interior temperature 
 
 
 🛠️ Easy DIY installation with self-adhesive backing 
 
 
 🧰 Designed for application on cold rolled steel (CRS), e-coated & clear-coated panels 
 
 
 🔊 Works with factory and aftermarket car audio systems

 Clean the surface using wax & grease remover or methylated spirits. 
 
 
 Cut sheets to size to fit doors, floors, or boot panels. 
 
 
 Apply and press firmly into place. 
 
 
 Use the Stinger Roadkill Roller Pack to secure and mold the material.

 Reducing engine & road noise in commercial setups 
 
 
 DIY or professional car audio installations

Thinkware Dash Cam F790 paired with the Multec20 Rear Camera 
The Thinkware Dash Cam F790 , paired with the Multec20 Rear Camera, is an excellent solution for mining and traffic management vehicles that require reliable and robust video recording capabilities. This dash cam is designed to withstand the harsh conditions of mining and traffic management environments, providing clear and high-quality video footage to ensure the safety of workers and the general public. 
 
One of the key features of the Thinkware Dash Cam F790 is its advanced Sony STARVIS sensor, which provides exceptional low-light sensitivity and captures clear footage even in dark or poorly lit environments. This makes it an ideal choice for mining and traffic management vehicles that may operate in low-light or nighttime conditions. 
 
In addition to its excellent video quality, the Thinkware Dash Cam F790 also offers a wide range of features to enhance its functionality and usability. These include built-in GPS, Wi-Fi connectivity, and advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS) that provide real-time alerts and warnings to drivers. 
 
 
 
The Multec20 Rear Camera is a perfect complement to the Thinkware Dash Cam F790, providing additional coverage and visibility for mining and traffic management vehicles. This camera is designed to withstand extreme temperatures and harsh conditions, ensuring that it will continue to operate effectively in even the most challenging environments. 
 
 
 Together, the Thinkware Dash Cam F790 and Multec20 Rear Camera provide a comprehensive video recording solution for mining and traffic management vehicles. With their robust construction, advanced features, and exceptional video quality, they are an excellent investment for any organization looking to improve safety and security in their operations. 
 
 
Dash cams have become an increasingly popular tool for enhancing safety and security in a wide range of industries, including mining and traffic management. These small, inconspicuous cameras can provide valuable video footage of accidents, incidents, and other events, helping organizations to identify and address potential risks and hazards. 
 
In mining operations, dash cams can be used to monitor the movements of heavy equipment, track the progress of excavation work, and provide valuable insight into the conditions and environment of mining sites. They can also be used to record incidents and accidents, allowing organizations to identify and address potential safety hazards and improve worker safety. 
 
Similarly, in traffic management, dash cams can provide valuable video footage of accidents, near-misses, and other incidents on the road. This footage can be used to improve driver behavior, identify potential road hazards, and develop strategies for improving traffic flow and reducing congestion. 
 
In addition to improving safety and security, dash cams can also provide valuable insights into operational efficiency and performance. By analyzing video footage of mining and traffic management operations, organizations can identify areas where improvements can be made, optimize workflows, and reduce downtime and inefficiencies. 
 
Overall, the importance of dash cams in mining and traffic management cannot be overstated. These cameras provide a valuable tool for enhancing safety and security, improving operational efficiency, and reducing the risks and hazards associated with these industries. As such, they are an essential investment for any organization looking to improve their operations and ensure the safety of their workers and the general public. 
 
 
 5 CHANNEL 
 DASH CAM SOLUTION 
The optional Thinkware MULTMOD Multiplexer Module transforms Thinkware F790 Dash Cam into a five channel dash cam solution. The module connects to the rear input of the dash cam and allows up to four additional cameras to be connected. The recorded footage from the additional cameras merge together to provide a single split screen 1080P FHD video file. 
 
 
 
 
 SUPER NIGHT VISION 
 SUPER NIGHT VISION 3.0 uses a combination of low-light recording technology and High Dynamic Range to improve night time performance. The F790 can handle low-light environments, such as dark alleys or parking lots, and even lens flare effects and that affect night time footage. Together with Image Signal Processing (ISP) technology, the F790 can record a clear, visible videos in any situation- while driving or parked.

The Thinkware MULTEC20 1080P Full HD Rear External Camera with 20M Extension is designed for recording behind the vehicle and is to be used in conjunction with F200PRO, F790, T700 Dash Cam models and the MULTMOD Multiplexer Module. The IP68 rated weatherproof camera mounts on the exterior at the rear of the vehicle, making it the perfect addition for RV owners or commercial drivers who need an externally mounted recording solution that cannot be accomplished with a traditional dash cam. Its 1080P Full HD resolution combined with a 126 degree viewing angle and built-in IR light, produces clear footage even in extremely low-light conditions. name: Thinkware F790 32GB with MULTEC5 1080P Full HD External Rear Camera (With 5M Extension)
short: Front Dash Camera 1080P Full HD | External 1080P Full HD IP68 rated weatherproof | 32GB Card | 5M Extension cable
src:
Thinkware F790 32GB with MULTEC5 1080P Full HD External Rear Camera (With 5M Extension) 
 Housed in an edgy modern design, the THINKWARE F790 Dash Cam captures 1080P Full HD resolution front and rear. The Advanced Driver Assistance System helps you to stay safe on the roads and the Safety Camera Alerts will prompt you to slow down when approaching a Speed or Red Light Camera. With multiple recording options including Time Lapse and Energy Save Park Modes, this dash cam offers 24/7 protection, even when you're not around. 
 
 The Thinkware MULTEC5 1080P Full HD Rear External Camera with 5M Extension is designed for recording behind the vehicle. 
 
 The IP68 rated weatherproof camera mounts on the exterior at the rear of the vehicle, making it the perfect addition for RV owners or commercial drivers who need an externally mounted recording solution that cannot be accomplished with a traditional dash cam. Its 1080P Full HD resolution combined with a 126 degree viewing angle and built-in IR light, produces clear footage even in extremely low-light conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 HIGH DEFINITION 
 VIDEO QUALITY 
Equipped with CMOS Image Sensors, this lets you record crisp and clear full 1080p HD front and rear cam videos be it day or night time. It sports a 144-degree front & 160-degree rear wide angle lens view that minimises blind spots around the vehicle. 
 
 
 
 *Rear Cam optional extra for single camera models, included in the 2 channel kits. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DUAL 
 CHANNEL 
The F790 has a second camera input, allowing the addition of an optional camera. 
The second camera options include: 
 
 
 
 1080P FHD Internal Rear Window Camera 
1080P FHD Internal Infrared Cabin Camera 
1080P FHD External Rear Camera 
1080P FHD External Side Camera 
 
 
 
The F790 is available as a pack with the Internal Rear Camera included, and also available as front cam only so you can select the optional camera to suit your vehicle and application. 
 View the MODELS tab for optional camera models. 
 
 
 
 
 5 CHANNEL 
 DASH CAM SOLUTION 
The optional Thinkware MULTMOD Multiplexer Module transforms Thinkware F790 Dash Cam into a five channel dash cam solution. The module connects to the rear input of the dash cam and allows up to four additional cameras to be connected. The recorded footage from the additional cameras merge together to provide a single split screen 1080P FHD video file. 
For more information on the Multiplexer Module CLICK HERE 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 MOUNTING SOLUTION 
 WITH SLEEK DESIGN 
 The Thinkware Dash Cam “PLUGIN” mounting system offers a simple solution for mounting and dismounting your dash cam. 
The GPS receiver and all cable connections are integrated into the adhesive mounting bracket. 
The cable connecting the power and rear camera is a single lead coming out of the back of the cradle, making for a more permanent and professional installation. 
 
 *Take caution when unplugging the dash cam main unit from the connecting mechanism as it is tightly fastened onto the main unit. 
 
 **Do not twist the dash cam main unit as this may cause damage to the connecting mechanism. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 STATE-OF-THE-ART 
 VIDEO ENHANCEMENTS 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 High Dynamic Range 
 HDR (High Dynamic Range) multi-exposure captures maximum image detail in high contrast scenes and corrects exposure levels when a subject is too dark or too bright. Such scenes include challenging low-light conditions when you want to capture license plates against the reflection of bright LED headlights. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Night Time Picture Quality Correction 
Images from videos recorded at night on poorly-lit avenues, streets or roads generally don’t look that lucid. But with this, it’s an entirely different story. It’s armed with enhancement sensors that make brightness, colour and noise cancellation controls possible each time ; hence, vivid video recordings of your evening drive. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Automatic Exposure 
A sudden rise of light exposure brought about by intense sunlight or headlight beams from oncoming vehicles, or poor lighting in a tunnel may give any ordinary dash cam trouble capturing clear images but not THINKWARE dash cams. They come with an automatic light exposure function that controls light exposure levels for crisp footage at all times. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 SUPER NIGHT VISION 
 3.0 
 SUPER NIGHT VISION 3.0 uses a combination of low-light recording technology and High Dynamic Range to improve night time performance. The F790 can handle low-light environments, such as dark alleys or parking lots, and even lens flare effects and that affect night time footage. Together with Image Signal Processing (ISP) technology, the F790 can record a clear, visible videos in any situation- while driving or parked. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DEWARPING 
 VIDEO TECHNOLOGY 
 Dewarping technology allows the F790’s front camera to deliver a close-to-real picture of the vehicle’s front view with minimal distortion. The F790 can analyze incoming video frames and tune the video to show an accurate representation of the road without distortions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 VARIOUS AUTONOMOUS 
 RECORDING MODES 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Continuous 
Recording Mode 
Automatically activates as soon as the engine starts, this function lets you record videos that are saved in one-minute segments via an auto-looping mechanism. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Event Recording 
Mode 
Active Impact Monitoring System, made possible by the built-in three-axis G-Sensor, automatically stores video data 10 seconds prior and after a collision. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Manual 
Recording Mode 
Securely save a video file with a press of a button. The video will save in the manual record folder which will not be overwritten by the continuous record mode files. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Advanced Parking Surveillance 
Provides full surveillance capabilities whenever your vehicle is parked. It records motion and impacts while the vehicle is parked. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio / Voice 
Recording 
Not only does it capture vivid videos, but it also records crystal-clear audio. The microphone can also be turned off if sound recording is not required. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ENERGY SAVE & TIME LAPSE 
 PARK MODES 
 Energy Save Park Mode will reduce power consumption by 1/3 less, while giving you as much as 3x longer video recording capability compared to standard parking mode. When you are away for vacation or leaving your car for a long period of time, Energy Save Parking Mode is the recommended solution. 
 
 
 
Important clips may get deleted due to insufficient memory space during long continuous recordings, especially in standard parking mode. Time Lapse Mode records 2 frames per second reducing the overall size of the video file. This allows video recordings in parking mode to continue up to 16 times longer compared to other dash cams. 
 
 *Dash cam must be hardwired to the vehicle with the included hard wire kit to enable park modes. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 BUILT-IN WIFI 
 SMARTPHONE APP CONNECTIVITY 
 Connect your Thinkware Dash Cam directly via Wifi to your iOS or Android Smartphone using the THINKWARE™ DASH CAM LINK App. View footage, download recordings and manage dash cam settings all from your smartphone. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Download the 
THINKWARE DASH CAM LINK smartphone app FREE 
 
 (Use this app for iOS11 or 12) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 BEST SIGNAL RANGE 
 VIA DUAL BAND WI-FI 
 The F790 has built-in Wi-Fi connectivity, supporting both 2.4GHz and 5GHz bandwidths. 
Dual-band wireless technology enables the best connectivity experience in different environments. 
 
2.4GHz has a longer range and can be captured from a farther distance. The longer range network also captures other devices thus preferred in undisrupted environments. 
 
5GHz has a shorter range and can offer better performance with a higher bandwidth. The shorter range network avoids interferences thus preferred for a less congestive experience within shorter distances. 
 
 *Download speed and connection experience can differ according to smartphone specifications and telecommunications conditions. 
 
 **5GHz band may be more suitable for busy and densely populated cities due to possible disruptions in telecommunications environments.

name: Thinkware IVOLTMN (iVOLT mini) External Dash Cam Battery Pack
key_features: High capacity 4500mAh LiFePo4 battery | Up to 20 hours for 1-channel dashboard camera (forward-facing camera only) (2.9Wh) | Up to 16 hours for 2-channel dashboard camera (front-facing and rear-facing camera) (3.5Wh) | Approximately 50 minute charge time | Fuse taps for easy wiring into fuse box | Output harness supplies Constant, Accessories and Earth to device | Korean Made Reliability with 1-Year Warranty
short: COMPATIBLE WITH: All THINKWARE dash cam series | INPUT POWER: 12.0V - 15.5V / 10A MAX | OUTPUT VOLTAGE / CURRENT: 12.0V - 14.6V / 2.0A MAX | CHARGING VOLTAGE / CURRENT: 14.6V / 7A (Hardwire) | 14.6V / 5A (Plug & Play) | CHARGING TIME: About 45 minutes (Hardwire) | About 60 minutes (Plug & Play) | USAGE TIME: 1ch: about 20 hours (2.9Wh) | 2ch: about 16 hours (3.5Wh) | BATTERY: LiFePo4 (Lithium iron phosphate) | BATTER CAPACITY: 12.8V 4,500mAh 57.6Wh
src:
Thinkware IVOLTMN Increase the duration of parking surveillance mode and put less strain on your vehicle battery by adding the Thinkware iVolt Mini External Battery Pack (IVOLTMN) to your dash cam installation. iVolt Mini utilises a LiFePo4 (Lithium iron phosphate) battery which is safe for in-vehicle use as it is designed to withhold extreme temperatures. It features a super-fast charge rate of just 45 minutes while driving and simply hardwires between the dash cam and vehicle fuse box. When you open your iVolt Mini package, you will be provided with 2 Cables and fuse taps, in addition you will also need a standard Thinkware Hardwiring Cable HWC (sold separately). 
 
 Extended Parking Mode 
 When Hardwired the Dash Cam will record in Parking Mode for approximately 8 hours (depending on vehicle’s battery and the voltage cut-off setting) before powering down to save power. With the iVolt Mini, your 1 Channel Dash Cam can run for 20 hours, or if you have a 2 Channel Dash Cam, 16 hours in Parking Mode before needing to recharge the battery pack. 
 Safe for Luxury Vehicles 
 If you own a Luxury Vehicle such as a BMW, battery drainage not only means replacing the vehicle’s battery but it can also require the dealership to reset the vehicle’s electronics, which can turn into an extremely expensive fix. By using the iVolt Mini Battery Pack, you will still be able to use our Advanced Parking Mode risk-free. 
 Avoid Wear and Tear 
 With a Hardwired Dash Cam, the constant discharge on the battery over a long period of time can cause wear and tear. The iVolt Mini Battery Pack only draws power to charge when you are driving the vehicle, which prevents damage to the vehicle’s battery over time. With the ignition off, the Dash Cam relies solely on the Battery Pack for power, eliminating the need to draw power from the vehicle’s battery completely. 
 Do I Need a Battery Pack? 
 Thinkware Dash Cams offer a few different methods in which the device is powered. All Thinkware Dash Cams come standard with a built-in voltmeter and battery protection settings to ensure you will not return to your vehicle with a dead battery. These Voltage Settings can be utilised with the Hardwiring Kit to protect your battery when using Parking Mode. However, if you wish to record an extended amount of Parking Footage, or if you have a Luxury Vehicle/Small Vehicle Battery the Thinkware iVolt Mini Battery Pack may be the right choice for you. 
 
 
 
 
 
 Features:

name: Thinkware Multmod Multiplexer Module
key_features: 1080P FHD Internal Rear Window Camera (F2PT7RA) | 1080P FHD Internal Infrared Cabin Camera (MULTIR) | 1080P FHD External Rear Camera (MULTEC5 - 5M Cable / MULTEC20 - 20M Cable) | 1080P FHD External Side Camera (MULTSC)
short: Thinkware Multmod Multiplexer Module The Thinkware MULTMOD Multiplexer Module transforms the Thinkware F200PRO, F790 and T700 Dash Cam models into a five-channel dash cam solution.
src:
Thinkware Multmod Multiplexer Module 
The Thinkware MULTMOD Multiplexer Module transforms the Thinkware F200PRO, F790 and T700 Dash Cam models into a five-channel dash cam solution. The module connects to the rear input of the dash cam and allows up to four additional cameras to be connected. The recorded footage from the additional cameras merge together to provide a single split screen 1080P FHD video file. 
 
 Optional cameras (sold separately) compatible with this system include: 
 
 1080P FHD Internal Rear Window Camera (F2PT7RA) 
 1080P FHD Internal Infrared Cabin Camera (MULTIR) 
 1080P FHD External Rear Camera (MULTEC5 - 5M Cable / MULTEC20 - 20M Cable) 
 1080P FHD External Side Camera (MULTSC) 
 
The optional cameras can be used in any combination, providing a wide range of vehicle surveillance solutions. Applications include standard vehicles for drivers who want full surveillance around their vehicle, taxi drivers who want internal and external surveillance, truck fleets that want to monitor driver behaviour as well as the outside of the vehicle and the ever-expanding fleet of delivery vans. 
 
 
 Specs: 
 
 
 
 Compatible with Thinkware F200PRO, F790 and T700 Dash Cam models 
 Resolution: FHD (1920x1080) 30FPS (outputs single video file, supports 1-4 recordings per file) 
 Key: Piano Code Switch (No. of recording channels is set by switch setting): 
 
 Mode 1: 2CH Left - Right Synthesis 
 Mode 2: 2CH Top - Bottom Synthesis 
 Mode 3: 3CH Synthesis 
 Mode 4: 4CH Synthesis 
 
 
 Power: 
 
 Voltage: DC 12 V - 24V 
 Yellow Cable: Power (Constant - Parking Mode / Accessory - No Parking Mode) 
 Black Cable: Ground 
 
 
 AV-IN (for connection to optional cams): 
 
 Total Inputs: 4 (CAM 1, CAM 2, CAM 3, CAM 4) 
 Connection: 2.5 Stereo-Jack Type 
 Cable Length: 15cm (per connection) 
 
 
 AV-OUT (for connection to dash cam) 
 
 Connection: 2.5 Stereo-Jack Type 
 
 
 Temperature Range: 
 
 Operating: -10C to 60C 
 Storage: -20C to 70C 
 
 
 Dimensions: 65W x 65D x 17.5H mm 
 Weight: 40G 
 Note: 
 
 Up to 4 cameras can be connected to the module. A single FHD video file will be produced with up to 4 recordings within the single file. 
 Optional cameras are not included. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 OPTIONAL CAMERAS 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 F2PT7RA 
 1080P FHD Internal Rear Window Camera

1080P FHD Internal Infrared 
Cabin Camera 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 MULTEC5 
1080P FHD External Rear Camera with 5M Extension 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 MULTEC20 
1080P FHD External Rear Camera with 20M Extension

1080P FHD External Side 
Camera
