name: Thinkware T700 64GB Dual 4G LTE Dash Camera 2CH 1080p Full HD WiFi GPS
short: 64GB model | Simply insert an active nano size 4G SIM Card (not included) with SMS and internet data into the dash cam to gain access to the Advanced Connected Features.
src:
THINKWARE T700 CONNECTED 
 LTE 
 With 4G LTE technology on-board, the dash cam connects to your smartphone in real-time from anywhere. Simply insert an active nano size 4G SIM Card (not included) with SMS and internet data into the dash cam to gain access to the Advanced Connected Features. Australian Version compatible with Telstra, Optus and Vodafone 4G LTE Networks. 
 The NEW THINKWARE CONNECTED LTE mobile app offers a wide range of smart features. Now you can truly communicate with your vehicle in real-time seamlessly. One account on Thinkware Connected LTE can connect up to five dash cam devices. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THINKWARE CONNECTED LTE 
Smartphone App* 
 *Compatible with Android (7.0 Nougat or higher) and iOS (11.4 or higher) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Real-Time Parking Impact Video 
 When an impact is detected in standard parking mode by the dash cam, receive a notification and play the 20 second Full-HD video (10 seconds before and after the incident) on your smartphone. 
 
 
 
 Remote Live View 
 Remotely view your dash cam in Continuous Recording Mode and Standard Parking Mode by clicking the Live View Button on the app home screen. 
 *Remote Live View can be requested up to 300 minutes a month. 
**Remote Live View is unavailable in Energy Saving Mode when your vehicle is parked. 
 
 
 
 
 Captured Image of Parked Vehicle 
 In Parking Mode, check the location of your vehicle and its surroundings. View a Full-HD image of your front and rear camera including the location of your parked vehicle. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Emergency SOS Alert 
 A SOS message and video will be sent to your emergency contact in the event of a strong impact crash or when the driver presses the SOS button on the dash cam. 
 * Strong impact crash message includes a 20 seconds video (10 seconds before and after the incident) and location of the crash. SOS recording message includes a 10 seconds video (5 seconds before and after the incident) and location of the crash. 
 
 
 
 Vehicle Status and Driving History 
 Monitor your vehicle’s status to check whether your vehicle is parked or operating on the road.View your driving history including data such as date, time, distance, route and driving behavior. Check your vehicle battery voltage and remotely turn off the dash cam when the battery voltage is low. 
 
 
 
 Remote Firmware Data Update 
 Update your dash cam remotely to enhance your dash cam’s features, maintain optimal operation and increase stability. Firmware download can take up to several minutes and you will receive a push notification once the download is complete. Check the firmware download and reboot the dash cam to start firmware update. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 * No new videos can be recorded while saving the 20 seconds of first impact file. 
 ** If a second or third impact is detected, an additional push notification alert of the impact is sent to the user’s smartphone. And if those impacts are within 10 seconds from the first impact, it can be seen in the remaining seconds of the first impact file (e.g. If, a second impact is detected 2 seconds from the first impact, 8 seconds are the duration of the second impact video). 
 *** Strong impact videos are recorded for 20 seconds (10 second before and after the incident) at 30 frames per second. The videos are uploaded on to the server and your emergency contact will receive an SMS message including the impact details and video URL. The strong impact notification, strong impact video upload and transmission to emergency contact is an unlimited service. 
 **** The service behavior and the transmission may vary depending on the server environment and your mobile data. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 QUICK DOWNLOADS 
 VIA BUILT-IN WI-FI 
 Wi-Fi connectivity supports both 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands for the best experience in different environments. 
 2.4GHz has a longer range and can be captured from a farther distance. The longer range network also captures other devices thus preferred in undisrupted environments. 
 5GHz has a shorter range and can offer better performance with a higher bandwidth. The shorter range network avoids interferences thus preferred for a less congestive experience within shorter distances. 
 *Download speed and connection experience can differ according to smartphone specifications and telecommunications conditions. 
**5GHz band may be more suitable for cities due to possible disruptions in telecommunications environments. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THINKWARE 
 DASH CAM LINK 
 *Compatible with Android (7.0 Nougat or higher) and iOS (11.4 or higher) 
 
 
 PLAY RECORDED VIDEOS AND MANAGE SETTINGS ON SMARTPHONE 
 The Thinkware Dash Cam T700 and your smartphone can be connected via 
‘THINKWARE DASH CAM LINK’ app with built-in Wi-Fi. 
Check live view screen, play recorded videos, and manage dash cam settings. 
 
 * Dash Cam and Smartphone must be within 5M of each other and the Dash Cam must be powered on for Wifi Connection. 
 
 
 
 
 
 COMPREHENSIVE DRIVING DATA 
INFORMATION THROUGH BUILT-IN GPS 
 Using the GPS data can precisely pinpoint the vehicle’s location and routes with its driving speed on the map.The GPS helps you accurately assess the status of the accident by providing you with the vehicle speed,the direction of the collision and the severity of impact. The dash cam not only records driving footage but can also be used to track and recall past driving routes whether it be work or holiday routes. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ADVANCED DRIVER ALERT SYSTEM 
 (ADAS) 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 LDWS 
 Lane Departure Warning System 
 Designed for distracted or drowsey drivers, the dash cam will alert you as soon as it senses you’re vehicle leaving the lane while driving at a speed of over 50 kilometres per hour. LDWS alerts you when leaving your lane to help keep any road misfortunes from ruining your trip or compromising you and your passengers’ safety. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 FCWS / uFCWS 
 High Speed / Urban Forward Collision Warning System 
 Keep a safe distance from the vehicle you’re following with the help of FCWS / uFCWS. Equipped with a state-of-the-art road safety warning system, it calculates the real-time distance between your vehicle and the automobile in front of you at a speed of over 30 kilometres per hour (km/h) (in expressways) and under 30 km/h in a busy, congested city. This dash cam issues a three-level early warning to the driver, depending on the danger of the possible collision. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 FVDW 
 Front Vehicle Departure Warning 
 When stopped at an intersection or a traffic jam, this dash cam's Front Vehicle Departure Warning (FVDW) intelligent guidance system lets you know when the vehicle in front of you has already started moving, helping you stay attentive each time. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 SAFETY CAMERA ALERTS 
 This dash cam comes with various Safety Camera Alert functions aimed at helping drivers abide by traffic rules and regulations to avoid getting ticketed for an infraction. Through the built-in GPS, it lets a driver know about a designated average speed camera & mobile speed zones and notifies drivers of upcoming fixed red-light and speed cameras. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HIGH DEFINITION 
 VIDEO QUALITY 
 CMOS Image Sensors allow constant front and rearview 1080P Full HD resolution recording during both daytime and nighttime. The 140-degree front and 160-degree rear cam wide angle lens view will minimiseblind spots to assure recording of all events without fail. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DUAL 
 CHANNEL 
 The T700 is dual channel and is available as a pack with a Front and Rear Camera Included. The rear camera simply mounts on the inside of the rear window and is designed to capture an event at the back of the vehicle. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 STATE-OF-THE-ART 
 VIDEO ENHANCEMENTS 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Wide Dynamic Range (WDR) 
 Whether you’re driving under bright sunlight, heading out of a tunnel or getting under the shadow of a tall building, the WDR feature helps get you through a sudden change in frontal light exposure levels that yield excessively bright or dark recordings. WDR does this by getting rid of overly bright spots and correcting colour balance to produce nothing but clear images. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Super Night Vision 1.0 
 Using the latest Image Signal Processing (ISP) technology, the dash cam records videos up to 10 times brighter even in low-light environments like dark alleyways or underground parking lots during standard parking mode recordings. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Automatic Exposure 
 A sudden rise of light exposure brought about by intense sunlight or headlight beams from oncoming vehicles, or poor lighting in a tunnel may give any ordinary dash cam trouble capturing clear images. The T700 comes with an automatic light exposure function that controls light exposure levels for crisp footage at all times. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 VARIOUS AUTONOMOUS 
 RECORDING MODES 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Continuous 
 Recording Mode 
 Automatically activates as soon as the engine starts, this function automatically records videos in one-minute segments via an auto-looping mechanism. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Event Recording 
 Mode 
 Active Impact Monitoring System, made possible by the built-in three-axis G-Sensor, automatically stores video data 10 seconds before and after a collision. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Manual 
 Recording Mode 
 Simply press the Manual Record Button on the dash cam to save video files seperate from the Continuous Recording Videos. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Advanced Parking Surveillance Mode 
 While the vehicle is parked, if an impact is detected the dash cam securely stores 20 seconds of footage (10 seconds before/after). 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Audio / Voice 
 Recording 
 Not only does it capture vivid videos, but the dash cam also records crystal-clear audio. 
 
 
 
 
 
 ENERGY SAVE 
 PARK MODE 
 This feature significantly trims down your power consumption to up to 1/3 less, while giving you as much as 3x longer video recording capability. Serves you well when you’re on a vacation or you need to leave the vehicle unattended for quite some time, the Energy Save Parking Mode instantly puts the dash cam to sleep after capturing 20-second footage of an impact or motion detected by the G-Sensor. 
 
 TIME LAPSE 
 PARK MODE 
 Records at 2 frames per second, the Time Lapse Park Mode makes it possible to reduce the video files’ size; hence, this can capture videos from your parked vehicle up to 16 times longer than other dash cams can. This ensures important clips or images will stay safe in it's memory for the long haul. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 HIGH-TEMPERATURE 
PROTECTION SYSTEM 
 Like all THINKWARE dash cams, it has a built-in thermal sensor that protects it from getting hounded by the intense heat. Clad in a specially-designed heat discharge construction, the sensor automatically shuts it down to prevent overheating, allowing the dash cam to thrive even in the harshest Australian weather conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 VIEWER FOR CHECKING CLEAR AND PRECISE VIDEO 
 The intuitive and simple-to-use interface allows you an easy and convenient viewing of your recorded videos. Through PC or Mac viewer, you can playback and download recorded videos along with your route history and speed record. You can also change the dash cam settings, format the memory card, or install updates with just a few clicks on the viewer.

name: Thinkware U3000 64G 4K UHD 2160p Front & 2K QHD 1440p Rear camera
short: Introducing the Thinkware U3000 Dash Cam, the ultimate companion for capturing your driving experiences with unparalleled clarity and advanced features. With its 4K resolution and Dual RADAR technology, this dash cam accurately records every moment on the road.
src:
Thinkware U3000 64G 4K UHD Front & 2K QHD Rear camera 
 
THINKWARE’s newest flagship dash cam model U3000 captures true 4K UHD 2160p resolution ultra high definition at the front and 2K QHD 1440p resolution at the rear, making it one of the highest resolution 2-channel dash cams in the market! Housed in a low profile and modern design. 
 
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DBxwey66r7A&t=7s 
 
 
 
The Thinkware U3000 features the following: 
 
 
 
 
 ULTRA HIGH DEFINITION 
 VIDEO QUALITY 
Equipped with the latest Sony Starvis 2 IMX678 Image Sensor, you can record in crystal clear 4K 2160p UHD front and 2K 1440p QHD rear cam footage day or night at 30FPS. The 152° front and 128° rear wide-angle lens minimise blind spots to assure all events are recorded without fail. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 4K IMAGE QUALITY 
 SETTINGS 
 The greater the amount of data on the image displayed through the screen, the better the image quality. The U3000 provides a clearer image by adjusting the number of bits per second of recorded images stored 
 *Standard Option - 24Mbps / High Option - 30Mbps 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DYNAMIC 2K 
 AT 60FPS 
U3000 also supports 2K QHD recording at 60 frames per second. 
High frame rate delivers both smoother and sharper image. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DUAL 
 CHANNEL 
 Equipped with an input for a second camera, this can take your surveillance capabilities to the next tier. Just add in the 2K 1440P QHD rear camera to the mix to get peace of mind across the board, as doing so lets you keep an eye on what’s happening behind your vehicle. Available as an optional extra, included in 2 channel kits. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 STATE-OF-THE-ART 
 VIDEO ENHANCEMENTS 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Wide Dynamic Range (WDR) 
Whether you’re driving under bright sunlight, heading out of a tunnel or getting under the shadow of a tall building, among others, its WDR feature helps get you through a sudden change in frontal light exposure levels that yield excessively bright or dark recordings. WDR does this by getting rid of overly bright spots and correcting colour balance to produce nothing but clear images. 
 
 
 Nighttime Picture Quality Correction 
Images from videos recorded at nighttime on poorly-lit avenues, streets or roads generally don’t look that lucid. But with this, it’s an entirely different story. It’s armed with enhancement sensors that make brightness, colour and noise cancellation controls possible each time ; hence, vivid video recordings of your evening drive. 
 
 
 
 Automatic Exposure 
A sudden rise of light exposure brought about by intense sunlight or headlight beams from oncoming vehicles, or poor lighting in a tunnel may give any ordinary dash cam trouble capturing clear images but not THINKWARE dash cams. They come with an automatic light exposure function that controls light exposure levels for crisp footage at all times. 
 
 
 
 
 
 SUPER NIGHT VISION 
 4.0 
Super Night Vision 4.0 takes advantage of Sony STARVIS 2’s advances in high sensitivity and low noise technology to capture clearer footage in low-light conditions. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 PARKING SURVEILLANCE 
 MODE 
With hardwiring installation, enjoy parking protection against potential mishaps and hit-and-runs by capturing footage when an impact or motion is detected (hardwiring cable or OBD-II cable required). 
You can tailor the U3000’s Parking Surveillance mode to the coverage that best fits your surveillance needs by choosing from Impact/Motion Detection, Time Lapse, or Energy Saving parking modes. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 New RADAR Parking Mode with Built-In RADAR 
 Radar Parking mode is a low-powered recording mode that utilizes the U3000’s built-in radar to monitor motion with minimal power consumption (requires hardwiring or OBD-II cable). This allows for longer buffered parking surveillance so you also have footage of events leading to an incident. When a motion or impact is detected, the U3000 will save a 20-sec video clip (10s before and 10s after the incident has been detected). 
 
 Note: 
– Parking Surveillance mode requires Hardwiring Cable (professional installation recommended) or OBD-II Power Cable. 
– The distance and degree of detection can be different depending on the environment and other factors. 
– Not every object is guaranteed to be detected. 
– Thinkware CONNECTED features are unavailable in Radar Parking Mode as all network data functions are turned off to reduce power consumption. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Impact and Motion Detection 
 With Impact and Motion Detection turned on, any potential vandalism attempts and hit-and-run drivers while the car is parked will be caught in the act. In Parking mode, Impact detection captures any impact to the vehicle while Motion Detection captures any movement around the vehicle. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Smart Parking Mode 
This safety feature prevents heat-related damage by automatically switching the U3000 to a low-power mode if the temperature inside the vehicle gets too high during Parking mode. 
In this state, the dash cam records incidents triggered by impacts only until its operating temperature is safe again to resume Motion Detection or Timelapse Parking mode. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 THINKWARE 
 CONNECTED 
 Receive impact notifications or monitor remotely what’s happening around your vehicle via your smartphone with the Thinkware CONNECTED app*. 
With the U3000 connected to the internet, the dedicated Thinkware CONNECTED app gives you access to the following features... 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Strong Impact Notifications while Driving 
 
 Impact Notifications when Parked 
 
 Send Emergency Message 
 
 
 
 Remote Live View 
 
 Vehicle Status & Driving History 
 
 Captured Image of Most Recent Parking 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 * Disclaimer: 
1. Connecting the dash cam to a mobile hotspot device or a Wi-Fi network with Internet access will consume data. Carrier/Service Provider charges may apply. 
2. The smartphone used to set up the Internet connection on the dash cam cannot also be used as a mobile hotspot for the dashcam. A different hotspot device/smartphone is required. 
3. To connect the dash cam to the internet, use the Thinkware Dash Cam Link App. Once the dash cam is connected to the internet, you can go to the Thinkware CONNECTED app to get access to CONNECTED features. 
4. Thinkware CONNECTED service is in beta version right now and some features may be unavailable or limited. 
 
 
 
 
 EASY WI-FI DEVICE PAIRING 
 WITH THINKWARE DASH CAM LINK APP & BLUETOOTH 
 Built-in Bluetooth allows hassle-free dash cam pairing with your compatible Android or iOS device via the Thinkware Dash Cam Link App. 
Once paired, replay your latest driving videos and manage your dash cam’s settings with the Thinkware Dash Cam Link App. 
 
 
 
 
 QUICK DOWNLOADS 
 VIA BUILT-IN WI-FI 
Wi-Fi connectivity supports both 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands for the best experience in different environments. 
 
2.4GHz has a longer range and can be captured from a farther distance. The longer range network also captures other devices thus preferred in undisrupted environments. 
 
5GHz has a shorter range and can offer better performance with a higher bandwidth. The shorter range network avoids interferences thus preferred for a less congestive experience within shorter distances. 
 
 *Download speed and connection experience can differ according to smartphone specifications and telecommunications conditions. 
**5GHz band may be more suitable for cities due to possible disruptions in telecommunications environments. 
 
 
 ADVANCED DRIVER ALERT SYSTEM (ADAS) 
 
 
 
 Rear Collision Warning System [NEW] 
Notifies you of any tailgating vehicles within a distance of 5M to 10M for more than 5 seconds. Automotically saves footage into the event folder. Can be activated from 50km/h. 
 
 
 Lane Departure Warning System 
Designed for distracted or drowsey drivers, the dash cam will alert you as soon as it senses you’re vehicle leaving the lane while driving at a speed of over 50 kilometres per hour. LDWS alerts you when leaving your lane to help keep any road misfortunes from ruining your trip or compromising you and your passengers’ safety. 
 
 
 High Speed / Urban Forward Collision Warning System 
 Keep a safe distance from the vehicle you’re following with the help of FCWS / uFCWS. Equipped with a state-of-the-art road safety warning system, it calculates the real-time distance between your vehicle and the automobile in front of you at a speed of over 30 kilometres per hour (km/h) (in expressways) and under 30 km/h in a busy, congested city. This dash cam issues a three-level early warning to the driver, depending on the danger of the possible collision. 
 
 
 Front Vehicle Departure Warning 
When stopped at an intersection or a traffic jam, this dash cam's Front Vehicle Departure Warning (FVDW) intelligent guidance system lets you know when the vehicle in front of you has already started moving, helping you stay attentive each time. 
 
 
 
 
 COMPREHENSIVE DRIVING INFORMATION 
 WITH GPS 
This dash cam has built-in GPS, meaning, it can help you keep track of your vehicle’s driving speed, precise location while identifying ideal routes on the map. GPS also allows for an accurate assessment of a specific area’s details, letting you pin holiday routes for faster travels. In case of a road mishap, it supplies factual reading of vehicle speed, time of the collision and impact severity. 
 
 
 
 
 SAFETY CAMERA 
 ALERTS 
This dash cam comes with various Safety Camera Alert functions aimed at helping drivers abide by traffic rules and regulations to avoid getting ticketed for an infraction. Since it sports a built-in GPS, it lets a driver know about a designated average speed camera & mobile speed zones and notifies drivers of upcoming fixed red-light and speed cameras.

Tradesman Commercial Max Roof Rack 
 The Commercial Max Roof Rack range from Tradesman Products is an ideal solution for those who need to transport extra cargo on their vehicle. The racks are built using heavy-duty ERW commercial grade tubing with a powder coat finish in black.

The Commercial-Max roof rack is Tradesman’s heavy duty roof rack for carrying building materials, plaster sheets, ladders and all your work and leisure materials. The best tradie roof rack on the market. It is also ideal for outdoor enthusiasts who need to transport gear for skiing, snowboarding, surfing, or biking activities. 
 
In addition to the Commercial Max Roof Rack, Tradesman Products offers a wide range of other roof rack systems and accessories to meet the needs of all kinds of customers. From the Tradesman Wedgetail 4x4 Platform system to the Tradesman Trade-Max standard roof bars, there is a roof rack system to suit every need and budget. 
 Tradesman build all of the Commercial Max & Oval ranges in 6 different styles from Flat Deck (no side rails welded on) to basket style (we call closed ends) tent style (specifically designed for roof top tents) Closed ends front or rear with open the other end and the Standard Open End Roof Rack with the side rails. 
 
 
Overall, the Commercial Max Roof Rack range from Tradesman Products is a reliable and versatile solution for anyone who needs to transport extra cargo on their vehicle. With its durable design, easy installation, and range of accessories, this roof rack system is sure to meet all your needs and exceed your expectations. 
 
 
 Tradesman roof rack accessories 
 Rear Ladder Rollers are a popular tradie choice and are a great aid for loading and unloading ladders and lengths all day every day. 
We make lockable Conduit Carriers with the popular easy to use twist open KRS lockable caps and can make them up to 5900mm long in 100mm or 150mm diameters. We use dedicated aluminium castings for mountings. 
 
 Mesh Floors are a popular option and have either a 50x50x3mm square weldmesh welded to the base of the platform on the steel versions or the diamond shaped amplimesh like your home security door welded to the base of the Oval Alloy racks. 
 
 Low Side Rails – lower side rails for those that have height restrictions but still need an edge to lap their load up to. 
 
Colour: The Commercial Max and the Oval ranges are available in a Stain Black (gloss) or Matte Black (textured flat matt black). Both are same cost, quality, durability and UV protection. The Wedgetail roof racks are the Matte Black only. 
 
 Zinc Electroplating: Before powder coating, the whole steel roof rack is fully zinc electroplated 10-12 microns just like say your outside gate hinges. Any scratches down to the steel are protected on their edges by the zinc platinmg that acts as a stop gate and will not allow corrosion to spread and bubble/blister off paint – outcome is better looking roof rack even after 5 years and keeps its strength integrity stopping corrosion moving in. Ideal for those that work & play in salt air environments and still need the toughness of steel to handle the rigors of heavy or regular loads that tradies experience day in day out. 
 
Accessories like Shovel Holders, Spare Wheel holders, Jerry Can Holders, HiLift Jack & Shovel Holders, 
 
 Awning Brackets are specific for multiple styles of awnings from straight out to the big 270 degree ones. 
 
 Inverted Uni-Struts – are available in our Commercial Max & Oval ranges to aid fixing accessories like the above mentioned much easier utilizing the cutout slots and Uni Nuts – ideal for mounting bike carriers and Kayaks etc

Oval alloy roof racks also offer excellent strength and durability. You should also properly secure any items you transport on the rack to prevent them from shifting or falling off during transit.

name: Trailer Socket and Anderson Plugs
key_features: The 12-pin flat plug has a second row of 5 large terminals, which allow for a 6mm auto cable. Caravan manufacturers use this row of terminals for extra features built within the caravan. These features differ with each manufacturer and are never the same, so it is important to have the socket customised to your needs. | It is best not to run battery charge wires or fridge power wires through a 7-pin or 12-pin plug. The cable size you are limited to by the plug/socket is technically too small to carry enough current to charge batteries or power fridges effectively. In this scenario, it is best to use Anderson plugs with a minimum of 8 B&S cables.
short: We offer a range of sockets and harnesses which you may require for towing your Trailer, Caravan, Boat or Jetski. The trailer sockets and plugs are offered in various shapes, including the common 7 and 12 pin flat or round variations. We can also install these sockets to suit the specifications supplied to you by the manufacturer, and combine this with any Electric Brake Controller and/or Anderson sockets needed (for fries, charging or stability control).
src:
We offer a range of sockets and harnesses which you may require for towing your Trailer, Caravan, Boat or Jetski. The trailer sockets and plugs are offered in various shapes, including the common 7 and 12 pin flat or round variations. 

 We can also install these sockets to suit the specifications supplied to you by the manufacturer, and combine this with any Electric Brake Controller and/or Anderson sockets needed (for fries, charging or stability control). 

 
 TRAILER PLUG WIRING INFORMATION 
 
 The 12-pin flat plug has a second row of 5 large terminals, which allow for a 6mm auto cable. Caravan manufacturers use this row of terminals for extra features built within the caravan. These features differ with each manufacturer and are never the same, so it is important to have the socket customised to your needs. 
 It is best not to run battery charge wires or fridge power wires through a 7-pin or 12-pin plug. The cable size you are limited to by the plug/socket is technically too small to carry enough current to charge batteries or power fridges effectively. In this scenario, it is best to use Anderson plugs with a minimum of 8 B&S cables.

Mini Rearview Flush Mount Camera – Compact, Versatile & Discreet 
 The Mini Rearview Flush Mount Camera is a sleek, compact solution designed for vehicle owners who want a clean, factory-style reverse camera installation. With a flush mount design and optional side wing bracket , this camera suits a wide variety of mounting applications — from bumpers and number plate surrounds to panels and trims.

 Ultra-compact size: just 15mm diameter x 15mm length

UNIDEN UH6160 
 
 
 
 
 Introducing the latest in UHF Communications from the world leaders in wireless communication. The UH6160 is a next generation trade quality UHF In-Car UHF Radio with Remote Speakerphone ready to install for your next adventure. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
[embed]https://youtu.be/34234aoBNPk[/embed] 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The unit has a Remote Speaker Microphone with a built-in Large LCD Backlit Screen, which allows you to control all functions and features remotely, including volume and Power On/Off. Choose from 7 backlit display colours and 3 brightness levels for easy viewing at night, low light situations or just to suit your personal preference. This unit also features Instant Channel Programming and Recall at the touch of a button which is located on the MIC. 
 The X66 base unit is so compact it can be mounted almost anywhere, including the glove box, under the seat, or in the dashboard. With 5 Watt Output Power and 38 x CTCSS and 104 x DCS Codes to choose from, this unit is the perfect travel companion to enable you to stay in touch. 
 The latest innovation added is the Master Scan Technology, is designed to ensure minimal disruptions for continuous communication. This premium feature also has Dynamic Switching, which lets users retain constant communication by changing over to unused channels. This network scan function searches for other radios that share the same CTCSS or DCS tone. When the radio detects a signal with no code or an incorrect code, it switches to an unused channel when transmitting. By scanning only group channels, radios in the network will be able to detect and receive group transmissions, offering continuous communication without interruption.

 Introducing the Latest in UHF Communication with the New Flagship in the Uniden Range. The New XTRAK 80 Pro is a Smart UHF Radio the latest in UHF Communications from the world leaders in wireless communication.

Whether in another vehicle with the XTRAK 80 Pro or on foot with XTRAK 50 Pro, you’ll never be out of contact and always be able to communicate and establish your exact position, as Uniden’s location tracking works between the in vehicle and handheld UHF radios, ensuring both locations are accurate.

name: Vehicle Mounted Fire Extinguishers
short: Our range of vehicle mounted fire extinguishers for vehicles includes sizes suitable for cars, trucks, and other types of vehicles. Fire extinguishers are critical safety equipment for all kinds of vehicles. They can help prevent small fires from turning into large-scale disasters and save lives in emergencies.
src:
Vehicle Mounted Fire Extinguishers 
At Audio Visual Security, we understand the importance of fire safety, especially regarding vehicles. That's why we offer a range of fire extinguishers for vehicles in various sizes to meet different usage requirements.

Fire extinguishers are critical safety equipment for all types of vehicles. They can help prevent small fires from turning into large-scale disasters and save lives in emergencies.

 

 Our range of fire extinguishers for vehicles includes sizes suitable for cars, trucks, and other types of vehicles. We recommend that vehicle owners choose a fire extinguisher with a minimum rating of 1A:10B:C, which is suitable for most small vehicle fires.

For larger vehicles such as buses or heavy machinery, we recommend larger fire extinguishers with higher ratings, such as 2A:40B:C or 4A:60B:C. These extinguishers are capable of putting out larger fires and can provide added protection in case of an emergency.

All of our fire extinguishers comply with Australian safety standards and are regularly tested and maintained to ensure they are in good working condition.

In addition to providing fire extinguishers for vehicles, we offer a range of other safety products to help our customers stay safe and compliant. Whether you need workplace vehicle first aid kits, safety signs, or reflective tape, we have the products to stay safe and prepared in emergencies.

At Audio Visual Security, we are committed to providing our customers with the highest-quality safety equipment and products. Contact us today to learn more about our range of fire extinguishers for vehicles and other safety products.

 

 

View Our Fleet Range here

name: Vehicle Wheel Nut Indicators and Dust Caps
key_features: ✔️ Designed for use on wheels with trims and step rings | ✔️ Instant visual indication of loose wheel nuts or unwanted nut movement | ✔️ Melting point indicator alerts to high heat caused by brake issues or bearing failure | ✔️ Weatherproof and corrosion-resistant – ideal for outdoor and heavy-duty use | ✔️ Aids fleet maintenance checks and improves inspection efficiency | ✔️ Cost-effective safety solution – easy to install and low maintenance | ✔️ Compatible with safety standards set by DfT, FORS, DVSA, HSE, FTA , and RHA
short: Wheel nut indicators are small, visible devices fitted to a vehicle's wheel nuts to indicate whether they have become loose or have been properly torqued. While this may seem minor, wheel nut indicators are essential for mining and traffic control vehicles.
src:
Dustite LR® Vehicle Wheel Nut Indicators – Visual Safety for Fleet & Industrial Vehicles 
 Dustite LR® Wheel Nut Indicators are a simple yet powerful safety tool designed to enhance the reliability and roadworthiness of fleet, mining, and commercial vehicles . Specifically engineered for wheels with trims and step rings , these indicators provide immediate visual confirmation of wheel nut movement or overheating issues , helping to prevent dangerous on-road failures and costly downtime. 
 Built to withstand harsh conditions, Dustite LR® offers the added benefit of protection against corrosion, weather, and wear , making it the ideal choice for demanding environments such as mining sites , construction zones , and traffic control operations . 


 

 ✅ Key Features & Benefits: 
 
 
 ✔️ Designed for use on wheels with trims and step rings 
 
 
 ✔️ Instant visual indication of loose wheel nuts or unwanted nut movement 
 
 
 ✔️ Melting point indicator alerts to high heat caused by brake issues or bearing failure 
 
 
 ✔️ Weatherproof and corrosion-resistant – ideal for outdoor and heavy-duty use 
 
 
 ✔️ Aids fleet maintenance checks and improves inspection efficiency 
 
 
 ✔️ Cost-effective safety solution – easy to install and low maintenance 
 
 
 ✔️ Compatible with safety standards set by DfT, FORS, DVSA, HSE, FTA , and RHA 
 
 

 

 ️ Why Use Wheel Nut Indicators? 
 Loose wheel nuts are a leading cause of on-road incidents, wheel detachment, and vehicle downtime , especially in high-vibration industries such as: 

 Mining & Resources: 
 Mining vehicles often operate on uneven terrain with heavy payloads, leading to intense vibration. Dustite LR® indicators allow for quick, daily visual checks , helping operators and mechanics detect and correct loose nuts before a failure occurs . 

 Traffic Control & Civil Works: 
 Vehicles used in traffic control face long driving distances, high speeds, and frequent exposure to varied road conditions. Loose wheel nuts here are a major hazard. These indicators allow road crews and drivers to ensure their vehicle’s wheels are secure, especially when carrying barriers, signage, and equipment . 

 Fleet Operations: 
 For fleets of utes, trucks, vans, or trailers, wheel nut indicators provide a fleet-wide safety standard that's easy to implement and aligns with industry best practices. It helps meet OHS requirements , improves compliance, and reduces risk. 


 

 Easy to Implement, Built to Last 
 
 
 Simple push-on installation – no special tools required 
 
 
 Melts at a set temperature , revealing heat-related problems before they escalate 
 
 
 Ideal for daily visual inspections and part of regular fleet maintenance programs 
 
 
 Helps demonstrate commitment to safety to regulators and road users 
 
 

 

 Professional Supply & Fit Available in Melbourne 
 Audio Visual Security specialises in complete fleet vehicle installations and safety upgrades. We can supply and install Dustite LR® wheel nut indicators as part of your pre-delivery setup , fleet maintenance program, or on-site installation service. 
 Whether you're operating a fleet of light commercial vehicles, mobile plant machinery, or heavy-duty mining trucks , we offer tailored solutions that meet your industry standards, job site requirements, and OHS obligations .

name: Victron Battery Monitor Smart Type w/ Bluetooth BMV-712. Monitors Two Batteries.
short: With Bluetooth built-in, the BMV Smart is ready for the Internet of Things (IoT) era. With Bluetooth being implemented in most other Victron Energy products, wireless communication between products will simplify system installation and enhance performance.
src:
With Bluetooth built-in, the Victron Battery Monitor Smart is ready for the Internet of Things (IoT) era. With Bluetooth being implemented in most other Victron Energy products, wireless communication between products will simplify system installation and enhance performance. 
 
 Bluetooth inside 
 With Bluetooth built-in, the BMV Smart is ready for the Internet of Things (IoT) era. With Bluetooth being implemented in most other Victron Energy products, wireless communication between products will simplify system installation and enhance performance. 
 Download the Victron Bluetooth app 
 Use a smartphone or other Bluetooth enabled device to - customize settings, 
- monitor all important data on single screen, - view historical data, and to 
 - update the software when new features become available. 
 Easy to install 
 All electrical connections are to the quick connect PCB on the current shunt. The shunt connects to the monitor with a standard RJ12 telephone cable. Included: RJ12 cable (10 m) and battery cable with fuse (2 m); no other components needed. 
 Also included are a separate front bezel for a square or round display appearance, a securing ring for rear mounting and screws for front mounting. 
 Midpoint voltage monitoring 
 One bad cell or one bad battery can destroy a large, expensive battery bank. When batteries are connected in series, a timely warning can be generated by measuring the midpoint voltage. Please see the BMV manual, section 5.2, for more information. 
We recommend our Battery Balancer (BMS012201000) to maximize service life of series-connected lead-acid batteries. 
 Very low current draw from the battery 
 Current consumption: 0.7Ah per month (1mA) @12V and 0.6Ah per month (0.8mA) @ 24V 
Especially Li-ion batteries have virtually no capacity left when discharged until low voltage shutdown. After shutdown due to low cell voltage, the capacity reserve of a Li-ion battery is approximately 1Ah per 100Ah battery capacity. The battery will be damaged if the remaining capacity reserve is drawn from the battery. A residual current of 10mA for example may damage a 200Ah battery if the system is left in discharged state during more than 8 days. 
 Bi-stable alarm relay 
 Prevents increased current draw in case of an alarm. 
 Other features 
 - Battery voltage, current, power, ampere-hours consumed and state of charge 
- Remaining time at the current rate of discharge 
- Programmable visual and audible alarm 
- Programmable relay, to turn off non critical loads or to run a generator when needed - 500 Amp quick connect shunt and connection kit 
 - Shunt selection capability up to 10,000 Amps 
- VE.Direct communication port 
- Stores a wide range of historical events, which can be used to evaluate usage patterns and battery health - Wide input voltage range: 6.5 – 70V 
- High current measurement resolution: 10 mA (0.01A) 
- Additional input to measure voltage (of a second battery), temperature or midpoint voltage, and corresponding alarm and relay settings 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Installation 
 Flush Mount 
 
 
 Brand 
 Victron 
 
 
 Voltage 
 6.5 - 95 Vdc 
 
 
 Battery Capacity (Ah) 
 20 - 9999 Ah 
 
 
 Body Diameter 
 52mm 
 
 
 Body Depth 
 31mm 
 
 
 Facia Diameter 
 63mm 
 
 
 Shunt (included) 
 500A/50mV 
 
 
 Square Bezel 
 69mm x 69mm

name: Victron Energy VE.Direct Bluetooth Smart dongle

src:
victron energy - Using the VE.Direct to Bluetooth Smart dongle you can display your BMV or MPPT information on iOS and Android devices, using the VictronConnect app. View information wirelessly such as battery status and solar panel power, plus other useful data. 
 
 The dongle is able to read data from all products with a VE.Direct port, such as the BMV-70x series battery monitors, Phoenix Inverters with VE.Direct port, MPPT Solar Charge Controllers.

name: Victron Phoenix Inverter 1000W 12v 1200VA 230V VE.Direct AU/NZ Pure Sinewave
key_features: A computer (VE.Direct to USB interface cable needed) | Apple and Android smartphones, tablets, MacBook’s and other devices
short: Low battery voltage alarm trip and reset levels | Low battery voltage cut-off and restart levels | Dynamic cut-off: load dependent cut-off level | Output voltage 210 - 245V | Frequency 50 Hz or 60 Hz | ECO mode on/off and ECO mode sense level
src:
victron phoenix inverter 1000W Inverters allow you to power domestic equipment - requiring 230V/120V AC - using 'leisure' or 'automotive' batteries rated at 12V, 24V or 48V DC. 
 Models:250VA, 375VA, 500VA, 800VA, 1200VA 
 
 Victorn Energy.Direct communication port 
 The VE.Direct port can be connected to: 
 
 
 A computer (VE.Direct to USB interface cable needed) 
 Apple and Android smartphones, tablets, MacBook’s and other devices 
 
 (VE.Direct Bluetooth Smart dongle needed) 
 Fully configurable: 
 
 
 Low battery voltage alarm trip and reset levels 
 Low battery voltage cut-off and restart levels 
 Dynamic cut-off: load dependent cut-off level 
 Output voltage 210 - 245V 
 Frequency 50 Hz or 60 Hz 
 ECO mode on/off and ECO mode sense level 
 
 Monitoring: 
 
 
 In- and output voltage, % load and alarms 
 
 
 Proven reliability 
 The full bridge plus toroidal transformer topology has proven its reliability over many years. 
The inverters are short circuit proof and protected against overheating, whether due to overload or high ambient temperature. 
 High start-up power 
 Needed to start loads such as power converters for LED lamps, halogen lamps or electric tools. 
 ECO mode 
 When in ECO mode, the inverter will switch to standby when the load decreases below a preset value (min load: 15W). Once in standby the inverter will switch on for a short period (adjustable, default: every 2,5 seconds). If the load exceeds a preset level, the inverter will remain on. 
 Remote on/off 
 A remote on/off switch can be connected to a two-pole connector, or between battery plus and the left-hand contact of the two-pole connector. 
 LED diagnosis 
 Please see manual for a description. 
 To transfer the load to another AC source: the automatic transfer switch 
 For our low power inverters, we recommend our Filax Automatic Transfer Switch. The Filax features a very short switchover time (less than 20 milliseconds) so that computers and other electronic equipment will continue to operate without disruption. 
 Available with different output sockets 
 
 DC connection with screw terminals 
 No special tools needed for installation

 In- and output voltage, % load and alarms 
 
 Proven reliability 
 The full bridge plus toroidal transformer topology has proven its reliability over many years. 
The inverters are short circuit proof and protected against overheating, whether due to overload or high ambient temperature. 
 High start-up power 
 Needed to start loads such as power converters for LED lamps, halogen lamps or electric tools. 
 ECO mode 
 When in ECO mode, the inverter will switch to standby when the load decreases below a preset value (min load: 15W). Once in standby the inverter will switch on for a short period (adjustable, default: every 2,5 seconds). If the load exceeds a preset level, the inverter will remain on. 
 Remote on/off 
 A remote on/off switch can be connected to a two-pole connector, or between battery plus and the left-hand contact of the two-pole connector. 
 LED diagnosis 
 Please see manual for a description. 
 To transfer the load to another AC source: the automatic transfer switch 
 For our low power inverters, we recommend our Filax Automatic Transfer Switch. The Filax features a very short switchover time (less than 20 milliseconds) so that computers and other electronic equipment will continue to operate without disruption. 
 Available with different output sockets 
 DC connection with screw terminals 
 No special tools needed for installation

short: INSTALLATION AVAILABLE FOR ALL VIPER CAR ALARMS Vipers 3606VR security will wrap your vehicle in protection, with the most sophisticated electronic technologies available today. This unit features a one-way system, 6-channel security, keyless entry system, on-board door lock relays and parking light flash confirmation.
src:
Viper 3606VR security will wrap your vehicle in protection, with the most sophisticated electronic technologies available today. This unit features a one-way system, 6-channel security, keyless entry system, on-board door lock relays and parking light flash confirmation. 
 
 Includes: One 5-Button 1-Way Remote 
• 24 channel Security and Keyless Entry System 
• SST 800m range 
• 2-Way Upgradable 
• Control Center with integrated valet switch and 
bright blue Status LED 
• Failsafe® Starter Kill 
• Revenger® Six-Tone Battery Back-Up Siren 
• Stinger® DoubleGuard® Shock Sensor on-board 
• Parking Light Flash 
• D2D port for plug-in Xpresskit vehicle interface 
• Flex Relays for remote start/light flash 
• Comfort Closure* 
• 4 Auxiliary Channels for optional remote control 
conveniences* 
• Anti-Grind* 
• XPRESSPORT™ 
 
 
 
 
 
The following terms are listed to assist you in defining the technologies your selected Viper system includes. Please note, not all Viper systems feature all of the following technologies, these descriptions are provided as a glossary of various Viper technologies for reference only. 
 
 
 
 REMOTE CONFIRMATION: 
 
2-Way remotes let you stay in touch with your vehicle, confirming your commands (such as remote start, or arming your security system) either with an LCD screen on the remote, or using LED lights. Some 2-Way remotes also act as a security pager, letting you know your siren has been triggered, even if you are too far away to hear it. 
 
 REMOTES 
 
The number and type of remotes that come with the system. 
 
 RANGE 
 
Viper systems use Radio Frequency (RF) technologies to communicate with your vehicle, and these technologies each have a typical operating range. Range varies by the technology used, but also because of environmental factors such as interference from other RF sources. Currently Viper systems with the longest range use Spread Spectrum Technology (SST) with range up to 1.5km. 
 
 KEYLESS ENTRY 
 
Unlock your vehicle's doors with the push of a button on your keychain remote. 
 
 BOOT POP 
 
Viper systems with Boot Pop can open your power boot with the push of a button. 
 
 SMARTSTART COMPATIBLE 
 
A Viper SmartStart module can be added to this system to make your vehicle SmartStart ready. 
 
 ENCRYPTION 
 
Clone-safe, anti-Code Grabbing technology comes standard on every Viper system. 
 
 DOMELIGHT SUPERVISION 
 
A great safety feature: illuminates your vehicle's dome light for 30 seconds when you disarm your security system or unlock the doors of your remote start system. 
 
 STINGER DOUBLEGUARD SHOCK SENSOR 
 
Each Viper security system comes standard with the dual stage Stinger DoubleGuard shock sensor, which detects blows or impacts to the vehicle and can discriminate light impacts from heavy ones. 
 
Failsafe Starter Kill Keep your car where you parked it with the Failsafe Starter Kill, an immobilizer designed to prevent hot-wiring. 
 
 ANTI-CARJACKING ALSO REFERRED TO AS VRS 
 
VRS is a user-operated anti-carjacking system. Once activated, if your vehicle is carjacked, 30 seconds later the siren will start screaming for help and the lights will flash. When the carjacker pulls over and turns off the ignition, the starter kill will activate, which should prompt the carjacker to then abandon your vehicle for eventual recovery. 
 
 # OF AUXILIARY CHANNELS 
 
Auxiliary channels are electrical outputs controlled by your keychain remote, which your installer can interface with systems in your car to allow you to operate them by remote control. 
 
 
 
Vipers 3606VR security will wrap your vehicle in protection, with the most sophisticated electronic technologies available today. This unit features a one-way system, 6-channel security, keyless entry system, on-board door lock relays and parking light flash confirmation. 
 
 
 
Keep you vehicle safe and secure with a Viper!

name: Viper 3901T CANBUS OEM Upgrade Security System (European Cars)
short: INSTALLATION AVAILABLE FOR ALL VIPER CAR ALARMS This alarm will need to be pre-programmed for a car specific application prior to shipping. Please contact us with your vehicle's details. It is advised that it should be installed by an authorised viper technician.
src:
Viper 3901T CANBUS allows the Directed system to communicate with the vehicle via high speed digital data, through either a single wire or a twisted pair, which ensures a robust connection with minimal wiring connections to the vehicle. Connection to the CANBUS eliminates the need for many of the analog necessary in traditional, hard-wired, security systems cutting the installation time, in many cases, down by as much as 50%. CANBUS communicates with most of the electronic security and convenience systems throughout the vehicle, so the alarm remains in-sync with the vehicle at all times. 
 
 
 
 Overview 
 CANBUS allows the Directed system to communicate with the vehicle via high speed digital data, through either a single wire or a twisted pair, which ensures a robust connection with minimal wiring connections to the vehicle. Connection to the CANBUS eliminates the need for many of the analog necessary in traditional, hard-wired, security systems cutting the installation time, in many cases, down by as much as 50%. CANBUS communicates with most of the electronic security and convenience systems throughout the vehicle, so the alarm remains in-sync with the vehicle at all times. 
 When the vehicle is equipped with a factory security system, it works in sync with Directed CANBUS security system and all factory functionality is retained. 
 The 3901T is the most advanced and sophisticated CANBUS upgrade alarm on the market. The 3901T is the result of many years of research and development by Directed Electronics International (DEI). DEI is the largest car security manufacturer in the world and have custom designed this compact alarm system to not only interprete vehicles CANBUS network but to communicate with it. This gives the Viper system the ability to read and interpret all the alarm requirements whilst being able to control the data network in the car and operate particular features such as the blinkers, windows and ignition system through the connection of only 1 or 2 wires. 
 This design makes the system very simple to install covertly and with minimal intrusion to your vehicles wiring system. It 
 Directed Electronics / Viper have specifically designed firmware for every vehicle ensuring seamless integration to each vehicle. In some cases the 3901T can even unlock additional factory optional features such as automatic window closing when you activate you alarm. 
 3901T Fault Tolerant CAN OEM Security Upgrade System.(programmable) Use the OEM keyless entry remote to control arm & disarm via the CAN BUS. *CAN BUS security systems are all Remote Start compatible and can be used to activate a 561T remote start module. *Some features not available on all vehicles

name: Viper 800V OEM Upgrade Security System
short: Upgrade Alarm transforms any original factory fitted keyless entry system | Dual-stage shock sensor
src:
The Viper 800VR Upgrade Alarm transforms any original factory fitted vehicle keyless entry system into a full alarm system. The system is operated by the vehicles original remote(s) and protects all entry points including doors, bonnet and boot/tailgate. 
 
 To further protect the vehicle the alarm comes with a dual stage shock sensor and dual point immobilisers. Audible warning is achieved via a high output battery back up siren, there is also visual notification via the vehicles park lights or indicators. 
 
 Overview 
The Viper 800VR Upgrade Alarm transforms any original factory fitted vehicle keyless entry system into a full alarm system. The system is operated by the vehicles original remote(s) and protects all entry points including doors, bonnet and boot/tailgate. 
 
To further protect the vehicle the alarm comes with a dual stage shock sensor and dual point immobilisers. Audible warning is achieved via a high output battery back up siren, there is also visual notification via the vehicles park lights or indicators. 
 
Furthermore the 800VR has a dash mounted flashing LED to warn away thieves and confirms the status of the alarm, this LED also provides diagnostic reporting.

src:
FOCAL POWER PACKS 
 
 
 Front: ISVW165 Component Kit 
 Rear: ICVW165 Coaxial Kit 
 Amplifier: Impulse 4.320 2×55 Watts RMS to Front Speakers and 2×80 Watts RMS@2 Ohm to Subwoofer. 
 Harnesses: IMP EXTENSION I/O 150 , IW-VW YISO HARNESS . 
 NOTE: Powered pack will NOT suit vehicles with factory premium or amplified audio. 
 
 
 
 FRONT: 
 The IS VW 165 2-way component kit is designed for all drivers who want to replace their original audio system with a hi-fi quality sound solution . 
The speaker drivers employ Polyglass technology , which delivers well-defined midrange and bass. The sound is natural and without coloration . The Aluminium inverted dome tweeter , a Focal technology, provides perfect treble reproduction in every direction. In addition, tweeter mounting foams and anti-vibration foams are included for a perfect set up. 
 
 
 REAR: 
 The IC VW 165 2-way coaxial kit is designed for all drivers who want to replace their original audio system with a hi-fi quality sound solution. 
The speaker drivers employ Polyglass technology , which delivers well-defined midrange and bass. The sound is natural and without coloration. The Aluminium inverted dome tweeter , a Focal technology, provides perfect treble reproduction in every direction. 
 
 AMPLIFIER: 
 Give your head unit a breath of fresh air. Head unit amplifiers (whether OEM or aftermarket) soon reveal their limits in terms of power and dynamics. At high volume, they soon saturate and ruin the listening pleasure. To compensate for this and to enable you to get the best out of your speaker drivers, Impulse 4.320 is the ideal solution. It will give your installation a boost without you having to embark on a difficult installation process. 
 
 HARNESSES: 
 The Focal Inside VOLKSWAGEN Y-ISO HARNESS head unit adaptation cable is designed for the IMPULSE 4.320 compact 4-channel digital amplifier . It allows the quick and simple connection of the Volkswagen original head unit and of Focal Inside extension cables. 
 Compatible with the IMPULSE 4.320 compact 4-channel digital amplifier , the IMP EXTENSION I/O 150 extension cables with Plug & Play connections offer total installation freedom as they can connect each amplifier channel to one of the speaker drivers.

name: WEDGETAIL - The best Roof racks for adventure & trade
short: Built for the outdoors with advanced aerodynamics, clean lines and options to carry just about any load on any vehicle, the crossbar is the foundation of the roof rack system. Check out our bar styles here, but be sure to Find Your Car and get the right fit before purchasing.
src:
Wedgetail Adventure 
 
 
 
 Durability and versatility are at the heart of the Wedgetail Adventure Roof Rack, making it the ultimate companion for outdoor enthusiasts, tradies, and 4WD adventurers alike. Designed and built right here in Australia, the Wedgetail Adventure Rack is engineered to perform in the toughest conditions — whether you’re navigating remote outback tracks, hauling work gear to site, or loading up for a weekend camping trip. 
 Crafted from premium, high-quality materials, this roof rack delivers outstanding strength and longevity, giving you the confidence to carry your gear securely, no matter the terrain. Its robust construction is made to handle heavy loads and withstand Australia’s harshest climates, from scorching sun and dust to torrential rain and coastal salt air. With a Wedgetail roof rack on your vehicle, you can trust that your equipment, luggage, and adventure essentials are safe and secure — every single time you hit the road. 
 Beyond strength and durability, the Wedgetail Adventure Roof Rack is also designed with aerodynamics in mind. Its sleek, low-profile design not only complements the look of your vehicle but also helps to reduce wind resistance and minimise drag, improving both driving comfort and fuel efficiency. That means you get a quieter ride and save on fuel, even when fully loaded. 
 Thanks to its modular and versatile design, the Wedgetail rack can be customised with a wide range of accessories to suit your specific needs — from bike carriers and jerry can holders to awnings, ladders, and recovery gear mounts. Whatever your adventure or work demands, this rack has the flexibility to adapt and grow with you. 
 Upgrade your 4WD or ute with the strength, style, and performance of the Wedgetail Adventure Roof Rack — built for the way Australians work and play. Explore our range today and experience the difference. 
Engineered for 
• Adventurers 
• Surfers 
• Tourers 
• Motor homes 
• Dual-purpose Trade and Recreational vehicles 
• Hard-core offroad enthusiasts 
 
Available For 
• A wide variety of 4WDs, utes, and wagons, including older models 
• Large vans used in motor home conversions 
• A range of aftermarket ute canopies 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 COMPONENTS OF THE WEDGETAIL ADVENTURE RACK 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Cross Bars 
Securely bolted to the outer frame, crossbars feature top and bottom channels for easy accessory installation. 
 
 Wind Deflector 
Included as standard, this reduces drag for a quieter, more fuel-efficient ride. 
 
 Frame Rails 
Moulded from strong aluminium, these provide maximum dynamic support. 
 
 Wedge-lock corner 
Built from composite materials, these lightweight yet durable units enhance the rack’s structural integrity. 
 
 Mounting Lugs 
Attached to the vehicle’s roof sub-assembly, these ensure a secure and reliable connection. 
 
 Wedge-wing mounting rails 
Precision laser-cut from 3mm steel, these are zinc-plated and powder-coated for durability.

In House Installation Available The Wedgetail platform roof rack has been developed to fill the need for a new-generation composite assembly platform roof rack with the strength to maintain its full load rating on the toughest of off-road tracks. The Wedgetail platform roof rack is fitted onto a set of mounting rails that are bolted to mounting lugs connected into the sub-structure of the roof or onto the roof gutters and held in place by bolt-on clips.
src:
Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack 
 The Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is a versatile and durable solution for your 4WD vehicle's storage needs. 
 Designed and manufactured in Australia by Wedgetail Industries, this roof rack is built to withstand the harshest conditions and provide ample space for all your gear. 
 
The Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is made from high-quality materials, including marine-grade aluminium and stainless steel hardware, ensuring it is both strong and lightweight. The platform comes in various sizes and is made for heavier loads, making it ideal for carrying everything from camping gear to work equipment. 
 The platform can be customised to suit your specific needs, with various accessories available to add to the rack. 
 These include high sides, side rails, tie-down points, and more, allowing you to create the perfect setup for your vehicle and cargo. 
Installation of the Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is quick and easy, with a simple bolt-on system that requires no drilling into your vehicle. The rack is designed to fit 4WD vehicles, including Toyota 79 Land Cruisers, Ford Rangers, and Nissan Navaras. 
 
The adjustable mounting system ensures a perfect fit and maximum stability when driving on rough terrain. 
 
The Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is not only practical but also stylish. Its sleek, low-profile design complements the lines of your vehicle and is finished with a durable, textured black powder coat that resists scratches and UV damage. The platform also features a non-slip surface that provides excellent grip for your cargo, even in wet or slippery conditions. 
 
Another benefit of the Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is its compatibility with various accessories. These include roof tents, awnings, and lighting solutions, allowing you to create the ultimate camping setup for your next adventure. The platform also features built-in channels that can accommodate a range of roof rack accessories from other brands. 
 
The Wedgetail Platform heavy-duty Roof Rack is a top-quality, customisable roof rack solution that provides ample space for all your gear while complementing the lines of your 4WD vehicle. With its modular design, easy installation, and compatibility with a range of accessories, this 4wd or van roof rack is the perfect choice for anyone who needs to transport gear in their vehicle. 
 
 Whether you're heading off-road for an adventure or need to transport work equipment, the Wedgetail Platform Roof Rack is a reliable and practical solution that won't disappoint you. 
 
 
 AVAILABILITY FOR THIS PRODUCT INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING: 
 
 ARB Canopy 
 Chevrolet 
 Dodge 
 EGR Rolltrac Ute Lid 
 Ford 
 GMC 
 GWM 
 Holden 
 Isuzu 
 Iveco 
 Land Rover 
 LDV 
 Mazda 
 Mercedes Benz 
 Mitsubishi 
 Nissan 
 Renault 
 SsangYong 
 Suzuki 
 Toyota 
 Volkswagon 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 DEVELOPMENT AND TESTING 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Computer operator with Wedgetail CAD design showing on the computer screen. 
 
 A Wedgetail roof rack is in the process of being stress tested. 
 
 
 
 
 
 DESIGN 
 Our engineers developed the Wedgetail platform roof rack using custom-designed components and new composite materials. 
 Super strong aluminium was moulded into two profiles for use in the platform frame and for the crossbars. Several materials were tested for use as the corner fittings until the final components were approved. 
 
 TESTING 
 A series of prototypes were manufactured and stress tested on various vehicles and the most challenging offroad tracks with the maximum load allowed. 
 The Wedgetail rack went through two years of development and testing before it was approved for manufacture. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 COMPONENTS 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A frame rail with a hole punched in the bottom flange will be used to bolt in a crossbar. 
 
 A stack of frame rails and Wedge-wing mounting rails is ready to be moved after being powder coated. 
 
 
 
 
 
 FRAME AND CROSSBARS 
 Manufactured using 6060-grade aluminium and extruded in Australia to custom profiles for frame components or crossbars. 
 The frame components are designed for maximum dynamic strength. In contrast, the crossbars are designed to withstand the direct downward pressures generated by the weight of items carried on the rack or by accessories fitted on the crossbars. 
 The frame bars are pre-punched with holes between 250 and 310 mm spacing for locating crossbars and fixing wind deflectors. 
 All bar components are powder coated in matt black. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 A Wedge-lock corner unit is fitted with a flanged nut at each end and then inserted into the frame rail before being fixed in place with an 8 mm stainless steel bolt. 
 
 The Wedge-lock corner units are fixed in place using two 8 mm bolts. 
 
 
 
 
 
 WEDGE-LOCK CORNER UNITS 
 The corner units are moulded using a composite of nylon and glass-reinforcing mixed with other strengthening substances. Once cast the corner units are machined to remove surplus materials and mounting holes are drilled. 
 The Wedge-lock corner units have a flanged nut inserted into the outside of the bolt hole. The ends of the corner units are fitted into the frame rails and 8 mm stainless steel bolts are used to fix them in place, creating a strong joint. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 An assortment of mounting lugs are used to fit different vehicles using bolts or stainless steel rivets. 
 
 A mounting lug fitted to the roof of a vehicle using four stainless steel rivets. 
 
 
 
 
 
 MOUNTING LUGS 
 The mounting lugs are used to attach to mounting points built into the sub-structure of the vehicle roof. Once the fixing lugs are installed, the mounting rails are bolted to the lugs. 
 The lugs are designed for individual models of vehicles and a variety of fixing devices are used for the lugs. Most cars with factory-fitted rails will have bolt-in points so they are used. 
 If bolt-in points is not available, we will drill through to the sub-structure of the roof and use stainless steel rivets to fix the tabs. All holes are then waterproofed using a commercial-grade silicon sealant. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 The crossbars are bolted to the frame rails at each end. 
 
 The Wedge-wing mounting rails are bolted to the mounting lugs to spread the weight of the roof rack over the whole roof. 
 
 
 
 
 
 WEDGE-WING MOUNTING RAILS 
 The mounting rails are custom designed for each vehicle so that the weight of the platform and load is evenly spread over the vehicle roof. 
 The mounting rails are laser cut from 3 mm steel, zinc electro-plated, and powder coated with a matt black finish. 
 The mounting rails for all utes and wagons are a single piece, and for vans, each side is made up of two sections. 
 The mounting rails, lugs, and all required bolts are packed into cartons for shipping. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 ASSEMBLY 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Assembling a corner on a Wedgetail roof rack. The Wedge-lock corner unit fits into the platform frame rail. A flanged nut is placed on the outside of the Wedge-lock corner unit and an 8 mm stainless steel bolt is fitted to create a super strong corner. 
 
 Adding a crossbar to a Wedgetail platform roof rack. A unistrut nut is placed into the crossbar channel and fixed in place by a bolt through a hole punched in the bottom flange of the platform frame. 
 
 
 
 All components are cut to the required length and holes are punched in the platform frame rails at even spacing (between 250 and 310 mm). 
 The platform frame is built first and then the crossbars are added. The crossbars are bolted to the bottom flange of the frame rails using 8 mm stainless steel bolts. 
 The corner units are then tightened and checked to ensure the frame is square and then all bolts are tightened to the specified torque. 
 The Wedgetail platforms are manufactured in a range of sizes to suit 4 wheel drive ute's and wagons and a number of vans. 
 The platform is then wrapped in plastic and packaged in a strong cardboard carton and labelled ready for shipment. 
 
 CUSTOM BUILDS 
 We can custom build a roof rack to allow breaks in the crossbars for vents or skylights. This is applicable mainly to vans. Any custom build needs to be specified fully with complete dimensions. Custom builds must be ordered directly or through a reseller. 
 
 
 
 
 
View the rest of the Tradesman and Wedgetail range here

Wedgetail Trade - Flat Deck 
 Wedgetail Trade Flat Deck | Heavy-Duty Low-Profile Roof Platform for Tradies 
 The Wedgetail Trade Flat Deck is engineered for professional tradies who need maximum strength, low clearance, and everyday functionality — all in one streamlined design. 
 Whether you’re carrying ladders, sheet materials, or bulky tools , this flat deck roof rack provides a stable and durable load-carrying platform that stands up to tough job site conditions and Australian weather. 
 
 Why Choose the Wedgetail Trade Flat Deck? 
 ✅ Low-Profile Design – Ideal for carrying oversized gear or heavy loads without side-rail restrictions. ✅ Practical, Built-In Features – Includes a full-width stainless-steel roller , aerodynamic wind deflector , and heavy-duty extrusion slots and crossbars for secure load handling. ✅ Ladder Carrier Ready – Compatible with Wedgetail ladder buffers and accessories for safely transporting extension or A-frame ladders. ✅ Tough Australian Construction – Built to last from Matte Textura powder-coated aluminium and reinforced composite materials , combining strength and corrosion resistance. 
 The Wedgetail Trade Flat Deck is the no-fuss, heavy-duty solution for tradies who demand a strong, practical, and low-profile platform that works as hard as they do.

src:
Workplace Vehicle First Aid Kits 
At Audio Visual Security, we understand the importance of workplace safety and ensure our customers are equipped with the right tools to meet safety standards. That's why we offer a range of workplace vehicle first aid kits to comply with mining and traffic management specifications.

Our first aid kits are designed to meet the specific needs of workplace vehicles and are tailored to comply with the relevant safety regulations. Our Workplace Vehicle First Aid Kits are available in various sizes and configurations to suit different types of vehicles and usage requirements.

 

Each of our first aid kits includes a comprehensive range of first aid supplies, including bandages, dressings, antiseptic wipes, and other essential items. We ensure that all of our first aid kits are regularly restocked and kept up-to-date with the latest safety standards.

Our commitment to safety extends to all types of workplace vehicles, including those used in mining and traffic management operations . We understand that these vehicles have unique safety requirements and that it's crucial to be well-equipped in case of an emergency.

 

In addition to workplace vehicle first aid kits, we also offer a range of other safety products to help our customers comply with safety regulations. Whether you need safety signs, reflective tape, or other safety equipment, we have the products you need to stay safe and compliant.

At Audio Visual Security, we are committed to helping our customers meet their workplace safety obligations. Contact us today to learn more about our range of workplace vehicle first aid kits and other safety products.

src:
Yakima HD Bars 
 The HD Bar is for heavy loads, rugged terrain and maximum utility. It delivers the muscle and works with Bedrock HD OutPost HD and OverHaul HD to get the heavy-duty job done right. The engineered aluminium construction provides superior support without weighing things down, integrated tie-down points to simplify load security, and T-slot attachment technology for adding gear mounts quickly and easily. The Yakima Way. 
 
 
 Features 
 
 
 Strong, lightweight aluminium construction handles heavy loads – great for rooftop tents. 
 Integrated tie-down points on endcaps make it easy to secure gear 
 T-slots top and bottom to add Yakima and compatible gear mounts easily 
 Includes rubber infill for top T-slot for load protection and wind noise reduction 
 Built to last – and look good doing it – with a durable black powder-coat finish 
 
 Description 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Yakima HD Bars are heavy-duty crossbars for carrying heavy loads on your vehicle's roof. They are engineered to provide excellent strength, durability, and versatility for all your rooftop carrying needs. Whether you need to transport bikes, kayaks, skis, or other equipment, Yakima HD Bars offers a reliable solution for safely securing your gear to your vehicle's roof. 
 
Made from durable and lightweight aluminium, Yakima HD Bars are built to withstand heavy use and extreme weather conditions. They feature a high-strength design that supports loads of up to 500 pounds, making them ideal for carrying more oversized items like ladders, construction materials, and camping gear. 
 
Yakima HD Bars also have an aerodynamic shape that minimises wind noise and drag on the road. This feature makes them more fuel-efficient and quieter than other roof rack systems. The bars also feature an innovative T-slot design that allows easy installation and removal of accessories like bike racks, cargo boxes, and kayak carriers. 
 
Installing Yakima HD Bars is a breeze, thanks to their universal design that fits most roof types, including raised rails, flush rails, and tracks. They come in various lengths, making them suitable for different vehicle sizes and carrying needs. Additionally, the bars come with an end cap system that helps to keep out dirt and moisture, ensuring that they last for many years. 
 
Yakima HD Bars also have a sleek and modern look that complements the design of your vehicle. They come in two different finishes - black or silver - allowing you to choose the one that best matches your vehicle's colour scheme. The bars are also compatible with a wide range of Yakima accessories, allowing you to customise your roof rack system to meet your needs. 
 
Yakima HD Bars offer a reliable, versatile, and durable solution for all your rooftop carrying needs. They are easy to install, aerodynamic, and built to last, making them an excellent investment for anyone who loves outdoor activities and needs a reliable roof rack system. 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Designed for adventure 
Our first consideration when designing a new product is the people using it. We consider the challenges people might face when trying to carry their favourite gear and focus on designing innovative solutions. This approach makes Yakima products intuitive, long-lasting and easy to use. 
 Fit for adventure 
For over 40 years, our dedicated in-house team has been committed to fitting vehicles of all shapes, makes and sizes to ensure we have rack solutions for nearly every car on the road today. 
 Tried, tested and true 
Once we’ve built a rack, we beat the heck out of it in testing, so we can say it will stand up to whatever our friends can put it through. From snow-covered mountain passes to remote dirt roads, we’ve tested and fine-tuned every Yakima product to last. And that’s why we can back up all of our work with a limited lifetime warranty.

src:
YAKIMA Roof Racks 
 Roof Rack Crossbars — Strong, Aerodynamic, and Built for the Outdoors 
 Built for the outdoors and engineered to perform in Australian conditions, our roof rack crossbars are the essential starting point for any roof rack system. Combining advanced aerodynamics with clean, modern lines, they’re designed to minimise wind noise and drag, improve fuel efficiency, and look great on any vehicle — from rugged 4WDs and utes to SUVs and family cars. 
 When you’re serious about carrying more gear safely and efficiently, you need a roof rack foundation you can trust. That’s where our crossbars come in — strong, versatile, and built to handle whatever you throw at them. Whether you’re a tradie transporting ladders, pipes, and tools to the job site, a weekend adventurer loading up bikes and kayaks, or a family packing extra luggage for a holiday, our crossbars give you the confidence and capacity to carry it all. 
 
 
 
 
 Why Crossbars Are the Foundation of Your Roof Rack System 
 Your roof rack crossbars aren’t just an accessory — they’re the backbone of your roof carrying setup. Every other component, from roof boxes and bike carriers to work-specific ladder holders and conduit tubes, mounts directly to the crossbars. 
 That’s why it’s critical to choose the right crossbars for your vehicle and your needs. Our range of crossbars is engineered for maximum load strength while maintaining a sleek, low-profile look that won’t ruin the lines of your vehicle. Better yet, our aerodynamic designs reduce wind resistance and noise at highway speeds — a major improvement over older, square-bar systems. 
 
 
 
 
 A Style to Suit Every Driver 
 We understand that no two drivers are alike — and neither are their vehicles. That’s why we stock a range of bar styles to suit all kinds of vehicles and uses. From heavy-duty square bars perfect for tradies and commercial vehicles, to lightweight, aerodynamic bars ideal for weekend road trips and everyday commuting, there’s a style that meets your exact needs. 
 
 
 
 Heavy-duty bars: Designed for serious work, these bars can handle maximum loads and tough conditions, perfect for trade and construction vehicles. 
 
 
 Aero bars: Lightweight, low-drag, and whisper-quiet, aero bars are ideal for adventurers, family vehicles, and anyone looking to reduce fuel consumption. 
 
 
 Black or silver finishes: Choose the look that complements your vehicle’s style while delivering the same trusted performance. 
 
 
 No matter what you drive or what you need to carry, our crossbars make it easy to maximise your vehicle’s potential. 
 
 
 
 
 Built to Carry Just About Anything 
 One of the biggest benefits of a quality set of crossbars is the sheer versatility they offer. With the right setup, you can carry: 
 ✅ Ladders, pipes, and building materials ✅ Work tools and job-specific gear ✅ Bikes, kayaks, surfboards, and other adventure equipment ✅ Roof boxes, ski carriers, and extra luggage for long trips ✅ Conduits, solar panels, and more 
 The possibilities are endless, and our team can help you choose the right accessories to pair with your crossbars for a complete, secure, and safe solution. 
 
 
 
 
 Find the Perfect Fit 
 Not all roof rack systems are created equal — and not every crossbar fits every vehicle. That’s why we make it easy to find the perfect fit for your make and model with our Find Your Car tool. Simply enter your vehicle details to see which crossbars are compatible, ensuring a safe and secure fit every time. 
 This step is crucial to avoid damage to your vehicle or unsafe loads on the road. We’re here to make sure you get it right the first time, with advice and products you can rely on. 
 
 
 
 
 Ready to Upgrade Your Vehicle? 
 If you’re ready to unlock the full potential of your vehicle, explore our full range of roof rack crossbars today. With unmatched strength, sleek design, and the versatility to handle any load, they’re the smart choice for tradies, adventurers, and everyday drivers alike. 
 Browse our bar styles now — and don’t forget to use the Find Your Car tool to guarantee the perfect fit before you buy. For expert advice or help choosing the right setup, get in touch with our team today!
